i: IMCIM (Inter-Ministerial Committee on Illegal Mining) — established to coordinate government response to the galamsey crisis. WRC (Water Resources Commission) — manages Ghana's water resources and monitors water quality. Minerals Commission — the regulatory body for the madencilik sector, responsible for licensing and compliance monitoring.

Gold Fields — operates Tarkwa and Damang mines. Newmont — operates Ahafo and Akyem mines. AngloGold Ashanti — major gold madencilik company with Ghanaian operations. Ghana is Africa's largest gold producer.

EPA (Environmental Protection Agency of Ghana) — responsible for çevresel permitting, monitoring, and enforcement. Forestry Commission — manages Ghana's forest reserves, many of which are threatened by illegal madencilik. EITI Ghana — Ghana has been EITI compliant since 2010.

Parliament of Ghana — unicameral legislature with 275 members. Contact through parliament.gh. Ghana is a presidential demokrasi with peaceful transfers of power. Minamata Convention on Mercury — Ghana has ratified this treaty requiring phase-down of mercury use in artisanal gold madencilik.

GN.s: Resource-rich West African ekonomi ($25B GSYİH) with massive bauxite reserves (world's largest — 7.4B tons). Tarım 31% GSYİH. Military junta since 2021 coup. Guinea supplies ~25% of global bauxite (the ore used to produce aluminum).

sectors.w: Guinea's bauxite madencilik displaces communities and contaminates water sources. As aluminum buyers face ESG pressure (EU CSRD, Apple/Tesla supply chain requirements), making maden başına çevresel data visible breaks system independence.
bp: International supply chain due diligence (EU CSDDD) requiring çevresel and human rights compliance for bauxite. Ne zaman buyers must verify mine-level conditions, örtüşen çıkar low-cost, unregulated extraction zayıflar.

Per-mine çevresel and community impact disclosure through EITI and supply chain traceability. Ne zaman downstream manufacturers can see the welfare cost per ton of bauxite, W hesaplanabilir hale gelir.
Kısmen kırılabilir. Open-pit bauxite madencilik inherently disturbs landscapes. However, progressive rehabilitation and dust suppression can reduce sistem bağımlılığı.
a: Report çevresel violations to international monitoring organizations (Human Rights Watch, Inclusive Geliştirmekment International)
Document community displacement — report through international accountability mechanisms
Report through madencilik company compliance channels (Rio Tinto, Alcoa, Emirates Global Aluminium)
CBG (Compagnie des Bauxites de Guinée), SMB (Société Minière de Boké): Uygulamak community resettlement standards per IFC Performance Standard 5
Benimsemek ASI (Aluminium Stewardship Initiative) certification
Yatırım yapmak progressive rehabilitation of mined areas
Ministry of Mines: Uygulatmak 2011 Mining Code çevresel provisions
CPDM (Centre de Promotion et de Développement Minier): Güçlendirmek çevresel monitoring capacity
EITI Guinea: Expand reporting to çevresel and community data
Şu yolla savunuculuk yapın: ECOWAS for return to democratic governance and strengthened madencilik regulation
Support EU CSDDD implementation requiring due diligence for bauxite imports from Guinea
Şunu talep edin: ASI certification as condition for international bauxite purchases
Support international accountability mechanisms for madencilik-affected communities
i: Note: Guinea is under military rule (CNRD — Comité National du Rassemblement et du Développement) since September 2021. Independent sivil toplum operates under severe constraints. Bureau Guinéen des Études et Évaluations Environnementales (BGEEE) — çevresel assessment authority. International monitoring: Human Rights Watch and Inclusive Geliştirmekment International have documented impacts of bauxite madencilik on Guinean communities.

CBG (Compagnie des Bauxites de Guinée) — JV of Alcoa, Rio Tinto, and Dadco, one of the world's largest bauxite producers. SMB (Société Minière de Boké) — Chinese-backed consortium (includes Winning International, Shandong Weiqiao). GAC (Guinea Alumina Corporation) — Emirates Global Aluminium subsidiary. ASI (Aluminium Stewardship Initiative) — the industry sustainability standard for the aluminum value chain.

Ministère des Mines et de la Géologie — oversees madencilik policy and licensing. Code Minier (2011, revised 2013) — Guinea's madencilik code establishing çevresel obligations. EITI Guinea — Guinea has been EITI compliant, publishing reports on madencilik revenues.

Note: Guinea's democratic institutions are suspended under military rule. The Conseil National de la Transition (CNT) serves as a transitional legislature. International channels: ECOWAS (Guinea suspended), African Union, international madencilik company home-country oversight (UK, Canada, UAE, China). EU Corporate Sustainability Due Diligence Directive (CSDDD) — will require EU companies to address human rights and çevresel impacts in their supply chains.

GQ.s: Small petrostate ($12.8B GSYİH) with 21.57% combined oil and gas rents. One of Africa's highest per-capita GSYİHs but extreme inequality. Authoritarian rule (Obiang family since 1979 — world's longest-serving head of state). Oil production declining from mature fields.

sectors.w: Equatorial Guinea's oil production has declined ~75% from peak. As fields deplete, the örtüşen çıkar between operators and government revenue zayıflar. Without new discoveries, the economic case for diversification becomes unavoidable.
bp: Economic diversification as oil depletes. Ne zaman production revenue falls below government operating costs, örtüşen çıkar continued extraction from depleting fields breaks — alternative revenue sources become necessary.
Per-field emisyonlar disclosure through international operator reporting (ExxonMobil, Marathon Oil). Making çevresel costs visible makes W computable.
Kırılamaz by policy alone. Hydrocarbon combustion releases CO₂.
a: Report through international operator compliance channels (ExxonMobil, Marathon Oil)
Document çevresel violations to international NGOs
Report corruption to US DOJ (several Obiang family members have faced kleptocracy investigations)
ExxonMobil, Marathon Oil: Apply global çevresel standards to EG operations
Report Scope 1-3 emisyonlar for EG operations in global ESG disclosures
Uygulamak community development programs
Ministry of Mines and Hydrocarbons: Publish production and revenue data through EITI (EG was suspended from EITI in 2010)
Güçlendirmek çevresel standards for offshore operations
BEAC: Improve fiscal şeffaflık for hydrocarbon revenues
Support international anti-kleptocracy enforcement for misappropriated oil revenues
Şu yolla savunuculuk yapın: CEMAC for regional şeffaflık standards
Şunu talep edin: re-engagement with EITI şeffaflık requirements
Support international mechanisms for asset recovery and repatriation of stolen oil revenues
i: Note: Equatorial Guinea is one of the world's most otoriter states. No independent media, sivil toplum, or labor organizations exist. EG LNG (Equatorial Guinea LNG Holdings) — operates the LNG processing plant. International engagement: US Department of Justice Kleptocracy Asset Recovery Initiative has investigated Obiang family assets. Transparency International consistently ranks Equatorial Guinea among the most corrupt countries.
ExxonMobil — the largest oil operator in Equatorial Guinea. Marathon Oil — operates in offshore blocks. GEPetrol — the state national oil company.

Ministry of Mines and Hydrocarbons — oversees oil and gas operations. Note: Equatorial Guinea was suspended from EITI in 2010 for insufficient progress on şeffaflık. BEAC (central bank of CEMAC zone) provides limited macroeconomic oversight.

Note: Equatorial Guinea under President Obiang (in power since 1979) has no democratic institutions. The Cámara de Representantes del Pueblo and Senate are rubber-stamp bodies. International channels: CEMAC, African Union, UN Human Rights Council. Several countries (US, France, Switzerland) have pursued legal action against Obiang family members for corruption and money laundering.

GR.s: EU ekonomi ($256.2B GSYİH) with dominant services sector (68% GSYİH, tourism-heavy). Low resource extraction. Post-debt-crisis recovery. Major shipping industry (Greek-owned fleet is the world's largest). Tarım 3.8% GSYİH (olives, wine).

sectors.w: Greece's Mediterranean diet is being displaced by UPF consumption, contributing to rising obesity (Greece has one of Europe's highest childhood obesity rates). Ne zaman diet-related healthcare costs are published per product category through EOPYY health insurance data, W hesaplanabilir hale gelir.
bp: Uygulamak front-of-pack health labelling to make welfare costs visible to consumers. Ne zaman UPF health costs are visible at point of sale, the örtüşen çıkar between processors and retailers in high-margin UPF zayıflar.

EOPYY (National Organization for the Provision of Healthcare Services) publication of diet-attributable disease costs per food category. Greece's national health system generates data to make W computable.
Not fully breakable. Ultra-processing alters food matrix. Reform yapmakulation mandates can reduce sistem bağımlılığı.
a: Report misleading health claims to EFET (Hellenic Food Authority)
Document food safety violations
Use Greek ihbarcı law (transposition of EU Directive 2019/1937, 2022)
Greek food companies: Yatırım yapmak traditional Mediterranean diet products over UPF
Benimsemek voluntary front-of-pack labelling
Commission health-impact assessments
Ministry of Health: Uygulamak mandatory front-of-pack labelling
EFET: Güçlendirmek enforcement of marketing claims
EOPYY: Publish diet-related health expenditure data
Temsilcinizle iletişime geçin: Βουλευτής in the Βουλή των Ελλήνων (Hellenic Parliament) talep etmek için front-of-pack health labelling
Support EU Farm to Fork Strategy implementation
Advocate for UNESCO Intangible Heritage protection of Mediterranean diet through policy measures
Şunu talep edin: WHO-aligned UPF marketing restrictions
i: EFET (ΕΦΕΤ — Ενιαίος Φορέας Ελέγχου Τροφίμων / Hellenic Food Authority) — Greece's food safety authority. Greece transposed the EU Whistleblower Directive in 2022.

SEVT (Σύνδεσμος Ελληνικών Βιομηχανιών Τροφίμων / Federation of Hellenic Food Industries) — the food industry trade association. Greece's traditional food sector (olive oil, dairy, honey) provides a competitive alternative to UPF.

Ministry of Health — oversees health policy. EOPYY (Εθνικός Οργανισμός Παροχής Υπηρεσιών Υγείας / National Organization for the Provision of Healthcare Services) — the national health insurer managing healthcare expenditure data.
Βουλή των Ελλήνων (Hellenic Parliament) — unicameral legislature with 300 members. Contact through hellenicparliament.gr. Greece is a parlamenter demokrasi and AB üyesi.

GT.s: Central American ekonomi ($113.2B GSYİH) with agriculture at 9.8% GSYİH (coffee, sugar, palm oil). Mining at 1.12% GSYİH (gold, silver — Marlin mine controversy). High inequality and indigenous population (40%+). Remittances significant (~18% of GSYİH).

sectors.w: Guatemala's palm oil expansion into Petén and Alta Verapaz drives ormansızlaşma and displaces indigenous communities. Ne zaman per-farm ormansızlaşma data is linked to palm oil exports (EUDR compliance), W hesaplanabilir hale gelir.
bp: EU Deforestation Regulation compliance requiring farm-level traceability. Ne zaman palm oil exports must prove zero-ormansızlaşma origin, örtüşen çıkar clearing forest for plantations breaks.

Mandatory per-farm çevresel data (tree cover, water use, pesticide application). Guatemala's CONAP (National Council for Protected Areas) can provide monitoring data — linking to agricultural output makes W computable.
Kısmen kırılabilir. Palm oil monoculture reduces biodiversity. However, agroforestry integration and RSPO certification can reduce sistem bağımlılığı.
a: Report illegal ormansızlaşma to CONAP or INAB (National Forest Institute)
Document indigenous land rights violations — report to PDH (Procuraduría de los Derechos Humanos)
Report pesticide violations to MAGA (Ministry of Agriculture)
Palm oil companies (REPSA, NaturAceites): Benimsemek RSPO certification and zero-ormansızlaşma commitments
International buyers: Require supply chain traceability for Guatemalan palm oil
Yatırım yapmak community benefit-sharing agreements
MARN (Ministry of Environment): Güçlendirmek çevresel impact assessment for agricultural expansion
MAGA: Reform yapmak agricultural incentives to require çevresel compliance
CONAP: Uygulatmak protected area boundaries against agricultural encroachment
Temsilcinizle iletişime geçin: Diputado in the Congreso de la República talep etmek için enforcement of çevresel protections for indigenous territories
Support ILO Convention 169 enforcement on indigenous consultation
Advocate for Escazú Agreement ratification
Şunu talep edin: EUDR compliance support for small-scale farmers
i: CONAP (Consejo Nacional de Áreas Protegidas) — manages Guatemala's protected areas. INAB (Instituto Nacional de Bosques) — the national forest institute. PDH (Procuraduría de los Derechos Humanos) — the national human rights ombudsman. Guatemala has significant challenges with çevresel defender safety.

REPSA (Reforestadora de Palma del Petén) — major palm oil producer. GREPALMA (Gremial de Palmicultores de Guatemala) — the palm oil producers' association. RSPO (Roundtable on Sustainable Palm Yağı) — the international certification standard.
MARN (Ministerio de Ambiente y Recursos Naturales) — Guatemala's environment ministry. MAGA (Ministerio de Agricultura, Ganadería y Alimentación) — the agriculture ministry.

Congreso de la República de Guatemala — unicameral legislature with 160 members. Guatemala has ratified ILO Convention 169 on indigenous peoples' rights. The Inter-American Court of Human Rights has issued rulings on indigenous land rights in Guatemala.

GY.s: Fastest-growing ekonomi globally ($24.7B GSYİH, up from $5.5B in 2019) due to massive offshore oil discoveries (Stabroek block). Petrol rantları at 22.08%, madencilik at 9.38% (gold, bauxite). Small population (800K). At risk of 'resource curse' — extraordinary PST exposure from rapid petro-development.

sectors.w: Guyana's 2016 production sharing agreement with ExxonMobil has been widely criticized for giving the government only 2% royalty + 50% profit oil (after cost recovery). Ne zaman the full fiscal terms and çevresel costs are disclosed and understood, W hesaplanabilir hale gelir from production data.
bp: Renegotiate the Stabroek PSA fiscal terms to capture a fair share of petroleum wealth. Ne zaman Guyana's government share approaches international norms (60-80% government take), örtüşen çıkar an extractive-favorable contract zayıflar.

Mandatory saha başına emisyonlar disclosure and çevresel monitoring for all Stabroek block operations. ExxonMobil already reports global emisyonlar — extending to saha başına Guyana data makes W computable.
Kırılamaz by policy alone. Offshore oil production and combustion release CO₂.
a: Report çevresel violations to EPA (Environmental Protection Agency of Guyana)
Document compliance gaps in Stabroek operations — report through ExxonMobil compliance channels
Report fiscal irregularities to the Audit Office of Guyana
ExxonMobil, Hess, CNOOC (Stabroek partners): Uygulamak saha başına emisyonlar disclosure for Guyana operations
Benimsemek zero-flaring targets
Yatırım yapmak oil spill response capacity (current capacity is minimal for deepwater operations)
EPA: Güçlendirmek çevresel monitoring capacity for offshore operations
Ministry of Natural Resources: Commission independent review of Stabroek PSA terms
Natural Resource Fund Board: Uygulamak transparent investment and withdrawal rules
Temsilcinizle iletişime geçin: Member of Parliament in the National Assembly talep etmek için independent review of Stabroek PSA fiscal terms
Support establishment of a properly resourced Petroleum Commission as independent regulator
Advocate for Natural Resource Fund şeffaflık aligned with Santiago Principles for sovereign wealth funds
Şunu talep edin: Norwegian-style petroleum governance model with high government take and transparent wealth fund management
i: EPA (Environmental Protection Agency of Guyana) — responsible for çevresel permitting and monitoring of oil and gas operations. Ministry of Natural Resources — oversees petroleum policy. Audit Office of Guyana — conducts financial audits of government revenue management. Note: Guyana's regulatory capacity is severely under-resourced relative to the scale of oil development.

ExxonMobil (45%), Hess (30%), CNOOC (25%) — the Stabroek block partnership. Production began in 2019 and is expected to reach 1.2 million bpd by 2027. The Stabroek Production Sharing Agreement (2016) — governs fiscal terms. The Natural Resource Fund — Guyana's sovereign wealth fund established in 2019 to manage oil revenues.
Natural Resource Fund Act (2021) — governs the sovereign wealth fund. The Petroleum Commission (planned) — intended to serve as the independent petroleum regulator, but not yet fully established.

National Assembly of Guyana — unicameral legislature with 65 members. Guyana is a cooperative republic with Westminster-style parlamenter demokrasi. The Natural Resource Governance Institute (NRGI) provides technical assistance on petroleum governance. CARICOM — provides regional coordination.

HK.s: Global financial center ($406.9B GSYİH) with 91.8% services. Major banking and securities hub. Under Chinese sovereignty since 1997 with eroding autonomy. Significant financial intermediation — Hong Kong Stock Exchange is 5th-largest globally by market cap.

sectors.w: Hong Kong intermediates massive capital flows including fossil fuel financing. Ne zaman Scope 3 financed emisyonlar are disclosed per financial institution, W hesaplanabilir hale gelir from financial transaction data.
bp: Mandatory financed emisyonlar disclosure for all HKEX-listed financial institutions. Ne zaman banks must disclose the emisyonlar their lending supports, örtüşen çıkar fossil fuel financing zayıflar — ESG-aware investors reallocate.
HKMA Green and Sustainable Finance Cross-Agency Steering Group implementation. Making climate risk visible in financial products makes W computable.
Kısmen kırılabilir. Financial intermediation can relocate. But Hong Kong's infrastructure and China market access create switching costs.
a: Report greenwashing to SFC (Securities and Futures Commission)
Document ESG disclosure violations — report to HKEX listing division
Report through internal bank compliance channels
Benimsemek TCFD-aligned disclosure across all operations
Set financed emisyonlar reduction targets
Integrate climate risk into lending decisions
HKMA: Mandate climate stress testing for all authorized institutions
SFC: Uygulatmak enhanced ESG disclosure for listed companies
HKEX: Güçlendirmek climate-related listing requirements
Şu yolla savunuculuk yapın: IOSCO for global securities regulator coordination on climate disclosure
Support ISSB sustainability reporting standards adoption in Hong Kong
Şunu talep edin: Network for Greening the Financial System (NGFS) recommendations implementation
Leverage Hong Kong's role as a Belt and Road financing hub to require climate standards
i: SFC (Securities and Futures Commission) — regulates securities, futures markets, and listed companies. HKEX (Hong Kong Exchanges and Clearing) — operates the stock exchange and sets listing rules including ESG disclosure requirements. HKMA (Hong Kong Monetary Authority) — the de facto central bank. Note: Under the National Security Law (2020), civil liberties are constrained.

Major banks in Hong Kong: HSBC, Standard Chartered, Bank of China (Hong Kong), Hang Seng Bank. Green and Sustainable Finance Cross-Agency Steering Group — coordinates climate finance policy across HKMA, SFC, and other regulators.
HKMA — supervises 160+ licensed banks. The HKMA's Climate Risk Management Supervisory Policy Manual (2021) sets expectations for banks' climate risk management.

Note: Hong Kong's Legislative Council (90 members) is not freely elected under the 2021 electoral reform. International engagement operates through financial regulatory cooperation (IOSCO, BIS, NGFS) and Hong Kong's role as an international financial center.

HN.s: Lower-middle-income ekonomi ($37.1B GSYİH) with agriculture at 11.2% GSYİH (coffee, palm oil, bananas). İmalat 14.9% (maquiladora sector). Climate-vulnerable — Hurricane Mitch (1998) and Eta/Iota (2020). High emigration. Environmental defenders face severe threats.

sectors.w: Honduras's palm oil expansion drives ormansızlaşma in the Aguán Valley and Mosquitia region. EUDR compliance will require farm-level traceability — when ormansızlaşma is linked to specific supply chains, W hesaplanabilir hale gelir.
bp: EUDR compliance requiring zero-ormansızlaşma traceability for palm oil exports. Ne zaman buyers must verify origin, örtüşen çıkar forest conversion for plantations breaks.
Satellite-based ormansızlaşma monitoring linked to agricultural export data. ICF (Forest Conservation Institute) data makes W computable.
Kısmen kırılabilir. Palm oil monoculture inherently reduces biodiversity. RSPO certification and agroforestry can reduce sistem bağımlılığı.
a: Report illegal ormansızlaşma to ICF (Instituto de Conservación Forestal)
Document land rights violations — report to CONADEH (Comisionado Nacional de los Derechos Humanos)
Report through RSPO complaint mechanisms
Palm oil companies (Dinant, Jaremar): Benimsemek RSPO certification and zero-ormansızlaşma commitments
Uygulamak community benefit-sharing agreements
International buyers: Require traceability
MiAmbiente+: Güçlendirmek çevresel impact assessment for agricultural expansion
SAG (Secretariat of Agriculture): Reform yapmak agricultural incentives
ICF: Uygulatmak protected area boundaries
Temsilcinizle iletişime geçin: Diputado in the Congreso Nacional talep etmek için enforcement of çevresel protections
Support Escazú Agreement ratification for protection of çevresel defenders
Şu yolla savunuculuk yapın: SICA for Central American ormansızlaşma governance
Şunu talep edin: international accountability for violence against çevresel defenders
i: ICF (Instituto de Conservación Forestal) — responsible for forest management and conservation. CONADEH — the national human rights commissioner. Note: Honduras is one of the most dangerous countries for çevresel defenders — Global Witness documents multiple killings annually.

Corporación Dinant — Honduras's largest palm oil producer (implicated in Aguán Valley land conflicts). Jaremar — another major palm oil company. IFC (International Finance Corporation) — has faced accountability complaints regarding investments in Honduran palm oil.
MiAmbiente+ (Secretaría de Recursos Naturales y Ambiente) — Honduras's environment ministry. SAG (Secretaría de Agricultura y Ganadería) — the agriculture ministry.

Congreso Nacional de Honduras — unicameral legislature with 128 members. Honduras is a presidential demokrasi. SICA (Sistema de la Integración Centroamericana) — the Central American integration system.

HR.s: EU and Eurozone member ($93B GSYİH) with dominant services sector (60.8% GSYİH, tourism-heavy). Small oil sector (INA, partially owned by MOL). Tarım 2.9% GSYİH. Joined the euro and Schengen in 2023.

sectors.w: Croatia's EU-integrated health insurance system (HZZO) tracks healthcare costs. Publishing diet-attributable disease costs per product category makes W computable from retail sales data.
bp: Uygulamak EU front-of-pack health labelling. Makes welfare costs visible to consumers.
HZZO publication of diet-attributable healthcare cost data. Croatia's universal health insurance generates data to make W computable.
Not fully breakable. Ultra-processing alters food matrix. Reform yapmakulation mandates reduce sistem bağımlılığı.

Use EU Whistleblower Directive protections (transposed 2022)
Report misleading claims to AZTN (competition authority)
Croatian food companies: Yatırım yapmak minimally processed alternatives
Benimsemek Nutri-Score voluntarily
Commission health-impact assessments
Ministry of Health: Uygulamak mandatory front-of-pack labelling
HAH: Güçlendirmek marketing claim enforcement
HZZO: Publish diet-related expenditure data
Temsilcinizle iletişime geçin: Zastupnik in the Hrvatski sabor talep etmek için health-impact labelling
Support EU Farm to Fork Strategy
Advocate for WHO-aligned UPF marketing restrictions
i: HAH (Hrvatska agencija za hranu / Croatian Food Agency) — food safety authority. AZTN (Agencija za zaštitu tržišnog natjecanja) — competition authority. Croatia transposed the EU Whistleblower Directive in 2022.
Podravka, Kraš — major Croatian food companies. Agrokor/Fortenova Group — the largest food and retail conglomerate in Southeast Europe.
HZZO (Hrvatski zavod za zdravstveno osiguranje) — Croatia's health insurance fund. Ministry of Health oversees nutrition policy.
Hrvatski sabor (Croatian Parliament) — unicameral, 151 members. Contact through sabor.hr. Croatia is an EU and Eurozone member.

HT.s: Fragile state ($25.2B GSYİH) — Western Hemisphere's poorest country. Tarım 15.9% GSYİH (coffee, mangoes, cocoa). Extreme ormansızlaşma (2% forest cover remaining). Gang violence and political instability. İmalat 26.2% GSYİH (garment assembly).

sectors.w: Haiti's near-total ormansızlaşma (98% forest loss) means any remaining agriculture operates on severely degraded land. The sistem bağımlılığı is already partially broken — Haiti has experienced the endpoint of ormansızlaşma-driven agricultural collapse. Reforestation is the intervention.
bp: Reform yapmak agricultural support to incentivize tree planting and agroforestry. Ne zaman hillside farmers receive more support for tree crops (coffee, cocoa, fruit) than annual crops on degraded slopes, örtüşen çıkar continued ormansızlaşma breaks.
Satellite monitoring of remaining forest cover and soil erosion published at commune level. Making degradation visible makes W computable.

Extreme sistem bağımlılığı — 98% forest loss means agricultural activity on degraded slopes directly causes erosion, flooding, and further land degradation. Reforestation is the only path to reducing sistem bağımlılığı.
a: Document ormansızlaşma through community organizations
Report illegal charcoal production to MDE (Ministry of Environment)
Engage international development organizations
International agricultural companies: Support sustainable supply chains from Haiti
Yatırım yapmak tree crop processing (coffee, cacao, mango)
Charcoal alternatives: Support LPG transition programs
MDE: Uygulatmak (to extent possible) remaining forest protections
MARNDR (Agriculture Ministry): Prioritize hillside agroforestry programs
ONEV: Support reforestation monitoring
Support international reforestation and land restoration programs for Haiti
Şu yolla savunuculuk yapın: CARICOM for regional çevresel support
Şunu talep edin: debt-for-nature swaps to finance reforestation
Support Haitian diaspora organizations working on çevresel restoration
i: MDE (Ministère de l'Environnement) — the environment ministry, severely under-resourced. Note: Haiti's state institutions are largely non-functional due to the ongoing security and governance crisis. International organizations (UN, USAID, EU) provide most çevresel programming.
Haiti's private sector is small. The Chambre de Commerce d'Haïti coordinates business activities. International NGOs (Partners in Health, Trees for the Future) implement many development programs.

MARNDR (Ministère de l'Agriculture, des Ressources Naturelles et du Développement Rural) — the agriculture ministry. ONEV (Observatoire National de l'Environnement et de la Vulnérabilité) — çevresel monitoring.

Note: Haiti's democratic institutions are non-functional — no elected parliament since 2023, no elected president. Transitional governance is underway. International channels: UN Integrated Office in Haiti (BINUH), CARICOM, OAS, Haitian diaspora organizations.

HU.s: AB üyesi ($222.7B GSYİH) with strong manufacturing (15.8% GSYİH, automotive-focused). Hizmetler 59.5% GSYİH. Small oil and gas sector (MOL Group). Tarım 2.7% GSYİH. Democratic backsliding under Orbán government has strained EU relations.

sectors.w: Hungary has one of Europe's highest obesity rates and introduced a 'chip tax' (NETA — népegészségügyi termékadó) on UPF in 2011. Ne zaman health insurance data (NEAK) links diet to healthcare costs per product category, W hesaplanabilir hale gelir.
bp: Güçlendirmek the NETA tax and extend to broader UPF categories. Hungary's pioneering public health product tax zayıflar örtüşen çıkar high-margin UPF by internalizing health costs.
NEAK publication of diet-attributable healthcare expenditure. Hungary's health insurance system generates data to make W computable.
Not fully breakable. Ultra-processing alters food matrix. Reform yapmakulation targets can reduce sistem bağımlılığı.
a: Şuraya bildirin: NÉBIH (National Food Chain Safety Office)
Document food safety violations
Use Hungarian ihbarcı law (transposition of EU Directive)
Hungarian food companies: Reform yapmakulate to reduce UPF
Yatırım yapmak traditional Hungarian food products
Benimsemek transparent nutritional labelling
Ministry of Human Capacities: Güçlendirmek NETA tax and expand coverage
NÉBIH: Uygulatmak marketing claim standards
NEAK: Publish diet-related healthcare cost data
Temsilcinizle iletişime geçin: Képviselő in the Országgyűlés talep etmek için expansion of the NETA health tax
Support EU-wide front-of-pack labelling through Farm to Fork Strategy
Advocate for WHO-aligned UPF marketing restrictions
Şunu talep edin: EU cohesion funds for public health nutrition programs
i: NÉBIH (Nemzeti Élelmiszerlánc-biztonsági Hivatal) — Hungary's food chain safety authority. GVH (Gazdasági Versenyhivatal) — competition authority enforcing fair advertising. Hungary transposed the EU Whistleblower Directive.
Major companies: Bonafarm Group, Pick Szeged. International companies operating in Hungary: Nestlé, Coca-Cola, PepsiCo.

NETA (népegészségügyi termékadó) — Hungary's public health product tax, one of the world's first UPF taxes, introduced 2011. NEAK (Nemzeti Egészségbiztosítási Alapkezelő) — national health insurance fund.
Országgyűlés (National Assembly of Hungary) — unicameral parliament, 199 members. Contact through parlament.hu.

ID.s: G20 ekonomi ($1,396.3B GSYİH). World's largest palm oil producer (palm oil=~3.5% GSYİH). Significant coal (1.22% rents), oil/gas (1.61%), and madencilik (1.91%). Massive archipelago with extraordinary biodiversity. Palm oil expansion has driven catastrophic ormansızlaşma.

sectors.w: Indonesia produces ~60% of global palm oil. EUDR compliance will require zero-ormansızlaşma traceability to plantation level. Ne zaman santral başınaation forest loss data is linked to palm oil transactions, W hesaplanabilir hale gelir from commodity prices.
bp: EUDR compliance forcing zero-ormansızlaşma supply chain traceability. Ne zaman international buyers require verified ormansızlaşma-free palm oil, örtüşen çıkar clearing forest for new plantations breaks — productivity improvement on existing land becomes the viable model.

Mandatory per-concession çevresel data (fire occurrence, peat depth, biodiversity surveys) linked to ISPO certification. Indonesia's KLHK already monitors ormansızlaşma by satellite — publishing per-company data makes W computable.

Kısmen kırılabilir. Palm oil monoculture inherently reduces biodiversity. However, smallholder agroforestry and yield improvement on existing plantations can reduce pressure for new forest conversion.
a: Report illegal ormansızlaşma to KLHK (Ministry of Environment and Forestry)
Document land rights violations — report to Komnas HAM (National Human Rights Commission)
Report fire-setting to Satgas Karhutla (forest fire task force)
Wilmar, Golden Agri-Resources, Sinar Mas: Uygulamak full NDPE (No Deforestation, No Peat, No Exploitation) commitments
Benimsemek RSPO certification across all operations
Yatırım yapmak yield improvement rather than area expansion
KLHK: Uygulatmak the permanent moratorium on new primary forest and peatland conversion
Güçlendirmek ISPO mandatory certification with çevresel performance metrics
BPN (National Land Agency): Resolve overlapping land claims through One Map Policy
Temsilcinizle iletişime geçin: member of the DPR (Dewan Perwakilan Rakyat) talep etmek için enforcement of the forest moratorium and peatland protection
Support EUDR implementation with adequate transition support for smallholders
Şu yolla savunuculuk yapın: ASEAN for regional zero-ormansızlaşma commitments
Şunu talep edin: international tropical forest conservation finance
i: KLHK (Kementerian Lingkungan Hidup dan Kehutanan) — the environment and forestry ministry, responsible for forest management, çevresel regulation, and fire prevention. Komnas HAM (Komisi Nasional Hak Asasi Manusia) — the national human rights commission. WALHI (Wahana Lingkungan Hidup Indonesia / Friends of the Earth Indonesia) — the largest çevresel NGO.

Wilmar International — the world's largest palm oil trader. Golden Agri-Resources (Sinar Mas Group) — one of the largest palm oil producers. GAPKI (Gabungan Pengusaha Kelapa Sawit Indonesia) — the Indonesian palm oil association. RSPO and ISPO (Indonesian Sustainable Palm Yağı) — certification standards.

One Map Policy (Kebijakan Satu Peta) — Indonesia's initiative to create a single, authoritative map of land use and forest cover to resolve overlapping concessions. BPDPKS (Badan Pengelola Dana Perkebunan Kelapa Sawit) — the palm oil plantation fund managing the CPO export levy.

DPR (Dewan Perwakilan Rakyat / People's Representative Council) — lower house, 580 members. DPD (Dewan Perwakilan Daerah / Regional Representative Council) — upper house, 136 members. Contact through dpr.go.id. Indonesia is a presidential demokrasi and the world's third-largest demokrasi.

IE.s: High-income EU ekonomi ($609.2B GSYİH, inflated by multinational profit booking). İmalat 29.6% GSYİH (pharma, tech). Major corporate tax hub. Tarım 1% GSYİH but intensive dairy farming with significant methane emisyonlar. Hizmetler 60.6% GSYİH.

sectors.w: Ireland's dairy herd expansion post-milk-quota-abolition (2015) increased methane emisyonlar by 20%+. Ne zaman per-farm greenhouse gas data is published alongside output, W hesaplanabilir hale gelir from agricultural production data.
bp: Reform yapmak CAP subsidies from production-linked to çevresel outcome-linked. Ne zaman dairy expansion no longer receives per-cow support, örtüşen çıkar herd growth zayıflar.
Mandatory per-farm greenhouse gas balance disclosure. Ireland's Bord Bia Origin Green program collects data — making it publicly verifiable makes W computable.
Kısmen kırılabilir. Ruminant digestion produces methane by biological process. Feed additives (e.g., 3-NOP) can reduce but not eliminate enteric methane.
a: Report çevresel violations to EPA Ireland
Document water pollution from dairy — report to local authority water services
Use Irish Protected Disclosures Act 2014 for protected reporting
Kerry Group, Glanbia, Ornua: Set binding methane reduction targets
Yatırım yapmak methane-reducing feed technologies
Benimsemek Science Based Targets for Irish dairy operations
DAFM: Reform yapmak agricultural supports toward emisyonlar reduction
EPA: Güçlendirmek agricultural emisyonlar monitoring
Bord Bia: Make Origin Green data independently verifiable
Temsilcinizle iletişime geçin: TD (Teachta Dála) or Senator talep etmek için binding agricultural emisyonlar reduction targets
Support stronger EU CAP conditionality on methane
Advocate for inclusion of agricultural methane in EU ETS
Şunu talep edin: Ireland's Climate Action Plan sectoral emisyonlar ceilings to be enforced
i: EPA (Environmental Protection Agency) — Ireland's çevresel regulator. Protected Disclosures Act 2014 (amended 2022) — Ireland's ihbarcı protection law, one of the strongest in Europe.

Kerry Group — major food ingredients company. Glanbia — dairy and nutrition company. Ornua (formerly Irish Dairy Board) — manages Kerrygold brand. Teagasc — the agriculture and food development authority providing research and extension.
DAFM (Department of Agriculture, Food and the Marine) — Ireland's agriculture ministry. Bord Bia (Irish Food Board) — the food marketing agency running the Origin Green sustainability program.

Oireachtas (Parliament of Ireland) — bicameral: Dáil Éireann (160 TDs) and Seanad Éireann (60 Senators). Contact through oireachtas.ie. Ireland's Climate Action and Low Carbon Geliştirmekment Act (2021) sets legally binding emisyonlar budgets.

IL.s: High-tech ekonomi ($540.4B GSYİH) with dominant services (72.5% GSYİH). High military expenditure (8.78% GSYİH). Gas production from Leviathan and Tamar fields (0.43% gas rents). Major tech sector — 'Startup Nation.' Water management leader (desalination, drip irrigation).

sectors.w: Israel's Mediterranean gas fields (Leviathan, Tamar) were discovered in 2009-2010. Per-field emisyonlar disclosure through ISA (Israel Securities Authority) listed company requirements makes W computable from production data.
bp: Export gas to replace coal in Egypt and Jordan — net emisyonlar benefit if displacing higher-carbon sources. But this locks in gas infrastructure. Ne zaman renewable alternatives become cheaper for regional electricity, the örtüşen çıkar zayıflar.
Mandatory saha başına emisyonlar disclosure for Leviathan and Tamar operators. ISA reporting requirements provide the mechanism to make W computable.
Kırılamaz by policy alone. Gas combustion releases CO₂.
a: Report çevresel violations to the Ministry of Environmental Protection
Document offshore emisyonlar — report through Delek/Chevron compliance channels
Şuraya bildirin: ISA if ESG disclosures are misleading
NewMed Energy (formerly Delek Drilling), Chevron: Set emisyonlar reduction targets for Leviathan and Tamar
Yatırım yapmak regional yenilenebilir enerji integration
Benimsemek TCFD-aligned disclosure
Petroleum Commissioner: Require saha başına emisyonlar monitoring
Electricity Authority: Accelerate yenilenebilir enerji targets (Israel aims for 30% renewable by 2030)
Ministry of Environmental Protection: Güçlendirmek offshore çevresel standards
Temsilcinizle iletişime geçin: member of the Knesset talep etmek için binding yenilenebilir enerji targets and gas emisyonlar disclosure
Support regional energy cooperation through the Eastern Mediterranean Gas Forum (EMGF)
Advocate for Abraham Accords normalization to include yenilenebilir enerji cooperation with Gulf states
Şunu talep edin: OECD çevresel performance review recommendations implementation
i: Ministry of Environmental Protection — Israel's çevre otoritesi. ISA (Israel Securities Authority) — regulates disclosure for listed companies including Delek Group. Israel has ihbarcı protections under the Protection of Workers (Exposure of Offenses) Law, 1997.
NewMed Energy — operates Leviathan field. Chevron — acquired Noble Energy's interest in Tamar. Israel Natural Gas Lines (INGL) — the devlete ait gas transmission company.

Petroleum Commissioner — within the Ministry of Energy, oversees oil and gas licensing. Electricity Authority — the independent electricity regulator. Israel's Electricity Market Reform yapmak aims to increase competition and renewable penetration.

Knesset (כנסת) — Israel's unicameral parliament, 120 members. Contact through knesset.gov.il. Israel is an OECD member. EMGF (Eastern Mediterranean Gas Forum) — regional organization for gas market coordination.

IQ.s: Oil-dependent ekonomi ($279.6B GSYİH) with 43.45% combined oil and gas rents — one of the world's highest. OPEC member producing ~4.5M bpd. Massive gas flaring (Iraq flares more gas than almost any other country). Post-conflict reconstruction ongoing.

sectors.w: Iraq flares $2.5B+ worth of associated gas annually. Capturing and monetizing flared gas makes W computable — the flared gas represents pure waste visible from satellite (World Bank GGFR data).
bp: Gas capture and monetization. Iraq wastes $2.5B/year in flared gas. Ne zaman gas capture infrastructure is built, örtüşen çıkar flaring (which is cheaper short-term than processing) breaks as captured gas generates revenue.
Satellite-based flare monitoring (VIIRS nightfire data) already makes gas flaring volumes visible globally. Linking saha başına flaring data to production revenue makes W computable.
Kırılamaz. Hydrocarbon combustion releases CO₂.
a: Report çevresel violations through international operator compliance channels (BP, TotalEnergies, ExxonMobil)
Document gas flaring volumes — satellite data from World Bank GGFR provides independent verification
Report through Iraq EITI channels
BP (Rumaila), TotalEnergies (Halfaya), ExxonMobil (West Qurna): Yatırım yapmak associated gas capture infrastructure
Uygulamak flare reduction targets
SOMO (State Organization for Marketing of Oil): Benimsemek emisyonlar disclosure standards
Ministry of Oil: Uygulatmak gas flaring reduction targets in Technical Service Contracts
Ministry of Environment: Güçlendirmek air quality enforcement near oil fields
EITI Iraq: Expand reporting to include flaring and emisyonlar data
Support World Bank GGFR zero routine flaring by 2030 initiative for Iraq
Şu yolla savunuculuk yapın: OPEC for managed transition and gas monetization investment
Şunu talep edin: international climate finance for gas capture infrastructure
Support UN Iraq partnership on çevresel governance capacity building
i: Note: Iraq's institutional capacity for çevresel regulation is limited. The Ministry of Oil oversees petroleum operations. EITI Iraq — Iraq has been EITI compliant since 2012. World Bank Global Gas Flaring Reduction Partnership (GGFR) — monitors and reports on global gas flaring using satellite data.

BP operates Rumaila (Iraq's largest field). TotalEnergies has the $27B Gas Growth Integrated Project (GGIP) to capture associated gas. ExxonMobil, Lukoil, PetroChina — other major operators. Basra Oil Company — manages southern oil fields.

Ministry of Oil — oversees all petroleum operations and manages Technical Service Contracts (TSCs) with international operators. Ministry of Environment — responsible for çevresel policy but severely under-resourced.

Note: Iraq is a parlamenter demokrasi but governance is fragmented among sectarian and ethnic power blocs. Council of Representatives (Majlis al-Nuwab, 329 members). International channels: OPEC membership, World Bank, UNAMI (UN Assistance Mission for Iraq), GGFR.

IR.s: Major oil and gas producer ($475.3B GSYİH) with 27.08% combined rents. World's second-largest natural gas reserves (after Russia). Under comprehensive international yaptırımlar. İmalat 20.6% GSYİH. Theocratic governance limits civic channels.

sectors.w: International yaptırımlar have already weakened the örtüşen çıkar by restricting Iran's ability to monetize oil exports at market price. Ne zaman yaptırımlar enforcement eliminates the discount market, Iran's economic model requires diversification.
bp: Sanctions enforcement. Ne zaman Iran cannot sell oil at market prices, the economic case for yenilenebilir enerji investment (Iran has excellent solar potential) strengthens. The örtüşen çıkar in oil dependence breaks when export revenues are structurally constrained.
Per-field çevresel data is largely unavailable due to yaptırımlar-related opacity. International satellite monitoring (methane detection) provides external data to estimate W.
Kırılamaz. Hydrocarbon combustion releases CO₂.
a: Report çevresel violations to DoE (Department of Environment)
Document air pollution and health impacts — Iran's cities rank among the world's most polluted
Report through international academic and research channels
NIOC: Reduce gas flaring and venting at production facilities
Yatırım yapmak domestic solar and wind energy development
Uygulamak emisyonlar monitoring for major fields
Ministry of Petroleum: Uygulamak flaring reduction programs
DoE: Güçlendirmek air quality enforcement in Tehran and major cities
Ministry of Energy: Accelerate yenilenebilir enerji development
Support international climate cooperation mechanisms that include Iran
Şu yolla savunuculuk yapın: OPEC for managed transition planning
Şunu talep edin: çevresel conditionality in any future yaptırımlar relief negotiations
Support Iranian diaspora çevresel advocacy organizations
i: DoE (سازمان حفاظت محیط زیست / Department of Environment) — Iran's çevre otoritesi, which has limited enforcement power. NIOC (National Iranian Oil Company) — the state oil company. Note: Iran has no effective ihbarcı protection. Civil society is severely constrained.

NIOC — controls all upstream oil and gas operations. NIGC (National Iranian Gas Company) — manages gas production and distribution. Pars Oil and Gas Company — manages South Pars/North Dome gas field operations.

Ministry of Petroleum — oversees oil and gas policy. Iran's Renewable Energy and Energy Efficiency Organization (SATBA) — responsible for yenilenebilir enerji development. Iran has installed some solar and wind capacity but it remains a tiny fraction of energy supply.

Note: Iran is a theocratic republic. The Islamic Consultative Assembly (Majles, 290 members) has limited power relative to the Supreme Leader and Guardian Council. International channels: OPEC, UNFCCC (Iran signed but did not ratify Paris Agreement), UN Environment Programme.

IS.s: Small advanced ekonomi ($33.3B GSYİH) with 100% renewable electricity (geothermal and hydro). Balıkçılık are 5% of GSYİH and the largest PST exposure — Iceland's fisheries management is globally studied but faces sustainability challenges from ocean warming.

sectors.w: Iceland's ITQ (Individual Transferable Quota) system generates detailed per-vessel catch data. Ne zaman ecosystem health metrics (stock assessments, bycatch, seabed impact) are published alongside fishing revenue, W hesaplanabilir hale gelir.
bp: Reform yapmak ITQ allocations to include ecosystem impact costs. Ne zaman quota holders pay for bycatch and seabed damage, örtüşen çıkar maximum extraction zayıflar.
Publish per-vessel ecosystem impact data alongside catch revenue. Iceland's Marine and Freshwater Research Institute already conducts stock assessments — linking to economic data makes W computable.
Kısmen kırılabilir. Fishing inherently removes biomass from marine ecosystems. However, science-based quota management can keep extraction within sustainable yield limits.
a: Report quota violations to Fiskistofa (Directorate of Balıkçılık)
Document bycatch or illegal discarding
Use Iceland's ihbarcı protections
Samherji, Íslandsbanki: Benimsemek sustainability-linked targets for fishing operations
Uygulamak per-vessel bycatch reduction technology
Support ecosystem-based fisheries management
Ministry of Food, Agriculture and Balıkçılık: Reform yapmak ITQ system to include ecosystem impact costs
Marine Research Institute: Publish ecosystem health indicators alongside quota recommendations
Fiskistofa: Güçlendirmek monitoring and enforcement
Temsilcinizle iletişime geçin: member of the Alþingi talep etmek için ecosystem-based fisheries management reform
Support NEAFC (North-East Atlantic Balıkçılık Commission) sustainable management measures
Advocate for Arctic Council fisheries governance coordination
Şunu talep edin: inclusion of ecosystem health metrics in national accounts
i: Fiskistofa (Directorate of Balıkçılık) — responsible for fisheries management, quota enforcement, and monitoring. Hafrannsóknastofnun (Marine and Freshwater Research Institute) — conducts stock assessments and marine research.

Samherji — Iceland's largest fishing company. Brim, HB Grandi — other major fishing companies. SFS (Samtök fyrirtækja í sjávarútvegi / Federation of Icelandic Fishing Vessel Owners) — the industry association.

Ministry of Food, Agriculture and Balıkçılık — oversees fisheries policy. The ITQ (Individual Transferable Quota) system — Iceland's fisheries management system, one of the world's most studied, allocating catch shares that can be traded.

Alþingi (Althing) — Iceland's unicameral parliament, 63 members, one of the world's oldest legislatures (established 930 CE). Contact through althingi.is. NEAFC — the regional fisheries management organization for the Northeast Atlantic.

JG.s: British Crown Dependencies ($12.5B GSYİH) — Jersey and Guernsey. Major offshore financial centers (91.2% services). Financial services dominate with significant fund administration and trust structures. Not part of the UK or EU but closely aligned with UK regulatory standards.

sectors.w: Channel Islands' financial services facilitate global capital flows with lower şeffaflık than UK mainland. Ne zaman beneficial ownership data and tax şeffaflık information are published, W hesaplanabilir hale gelir from financial intermediation data.
bp: Full beneficial ownership şeffaflık aligned with UK Economic Crime Act requirements. Ne zaman financial secrecy is eliminated, the örtüşen çıkar between service providers and opacity-seeking clients zayıflar.
Mandatory CRS (Common Reporting Standard) enhanced reporting. Publishing aggregate capital flow data makes W computable.
Kısmen kırılabilir. Financial intermediation can relocate but the Channel Islands' proximity to London and established legal infrastructure create switching costs.
a: Report suspicious transactions to JFIU (Joint Financial Intelligence Unit) in Jersey or FIS (Financial Intelligence Service) in Guernsey
Document regulatory violations — report to JFSC or GFSC
Report through internal bank compliance channels
Uygulamak enhanced beneficial ownership due diligence
Benimsemek ESG integration across fund and trust structures
Align with UK şeffaflık standards ahead of regulatory mandates
JFSC/GFSC: Güçlendirmek beneficial ownership verification
Uygulamak UK Economic Crime Act-aligned şeffaflık
Uygulatmak enhanced AML due diligence requirements
Engage through UK Parliament channels — the Crown Dependencies' constitutional relationship means the UK Parliament has ultimate legislative authority
Support OECD Global Forum on Transparency standards
Advocate for Moneyval enhanced evaluation compliance
Şunu talep edin: alignment with EU AMLD standards
i: JFSC (Jersey Finansal Hizmetler Commission) — Jersey's financial regulator. GFSC (Guernsey Finansal Hizmetler Commission) — Guernsey's financial regulator. JFIU / FIS — financial intelligence units.
Channel Islands host operations of major international banks and fund administrators. Jersey Finance and Guernsey Finance promote the financial services sectors.
JFSC — Jersey's integrated financial regulator. GFSC — Guernsey's equivalent. Both crown dependencies have their own regulatory frameworks but coordinate closely with UK authorities.

States of Jersey (49 members) and States of Guernsey (38 members) — the insular legislatures. Constitutional relationship with UK means UK Parliament can legislate for the Crown Dependencies on international obligations.

JM.s: Caribbean island ekonomi ($22B GSYİH) with tourism and services dominant (60% GSYİH). Tarım 8% GSYİH. Bauxite/alumina industry historically significant but declining. Climate-vulnerable. High debt burden (IMF structural adjustment).

sectors.w: Jamaica's agricultural sector is dominated by sugar and banana monoculture on degraded soils. Ne zaman soil health and watershed degradation data is published alongside agricultural output, W hesaplanabilir hale gelir.
bp: Reform yapmak agricultural subsidies toward crop diversification and agroforestry. Ne zaman farmers receive support for diverse crops rather than monoculture sugar, the örtüşen çıkar breaks.
Publish watershed health and soil erosion data linked to agricultural practices. NEPA collects çevresel data — linking to farming output makes W computable.
Kısmen kırılabilir. Tropical monoculture inherently degrades soil. Jamaica's Blue Mountain coffee model shows premium diversification is viable.
a: Report çevresel violations to NEPA (National Environment and Planning Agency)
Document agricultural chemical misuse — report to RADA (Rural Agricultural Geliştirmekment Authority)
Report through industry self-regulation channels
Sugar Company of Jamaica Holdings: Diversify beyond sugar monoculture
Yatırım yapmak specialty crop development (Blue Mountain coffee, cocoa)
Benimsemek soil health monitoring
Ministry of Agriculture: Reform yapmak subsidy structure toward diversification
NEPA: Güçlendirmek watershed protection enforcement
SIA (Sugar Industry Authority): Support sugar industry transition
Temsilcinizle iletişime geçin: Member of Parliament in the House of Representatives or Senator talep etmek için agricultural diversification support
Support CARICOM agricultural resilience initiatives
Advocate for climate adaptation finance for Caribbean agriculture
Şunu talep edin: debt-for-nature swaps
i: NEPA (National Environment and Planning Agency) — Jamaica's çevre otoritesi. RADA — provides agricultural extension services.
Sugar Industry Authority — regulates Jamaica's sugar sector. Jamaica Producers Group — diversified agricultural company.
Ministry of Agriculture and Balıkçılık — oversees agricultural policy. SIA — regulates the sugar industry.
Parliament of Jamaica — bicameral: House of Representatives (63 members) and Senate (21 appointed). Jamaica is a Westminster-style parlamenter demokrasi.

JO.s: Water-scarce Middle Eastern ekonomi ($53.4B GSYİH) with limited natural resources. Hizmetler 60.4% GSYİH. High military expenditure (4.8% GSYİH). İmalat 17.7% (phosphate, potash, pharmaceuticals). Among the world's most water-stressed countries.

sectors.w: Jordan's phosphate and potash madencilik (Arab Potash Company, Jordan Phosphate Mines Company) depletes Dead Sea water levels and contaminates groundwater. Ne zaman çevresel cost data is published alongside madencilik revenue, W hesaplanabilir hale gelir.
bp: Internalize çevresel costs (Dead Sea decline, water depletion) into madencilik operations through çevresel levies. Ne zaman miners pay for water extraction in one of Earth's most water-stressed countries, örtüşen çıkar water-intensive extraction zayıflar.
Publish maden başına water consumption and Dead Sea level impact data. Jordan's water authority collects data — linking to madencilik output makes W computable.
Kısmen kırılabilir. Mining inherently uses water. However, water recycling and dry processing can reduce per-ton water consumption.
a: Report çevresel violations to the Ministry of Environment
Document water extraction impacts — report to WAJ (Water Authority of Jordan)
Report through JPMC or APC compliance channels
JPMC (Jordan Phosphate Mines Company): Uygulamak water recycling targets
APC (Arab Potash Company): Benimsemek Dead Sea impact mitigation measures
Both: Benimsemek per-unit çevresel impact reporting
Ministry of Energy: Integrate çevresel costs into madencilik royalty calculations
WAJ: Uygulatmak water extraction limits for madencilik operations
ASEZA (Aqaba Special Economic Zone): Apply çevresel standards to industrial activities
Temsilcinizle iletişime geçin: member of the Majlis al-Nuwab (House of Representatives) talep etmek için water conservation requirements for madencilik
Support Red Sea-Dead Sea Canal alternatives for Dead Sea stabilization
Şu yolla savunuculuk yapın: World Bank for çevresel governance of Dead Sea
Şunu talep edin: OECD water governance recommendations implementation
i: Ministry of Environment — Jordan's çevre otoritesi. WAJ (Water Authority of Jordan) — manages the country's severely limited water resources. Jordan has approximately 60 cubic meters of renewable water per capita — far below the 500 m³ threshold for absolute water scarcity.
JPMC — one of the world's largest phosphate producers. APC (Arab Potash Company) — extracts potash from the Dead Sea.
Ministry of Energy and Mineral Resources — oversees madencilik policy. NRA (Natural Resources Authority) — the madencilik regulatory body.

Majlis al-Umma (Parliament of Jordan) — bicameral: Majlis al-Nuwab (House of Representatives, 130 members, elected) and Majlis al-Ayan (Senate, 65 appointed). Jordan is a anayasal monarşi with limited democratic space.

KE.s: East Africa's largest ekonomi ($120.3B GSYİH) with agriculture at 22.5% GSYİH (tea, coffee, horticulture). Hizmetler 55.3%. 90%+ renewable electricity (geothermal, hydro). Vibrant tech sector (M-Pesa). Wildlife tourism. Climate-vulnerable (drought cycles).

sectors.w: Kenya's tea and horticulture sectors use intensive farming on shrinking arable land. Ne zaman per-farm water and pesticide data is published alongside export revenue, W hesaplanabilir hale gelir. Kenya's M-Pesa infrastructure enables farm-level data collection.
bp: Reform yapmak agricultural export incentives to require çevresel certification. Ne zaman tea and flower exports must demonstrate sustainable water and pesticide use, örtüşen çıkar intensive monoculture zayıflar.
Farm-level çevresel data collection using mobile technology (Kenya's digital infrastructure is advanced). Making water and chemical use visible per farm makes W computable.
Kısmen kırılabilir. Intensive horticulture inherently affects water and soil systems. However, Kenya's organic agriculture sector is growing and agroforestry can reduce sistem bağımlılığı.
a: Report çevresel violations to NEMA (National Environment Management Authority)
Document water pollution from flower farms — report to WRA (Water Resources Authority)
Report pesticide violations to PCPB (Pest Control Products Board)
KTDA (Kenya Tea Geliştirmekment Agency): Benimsemek Rainforest Alliance certification across all smallholder operations
KFC (Kenya Flower Council): Güçlendirmek çevresel standards for cut flower production
Yatırım yapmak water-efficient irrigation technology
Ministry of Agriculture: Reform yapmak agricultural incentives toward climate-resilient farming
NEMA: Güçlendirmek çevresel monitoring in intensive horticulture zones
AFA (Agriculture and Food Authority): Integrate çevresel standards into crop certification
Temsilcinizle iletişime geçin: Member of Parliament in the National Assembly or Senator talep etmek için çevresel certification for agricultural exports
Support African Union Comprehensive Africa Agriculture Geliştirmekment Programme (CAADP) sustainability targets
Advocate for EU Green Deal recognition of Kenyan sustainability certifications
Şunu talep edin: climate adaptation finance for Kenyan smallholder agriculture
i: NEMA (National Environment Management Authority) — Kenya's çevresel regulator, responsible for çevresel impact assessments, pollution control, and enforcement. WRA (Water Resources Authority) — manages water resources allocation and monitoring. PCPB (Pest Control Products Board) — regulates pesticide registration and use.

KTDA — manages tea production for ~600,000 smallholder farmers. KFC (Kenya Flower Council) — the self-regulatory body for the cut flower industry. Unilever (Lipton/Ekaterra) — major buyer of Kenyan tea.
Ministry of Agriculture, Livestock, Balıkçılık and Cooperatives — oversees agricultural policy. AFA — regulates agricultural commodities including tea, coffee, and horticultural products.

Parliament of Kenya — bicameral: National Assembly (349 members) and Senate (67 members). Contact through parliament.go.ke. Kenya's 2010 Constitution includes strong çevresel protection provisions (Article 42 — right to a clean and healthy environment).

KG.s: Small mountainous ekonomi ($17.5B GSYİH) dominated by gold madencilik (Kumtor mine = 10%+ of GSYİH, min=11.15%). Tarım 8.6% GSYİH. Remittances from Russia significant. Parliamentary demokrasi (rare in Central Asia).

sectors.w: Kumtor gold mine (Centerra Gold, now nationalized) operates near glaciers — tailings and cyanide contamination affect water systems. Ne zaman çevresel monitoring data is published, W hesaplanabilir hale gelir.
bp: Environmental bonds and community benefit agreements for all madencilik. Ne zaman remediation costs are internalized, marginal mines become unprofitable.
Per-mine water quality and glacier impact monitoring published openly. Making çevresel costs visible makes W computable.
Kısmen kırılabilir. Mining at high altitude inherently affects glacial systems. Improved tailings management can reduce impact.
a: Şuraya bildirin: SAEPF (State Agency on Environmental Protection and Forestry)
Document water contamination near Kumtor
Report through Kyrgyzaltyn channels
Kyrgyzaltyn: Uygulamak international tailings management standards at Kumtor
Benimsemek EITI enhanced reporting
Yatırım yapmak mine rehabilitation
State Committee for Industry: Güçlendirmek çevresel licensing
SAEPF: Increase monitoring capacity
EITI: Expand to çevresel data
Temsilcinizle iletişime geçin: deputy in the Jogorku Kenesh talep etmek için çevresel standards for madencilik
Support EITI enhanced reporting
Advocate for Central Asian regional water governance coordination
i: SAEPF — çevresel agency. Kyrgyzaltyn — state gold company that took over Kumtor in 2022.
Kyrgyzaltyn — manages state madencilik interests. EITI Kyrgyz Republic — member since 2004.
State Committee for Industry, Energy and Subsoil Use — madencilik regulator.
Jogorku Kenesh (Supreme Council) — unicameral parliament, 90 members. Kyrgyzstan is Central Asia's most democratic country.

KH.s: Lower-middle-income ekonomi ($46.4B GSYİH) with garment manufacturing (27.8% GSYİH) and agriculture (16.6%). Mekong Delta ormansızlaşma ongoing. Authoritarian governance under Hun Manet (succeeded Hun Sen in 2023).

sectors.w: Cambodia lost 25%+ of tree cover since 2000 — economic land concessions for rubber and sugar monoculture are primary drivers. Satellite monitoring makes ormansızlaşma computable.
bp: Reform yapmak economic land concession system to require çevresel compliance. Ne zaman concession holders face revocation for ormansızlaşma, the örtüşen çıkar zayıflar.
Satellite-based forest monitoring (Global Forest Watch already tracks Cambodia extensively) linked to concession data makes W computable.
Kısmen kırılabilir. Monoculture inherently reduces biodiversity. Community-managed forests demonstrate alternative models.
a: Report illegal logging to international monitoring organizations (Global Witness, LICADHO)
Document land grabbing — report through international accountability mechanisms
Şuraya bildirin: FAO and development partner channels
Concession holders: Uygulamak zero-ormansızlaşma commitments
International buyers: Require supply chain traceability for Cambodian rubber and sugar
Benimsemek RSPO/equivalent certification
Ministry of Agriculture: Reform yapmak economic land concession çevresel conditions
Ministry of Environment: Uygulatmak protected area boundaries
Forestry Administration: Güçlendirmek community forestry programs
Şu yolla savunuculuk yapın: ASEAN for regional ormansızlaşma governance
Support EU EBA (Everything But Arms) trade preference conditionality on human rights and çevresel standards
Şunu talep edin: Mekong River Commission çevresel standards enforcement
Support international accountability mechanisms for land concession abuses
i: Note: Cambodia under CPP governance severely restricts sivil toplum. LICADHO (Cambodian League for the Promotion and Defence of Human Rights) — one of the few remaining domestic human rights organizations. Global Witness has documented illegal logging and land concession abuses.

Major economic land concessions are held by politically connected companies and foreign investors (Chinese, Vietnamese, Thai companies). The garment sector (H&M, Gap supply chains) has çevresel certification requirements.

Ministry of Agriculture, Forestry and Balıkçılık — oversees agricultural and forestry policy. Ministry of Environment — manages protected areas. Sub-Decree 146 on Economic Land Concessions governs the ELC system.

Note: Cambodia's National Assembly (125 members) is dominated by the CPP. The Senate (62 members) is similarly controlled. International channels: ASEAN, Mekong River Commission, EU EBA trade preferences (EU has partially withdrawn preferences citing human rights concerns).

KW.s: Wealthy petrostate ($160.2B GSYİH) with 29.28% combined oil and gas rents. Kuwait Petroleum Corporation (KPC) manages all oil operations. Kuwait Investment Authority (KIA) is one of the world's oldest sovereign wealth funds. Constitutional monarchy with elected parliament.

sectors.w: Kuwait's Burgan oil field (world's second-largest) is mature. As production costs rise, the örtüşen çıkar zayıflar. KIA sovereign wealth provides a diversification mechanism.
bp: KIA investment diversification away from fossil fuels. Ne zaman the sovereign wealth fund's returns from non-oil investments exceed declining oil returns, örtüşen çıkar oil dependence breaks.
Per-field emisyonlar disclosure for KPC operations. Making çevresel costs visible makes W computable.
Kırılamaz. Hydrocarbon combustion releases CO₂.

Report through KPC internal channels
Şuraya bildirin: State Audit Bureau

Uygulamak emisyonlar reduction targets

Şu yolla savunuculuk yapın: GCC for regional energy transition coordination
Support OPEC+ managed transition planning
Şunu talep edin: IRENA recommendations on Gulf state energy transition
i: EPA Kuwait (Environment Public Authority) — the çevresel regulator. KPC (Kuwait Petroleum Corporation) — the state oil company managing all upstream and downstream operations. State Audit Bureau — conducts financial oversight.
KPC — manages Kuwait's entire petroleum value chain. KIA (Kuwait Investment Authority) — sovereign wealth fund, one of the world's largest.
Supreme Petroleum Council — the supreme decision-making body for oil policy. CBK (Central Bank of Kuwait) — the financial regulator.
Majlis al-Umma (National Assembly) — 50 elected members, one of the most active parliaments in the Gulf. Kuwait is a anayasal monarşi with genuine (if limited) parlamenter debate on oil policy.

KZ.s: Central Asia's largest ekonomi ($291.5B GSYİH) with massive oil (14.84%) and gas (2.04%) rents. Tengiz, Kashagan, and Karachaganak are mega-fields. Mining at 9.1% (uranium — world's largest producer, copper, gold). Coal at 0.85%. Authoritarian governance.

sectors.w: Kazakhstan's Kashagan field has suffered repeated delays and çevresel incidents (H₂S — hydrogen sulfide). Environmental monitoring of H₂S emisyonlar and Caspian Sea impact makes W computable from production data.
bp: Redirect National Fund (sovereign wealth) investment toward economic diversification. Ne zaman non-oil sectors grow faster than depleting oil revenue, örtüşen çıkar continued extraction breaks.
Per-field emisyonlar and çevresel monitoring disclosure (particularly H₂S at Kashagan). Making çevresel and health costs visible makes W computable.
Kırılamaz. Hydrocarbon extraction and combustion release CO₂ and H₂S.

Report through Chevron/Shell/ExxonMobil compliance channels (major Tengiz/Kashagan partners)

EITI Kazakhstan: Expand reporting to çevresel data

Leverage Kazakhstan's OSCE chairmanship legacy for çevresel governance
i: Ministry of Ecology and Natural Resources — çevre otoritesi. KazMunayGas — the national oil company. EITI Kazakhstan — member since 2007. Note: Civil society space is severely constrained.

NCOC (North Caspian Operating Company) — manages Kashagan (Shell, TotalEnergies, Eni, ExxonMobil, KMG, CNPC, Inpex). TCO (Tengizchevroil) — manages Tengiz (Chevron 50%, ExxonMobil 25%, KMG 20%, Lukoil 5%).

Ministry of Energy — oversees oil, gas, and energy policy. Samruk-Kazyna — the national wealth fund holding state shares in KazMunayGas and other state enterprises. National Fund of the Republic of Kazakhstan — the sovereign wealth fund (managed by the National Bank) with $55B+ in assets.

Note: Kazakhstan under President Tokayev is rated 'Not Free.' The Mazhilis (lower house, 107 members) and Senate (50 members) do not function independently. International channels: EITI, Tehran Convention (Caspian çevresel cooperation), SCO (Shanghai Cooperation Organisation), OSCE.

LA.s: Landlocked Southeast Asian ekonomi ($16.5B GSYİH) with agriculture at 16.8% GSYİH and madencilik at 3.89%. Major hydropower producer (dam exports to Thailand). One-party state. Severe debt crisis ($13B+ external debt, primarily to China).

sectors.w: Laos's madencilik sector (gold, copper, potash) generates water contamination and community displacement. Ne zaman çevresel monitoring data is published alongside madencilik revenue, W hesaplanabilir hale gelir.
bp: Environmental bonds for madencilik licenses. Ne zaman remediation costs are pre-funded, marginal operations become uneconomic.
Per-mine çevresel data disclosure through international operator reporting. Making çevresel costs visible makes W computable.
Kısmen kırılabilir. Mining disturbs landscapes but improved management can reduce impact.
a: Report through international madencilik company compliance channels
Document çevresel impacts through international monitoring organizations

Support Mekong River Commission çevresel governance

i: MONRE — Laos's environment ministry. Note: Laos is a tek parti devleti (LPRP). No independent sivil toplum or media.
Major operators include MMG (China Minmetals subsidiary), PanAust. Lao government holds equity in major mines.
Ministry of Energy and Mines — oversees madencilik and energy policy. Laos is not yet an EITI member.
Note: National Assembly (164 members) is controlled by LPRP. International channels: ASEAN, Mekong River Commission, Asian Geliştirmekment Bank, World Bank.

LB.s: Collapsed ekonomi ($20.1B GSYİH, down from $55B in 2018). Banking sector crisis wiped out savings. Services historically dominated. Political system based on sectarian power-sharing (confessionalism). Multiple concurrent crises — economic, political, refugee.

sectors.w: Lebanon's banking sector collapse (2019-present) represents a PST endgame — the örtüşen çıkar has already partially broken through crisis. The remaining PST is in the lack of accountability for banking sector losses.
bp: Banking sector restructuring with full forensic audit of capital outflows. Ne zaman accountability is established for the $72B+ in depositor losses, the örtüşen çıkar between banks, politicians, and central bank in opacity breaks.
Publication of forensic audit results (Alvarez & Marsal was contracted but access was blocked). Making the flow of funds visible makes W computable.
Kısmen kırılabilir — the crisis has already revealed sistem bağımlılığı. But without institutional reform, the same dynamics can rebuild.
a: Support the Alvarez & Marsal forensic audit by providing internal bank records
Report capital flight data to the Special Investigation Commission
Şu yolla belgeleyin: investigative journalism channels (Lebanon has relatively free press)
Banks: Cooperate fully with forensic audit
Disclose beneficial ownership of related-party lending
Accept bail-in restructuring rather than socializing losses
BDL: Complete the forensic audit of central bank operations
Banking Control Commission: Uygulatmak capital controls equitably
Ministry of Finance: Uygulamak IMF reform conditions

Support IMF program conditionality on banking sector şeffaflık

Support Lebanese sivil toplum accountability initiatives
i: SIC (Special Investigation Commission) — Lebanon's financial intelligence unit. BDL (Banque du Liban / Central Bank) — the central bank whose financial engineering scheme is at the center of the crisis. Note: Lebanon has some of the region's strongest press freedom.
ABL (Association of Banks in Lebanon) — represents 60+ banks. BDL — the central bank. Lebanon's banking sector losses are estimated at $72B+.
Banking Control Commission — the banking supervisor. IMF — Lebanon reached a staff-level agreement in 2022 but reforms remain unimplemented.

Note: Lebanon's parliament (128 members, elected on confessional basis) is functional but deeply divided. The political system is paralyzed by sectarian power-sharing. International channels: IMF, World Bank, CEDRE conference donors, French-led international support group.

LK.s: Island ekonomi ($99B GSYİH) recovering from 2022 economic crisis. Tarım 8.3% GSYİH (tea, rubber, coconut). İmalat 17.6% (garments). Tourism significant. Post-crisis IMF program. Historically one of Asia's highest human development indicators.

sectors.w: Sri Lanka's 2021 overnight organic farming mandate (banning chemical fertilizers) demonstrated how agricultural sistem bağımlılığı works — it caused immediate crop failure. The lesson: gradual transition with data makes W computable.
bp: Gradual agricultural transition with per-farm soil health monitoring (learning from the 2021 failure). Ne zaman transition is evidence-based rather than ideological, örtüşen çıkar chemical-dependent monoculture zayıflar sustainably.
Per-estate çevresel data for tea, rubber, and coconut published alongside export revenue. Sri Lanka's Tea Research Institute collects data — making it public makes W computable.
Kısmen kırılabilir. Sri Lanka's 2021 experiment showed both the reality of sistem bağımlılığı (sudden decoupling fails) and its reducibility (gradual transition with soil biology rebuilding works).

i: CEA (Central Environmental Authority) — Sri Lanka's çevresel regulator. Registrar of Pesticides — under the Department of Agriculture, regulates pesticide use. Tea Research Institute — conducts research on sustainable tea production.
Major plantation companies: Kelani Valley Plantations, Bogawantalawa Tea Estates. Sri Lanka Tea Board — regulates the tea industry.
Ministry of Agriculture — oversees agricultural policy. Sri Lanka Tea Board — manages quality standards and exports.

Parliament of Sri Lanka (225 members). Contact through parliament.lk. Sri Lanka is a semi-presidential republic. EU GSP+ — Sri Lanka benefits from preferential trade access contingent on human rights and çevresel governance.

LT.s: Baltic EU and Eurozone member ($84.9B GSYİH). Hizmetler 63.6% GSYİH. İmalat 14% GSYİH. Achieved energy independence from Russian gas (Klaipėda LNG terminal). Tarım 2.6% GSYİH.

sectors.w: Lithuania's health insurance system (VLK) tracks healthcare costs. Publishing diet-attributable disease costs makes W computable.
bp: EU front-of-pack health labelling implementation.
VLK publication of diet-related healthcare data.
Not fully breakable. Reform yapmakulation can reduce sistem bağımlılığı.

VLK (Valstybinė ligonių kasa / National Health Insurance Fund) — manages health insurance data.
Seimas (Parliament of Lithuania) — unicameral, 141 members. Contact through lrs.lt.

LU.s: Major EU financial center ($93.3B GSYİH, highest GSYİH per capita globally). Hizmetler 81.2% GSYİH. World's second-largest investment fund domicile (after US). EU institutions host. Steel industry legacy (ArcelorMittal).

sectors.w: Luxembourg's investment fund industry manages €5T+ in assets. Ne zaman financed emisyonlar and beneficial ownership are disclosed, W hesaplanabilir hale gelir from financial intermediation data.
bp: Full EU SFDR and AMLD implementation. Ne zaman fund-level financed emisyonlar and beneficial ownership are transparent, örtüşen çıkar opaque financial intermediation zayıflar.
CSSF mandatory ESG disclosure for all Luxembourg-domiciled funds. Making climate impact visible per fund makes W computable.
Kısmen kırılabilir. Fund domiciliation can relocate, but Luxembourg's legal infrastructure and EU access create switching costs.

i: CSSF — Luxembourg's financial regulator, supervising banks, investment funds, and other financial entities. CRF (Cellule de Renseignement Financier) — financial intelligence unit.
Luxembourg hosts 3,600+ investment funds. ALFI (Association of the Luxembourg Fund Industry) — the industry association.
CSSF — conducts supervision of the fund industry. BCL (Banque centrale du Luxembourg) — participates in ECB monetary policy and macroprudential supervision.
Chambre des Députés — unicameral parliament, 60 members. Contact through chd.lu. Luxembourg was instrumental in establishing the EU Green Bond Standard and hosts the Luxembourg Green Exchange.

LV.s: Baltic EU and Eurozone member ($43.7B GSYİH). Hizmetler 64.6% GSYİH. Forestry significant. Tarım 4% GSYİH. Post-Soviet economic transformation. NATO member.

sectors.w: Latvia's NVD health insurance tracks costs. Publishing diet-related data makes W computable.
bp: EU front-of-pack labelling.
NVD diet-related healthcare cost publication.
Reform yapmakulation mandates reduce sistem bağımlılığı.

Major companies: Rīgas Piena kombināts, Latvijas Balzams.
NVD (Nacionālais veselības dienests / National Health Service) — manages health insurance.
Saeima — unicameral parliament, 100 members. Contact through saeima.lv.

LY.s: Oil-dependent fragile state ($48.5B GSYİH) with 60.96% combined oil and gas rents — one of the world's highest. NOC (National Oil Corporation) manages production (~1.2M bpd when not disrupted). Divided governance (Tripoli vs. eastern-based authorities). Ongoing instability since 2011.

sectors.w: Libya's oil production is repeatedly disrupted by factional conflict (fields and export terminals seized as bargaining chips). The örtüşen çıkar is already partially broken by instability — production is not reliably monetizable.
bp: Governance reform that depoliticizes oil revenue distribution. Ne zaman oil revenue is managed through transparent, rules-based mechanisms (rather than factional control), örtüşen çıkar capturing oil infrastructure zayıflar.
NOC saha başına production and revenue data disclosure. The Libyan Audit Bureau provides some oversight — extending to çevresel data makes W computable.
Kırılamaz. Hydrocarbon combustion releases CO₂.

i: NOC (National Oil Corporation) — manages Libya's oil sector. Libyan Audit Bureau — provides financial oversight. UN Panel of Experts on Libya — monitors yaptırımlar compliance and resource governance.
NOC — the national oil company operating most production. Eni, TotalEnergies, Repsol, ConocoPhillips — major international operators.
CBL (Central Bank of Libya) — manages oil revenue. The division of the CBL between Tripoli and eastern-based institutions has complicated revenue management.

Note: Libya has no functioning unified government or elected legislature. The House of Representatives (Tobruk) and High Council of State (Tripoli) are rival bodies. International channels: UN Support Mission in Libya (UNSMIL), African Union, Arab League.

MA.s: North African ekonomi ($160.6B GSYİH) with agriculture at 10.6% GSYİH and growing yenilenebilir enerji sector (Noor-Ouarzazate solar complex). Major phosphate producer (OCP Group — world's largest). İmalat 15.3% GSYİH.

sectors.w: Morocco controls 70%+ of global phosphate reserves (OCP Group). Phosphate madencilik generates cadmium-contaminated waste and depletes water in arid regions. Ne zaman maden başına çevresel data is published alongside production revenue, W hesaplanabilir hale gelir.
bp: Internalize water and cadmium remediation costs into phosphate pricing. Ne zaman OCP pays for water depletion in already water-stressed regions, örtüşen çıkar low-cost extraction zayıflar.

Mandatory maden başına çevresel disclosure (water use, cadmium levels, waste volumes). OCP already publishes sustainability reports — extending to independently verifiable maden başına data makes W computable.
Kısmen kırılabilir. Phosphate rock inherently contains cadmium. However, cadmium removal technologies exist and can reduce sistem bağımlılığı.
