i: Secrétariat d'État chargé du Développement Durable — oversees çevresel policy. ABH — river basin agencies managing water resources. OCP Group — the devlete ait phosphate company, one of Morocco's largest employers.

OCP Group (Office Chérifien des Phosphates) — devlete ait, controls ~30% of global phosphate trade. OCP has invested heavily in sustainability initiatives including the Mohammed VI Polytechnic University.
Ministry of Energy, Mines and Environment — oversees madencilik and çevresel policy. ONEE — manages water supply infrastructure.
Parlement du Maroc — bicameral: Chambre des Représentants (395 members) and Chambre des Conseillers (120 members). Morocco is a anayasal monarşi with an elected parliament.

MC.s: City-state ($11.1B GSYİH) with 87.2% services. Major financial center and tourism hub. No income tax for individuals. World's highest GSYİH per capita and population density. Limited PST exposure except through financial intermediation.

sectors.w: Monaco's financial services facilitate wealth management with favorable tax treatment. Ne zaman beneficial ownership and tax şeffaflık data are published, W hesaplanabilir hale gelir.
bp: Full compliance with OECD Global Forum şeffaflık standards and CRS information exchange. Ne zaman opacity is eliminated, the örtüşen çıkar zayıflar.
Publication of aggregate beneficial ownership and capital flow data. W'yi hesaplanabilir kılar.
Kısmen kırılabilir. Financial services can relocate but Monaco's brand and geographic advantages create switching costs.

Monaco hosts branches of major international banks. Association Monégasque des Activités Financières (AMAF) — the financial industry association.
CCAF — Monaco's financial regulator. Monaco is not an AB üyesi but has a customs union with France and cooperates on financial regulation.
Conseil National — Monaco's unicameral parliament, 24 members. Monaco is a anayasal monarşi (Prince Albert II). Moneyval (Council of Europe) evaluates Monaco's AML framework.

MD.s: Small Eastern European ekonomi ($18.2B GSYİH). Tarım 7.1% GSYİH (wine, agriculture). Hizmetler 62.3%. AB adayı country (2022). Significant remittance dependence. Energy dependent on Russian gas (via Transnistria).

sectors.w: Moldova's agricultural sector is dominated by grain monoculture on degraded chernozem soils. Ne zaman soil health data is linked to agricultural output, W hesaplanabilir hale gelir.
bp: EU accession agricultural alignment — CAP-style çevresel conditionality. Ne zaman subsidies reward soil health, örtüşen çıkar exhaustive monoculture zayıflar.
Mandatory soil health monitoring per farm. Moldova's fertile chernozem soils are degrading — making this visible makes W computable.
Kısmen kırılabilir. Grain monoculture degrades soil. Crop rotation and cover cropping can reduce sistem bağımlılığı.

Parlamentul Republicii Moldova — unicameral, 101 members. Contact through parlament.md. Moldova is an AB adayı country.

MG.s: Biodiversity hotspot ekonomi ($17.4B GSYİH). Tarım 22.5% GSYİH. One of Earth's most biodiverse countries (90%+ species endemic). Devastating ormansızlaşma (fr=5.45% forest rents). Mining growing (ilmenite, nickel). Extreme poverty.

sectors.w: Madagascar's slash-and-burn agriculture (tavy) has destroyed 90%+ of original forest. Ne zaman ormansızlaşma data is linked to agricultural output, W hesaplanabilir hale gelir.
bp: Alternative livelihood programs replacing tavy with agroforestry. Ne zaman tree-crop income exceeds slash-and-burn yields, örtüşen çıkar forest clearing breaks.
Satellite ormansızlaşma monitoring linked to commune-level agricultural data. W'yi hesaplanabilir kılar.
Extreme sistem bağımlılığı. Tavy on degraded laterite soils causes erosion and desertification. Madagascar's red soil runoff is visible from space.

i: MNP (Madagascar National Parks) — manages protected areas. WWF, Conservation International, WCS — major international conservation organizations with Madagascar programs.
QMM (QIT Madagascar Minerals, Rio Tinto subsidiary) — ilmenite madencilik. Ambatovy — nickel and cobalt mine (Sumitomo). Madagascar is the world's largest vanilla producer.
ONE (Office National pour l'Environnement) — the çevresel assessment authority. MEEF (Ministère de l'Environnement et de l'Écologie et des Forêts) — environment ministry.
Assemblée nationale de Madagascar — 151 members. Sénat — 18 members. Madagascar is a semi-presidential republic.

MK.s: Small Western Balkan ekonomi ($17B GSYİH). İmalat 14.3% GSYİH. Hizmetler 56.2%. AB adayı country. Coal-dependent energy. Tarım 6.1% GSYİH.

sectors.w: North Macedonia's lignite dependence (Bitola power plant) faces EU accession conditionality. EU ETS alignment will make coal uncompetitive.
bp: EU accession requiring ETS alignment. Coal becomes uncompetitive at EU carbon prices.
Per-plant emisyonlar and health cost disclosure. W'yi hesaplanabilir kılar.
Kırılamaz. Coal combustion releases pollutants.
a: Şuraya bildirin: Ministry of Environment and Physical Planning
Document air pollution health impacts
ESM (Elektrani na Severna Makedonija): Geliştirmek coal phase-out plan
Yatırım yapmak solar energy (excellent potential)

Support EU Just Transition Fund pre-accession assistance
Şu yolla savunuculuk yapın: Energy Community for transition support
i: Ministry of Environment and Physical Planning — çevre otoritesi. North Macedonia is an Energy Community member.
ESM — state electricity company operating the Bitola lignite plant.
ERC (Energy Regulatory Commission) — enerji düzenleyicisi. Energy Community Treaty membership requires EU energy acquis alignment.
Sobranie (Assembly of North Macedonia) — unicameral, 120 members. AB adayı country.

ML.s: Sahelian ekonomi ($26.8B GSYİH) with gold madencilik (16.18% GSYİH) and agriculture (33.3% GSYİH). Military junta since 2020-2021 coups. Security crisis (jihadist insurgency). Third-largest gold producer in Africa.

sectors.w: Mali's gold madencilik generates mercury contamination (artisanal) and cyanide risks (industrial). Ne zaman çevresel data is published alongside production, W hesaplanabilir hale gelir.
bp: International supply chain due diligence requiring mine-level çevresel compliance. Ne zaman buyers verify conditions, örtüşen çıkar unregulated extraction zayıflar.
Per-mine çevresel monitoring published through EITI. Mali's EITI membership provides the framework.
Kısmen kırılabilir. Mining disturbs landscapes. Mercury-free processing can reduce artisanal madencilik sistem bağımlılığı.
a: Report through international madencilik company channels (Barrick Gold, B2Gold)
Şuraya bildirin: DNGM (Direction Nationale de la Géologie et des Mines)
Şu yolla belgeleyin: international monitoring organizations
Barrick Gold (Loulo-Gounkoto), B2Gold (Fekola): Uygulamak international çevresel standards
Support artisanal madencilik formalization
Benimsemek EITI enhanced reporting
Ministry of Mines: Uygulatmak Mining Code çevresel provisions
DNGM: Improve artisanal madencilik oversight

Support ECOWAS engagement on governance and çevresel standards

Support international madencilik company home-country oversight
i: DNGM — national geological and madencilik directorate. Note: Mali is under military rule (CNSP). Civil society space is restricted.
Barrick Gold — operates Loulo-Gounkoto complex. B2Gold — operates Fekola mine. Resolute Mining — operates Syama mine. EITI Mali — member since 2006.
Ministry of Mines, Energy and Water — oversees madencilik policy. Mali's 2019 Mining Code establishes çevresel obligations.
Note: Military transition government. National Transitional Council replaces elected legislature. International channels: ECOWAS (Mali suspended), African Union, EITI Board.

MM.s: Resource-rich ekonomi ($74.1B GSYİH) under military junta since 2021 coup. Gaz rantları 4.4%. Jade and gem madencilik (est. $31B/year — more than formal GSYİH). Tarım 20.8% GSYİH. Civil war affecting multiple regions.

sectors.w: Myanmar's jade industry is largely opaque — estimated at $31B/year but mostly unrecorded. Ne zaman jade revenue flows are made visible (Global Witness has documented significant flows to military), W hesaplanabilir hale gelir.
bp: International yaptırımlar targeting jade and gem revenues flowing to the military junta. Ne zaman revenue is blocked, the örtüşen çıkar between the military and jade madencilik zayıflar.
Supply chain şeffaflık for jade and gems using blockchain traceability. Global Witness and others have documented the flows — formalizing this breaks system independence.
Kısmen kırılabilir. Mining inherently disturbs landscapes. Myanmar's jade mines in Kachin State have caused catastrophic landslides.
a: Report through international monitoring organizations (Global Witness, Justice for Myanmar)
Document military revenue flows from jade and gems
Provide data to international yaptırımlar authorities

Apply conflict mineral frameworks to jade and gems

OECD: Include jade in conflict mineral due diligence guidance
Responsible Jewellery Council: Güçlendirmek Myanmar sourcing standards

Support National Unity Government (NUG) çevresel governance framework
i: Note: Myanmar under the military junta (State Administration Council) has no functioning sivil toplum space. Global Witness has published extensive reports on Myanmar's jade industry. Justice for Myanmar — international advocacy organization documenting military business interests.
Myanmar Gems Enterprise — military-controlled entity managing gem auctions. International buyers increasingly apply conflict mineral frameworks to Myanmar sourcing.
International engagement only — domestic regulation under junta is not independent.

Note: Myanmar's elected parliament (Pyidaungsu Hluttaw) was dissolved by the military coup. The National Unity Government (NUG) — the democratic opposition government in exile — has proposed alternative governance frameworks. International channels: ASEAN (Special Envoy process), UN Human Rights Council, targeted yaptırımlar by US, EU, UK.

MN.s: Resource-dependent landlocked ekonomi ($23.8B GSYİH). Mining at 26.57% GSYİH (copper, coal, gold). Coal at 4.89% GSYİH. Oyu Tolgoi copper-gold mine (Rio Tinto/Turquoise Hill). Parliamentary demokrasi — rare in the region.

sectors.w: Mongolia's madencilik sector (particularly coal and copper) generates dust pollution and depletes water in the Gobi. Ne zaman maden başına çevresel data is linked to production revenue, W hesaplanabilir hale gelir.
bp: Environmental bonds and water-use fees reflecting true scarcity. Ne zaman madencilik companies pay for water in arid steppe, örtüşen çıkar water-intensive extraction zayıflar.
Per-mine çevresel monitoring data published through EITI Mongolia. W'yi hesaplanabilir kılar.
Kısmen kırılabilir. Mining in arid environments inherently affects limited water resources. However, dry processing and water recycling can reduce dependence.

Şu yolla belgeleyin: herder community organizations

Şunu talep edin: herder community consultation rights in madencilik decisions
i: MNET — çevre otoritesi. EITI Mongolia — member since 2007. Mongolia has relatively active sivil toplum for the region.
Oyu Tolgoi — the giant copper-gold mine (Rio Tinto 66%, Government 34%). Erdenes Mongol — state madencilik holding company. Tavan Tolgoi — massive coal deposit.
MRAM — the madencilik regulator. Mongolia's 2006 Minerals Law governs madencilik licensing.
State Great Khural (Улсын Их Хурал) — unicameral parliament, 76 members. Contact through parliament.mn. Mongolia is a parlamenter demokrasi with competitive elections since 1990.

MO.s: Casino and tourism ekonomi ($49.5B GSYİH). Hizmetler 83.8% GSYİH. World's largest gambling market (pre-COVID revenue $36B/year). Under Chinese sovereignty. Highly concentrated gambling concession system.

sectors.w: Macao's gambling industry generates significant social costs (problem gambling, money laundering) that are not captured in concession revenues. Ne zaman social cost data is published alongside gross gaming revenue, W hesaplanabilir hale gelir.
bp: Mandatory gambling harm data disclosure per concession. Ne zaman social costs are visible alongside revenues, örtüşen çıkar revenue maximization without harm mitigation zayıflar.
DICJ publication of problem gambling prevalence, social cost estimates, and AML compliance data per concessionaire. W'yi hesaplanabilir kılar.
Kısmen kırılabilir. Gambling inherently creates addiction risk. However, harm reduction measures (exclusion programs, betting limits) can reduce sistem bağımlılığı.

i: DICJ (Direcção de Inspecção e Coordenação de Jogos) — Macao's gaming regulator. GIF (Gabinete de Informação Financeira) — financial intelligence unit.
Six gaming concessionaires hold licenses renewed in 2023. Sands China (Las Vegas Sands subsidiary), Galaxy Entertainment, Wynn Macau, MGM China, SJM Holdings, Melco Resorts — operate 40+ casinos.
DICJ — the gaming regulator overseeing all casino operations. 2023 concession renewal included enhanced responsible gambling requirements.
Assembleia Legislativa de Macau — 33 members (14 directly elected, 12 indirectly elected, 7 appointed). Macao is a Special Administrative Region of China with limited autonomy.

MR.s: Sahelian ekonomi ($10.9B GSYİH) with madencilik (iron ore, 9.59% GSYİH) and agriculture (19.3% GSYİH). Balıkçılık significant. New hydrogen and gas projects (GTA — Greater Tortue Ahmeyim). Coal at 0.67%.

sectors.w: SNIM iron ore madencilik in Zouérat generates dust and water issues. Ne zaman çevresel monitoring is published, W hesaplanabilir hale gelir.
bp: Environmental bond requirements for madencilik. Ne zaman remediation is pre-funded, örtüşen çıkar in unaccountable extraction zayıflar.
Per-mine çevresel data disclosure. W'yi hesaplanabilir kılar.
Kısmen kırılabilir. Mining disturbs landscapes but rehabilitation can reduce impact.

SNIM — state iron company. Kinross Gold — operates Tasiast mine. BP and Kosmos Energy — developing the GTA gas field.
EITI Mauritania — member since 2005.
Assemblée nationale de Mauritanie — 176 members. Mauritania is a presidential republic with limited democratic space.

MT.s: Small EU island ekonomi ($25B GSYİH). Hizmetler 81.8% (financial services, gaming, tourism). AB üyesi. Major online gambling hub. No significant natural resources.

sectors.w: Malta licenses ~300 online gambling companies (MGA). Ne zaman problem gambling and AML data is published per licensee, W hesaplanabilir hale gelir.
bp: Enhanced MGA licensing requirements with harm data disclosure. Makes örtüşen çıkar revenue without accountability weaker.
Per-licensee problem gambling and AML compliance data publication. W'yi hesaplanabilir kılar.
Kısmen kırılabilir. Online gambling creates addiction risk. Harm reduction measures can reduce sistem bağımlılığı.

i: MGA (Malta Gaming Authority) — licenses and regulates online gambling. FIAU — financial intelligence unit. Malta transposed EU Whistleblower Directive.
Malta hosts ~300 licensed gambling companies including Betsson, Kindred, LeoVegas.
MGA — the gambling regulator. MFSA (Malta Finansal Hizmetler Authority) — the financial regulator.
Kamra tad-Deputati (House of Representatives) — unicameral, 65+ members. Malta is an EU parlamenter demokrasi.

MU.s: Upper-middle-income island ekonomi ($14.9B GSYİH). Hizmetler 64.4% (financial services, tourism). İmalat 11.1% (textiles). Successful economic diversification from sugar to services. Strong institutions.

sectors.w: Mauritius is a major offshore financial center, particularly for India-bound investment (India-Mauritius tax treaty). Ne zaman beneficial ownership and tax data is transparent, W hesaplanabilir hale gelir.
bp: Full CRS and FATF compliance. Ne zaman financial opacity is eliminated, the örtüşen çıkar zayıflar.
Publication of beneficial ownership data. W'yi hesaplanabilir kılar.
Kısmen kırılabilir. Financial services can relocate but Mauritius's India tax treaty and infrastructure create switching costs.

i: FSC — the integrated financial services regulator. FIU — financial intelligence unit.
Mauritius hosts ~900 Global Business companies (Category 1 and 2). Major banks: SBM Holdings, MCB Group.
FSC — regulates the Global Business sector. Bank of Mauritius — the central bank. Mauritius was on the FATF grey list (2020-2021) and implemented reforms.
National Assembly of Mauritius — 70 members. Mauritius is a parlamenter demokrasi with strong democratic traditions since independence (1968).

MW.s: Low-income ekonomi ($11.3B GSYİH). Tarım 31.8% GSYİH — tobacco is the largest export (50%+ of export revenue). One of the world's poorest countries. High climate vulnerability.

sectors.w: Malawi's tobacco dependence is an economic PST — tobacco demand is declining globally while the crop depletes soil. As WHO FCTC reduces demand, the örtüşen çıkar between tobacco growers and buyers zayıflar.
bp: Crop diversification as global tobacco demand declines. Ne zaman alternative crops (legumes, macadamia, soy) provide comparable income, örtüşen çıkar tobacco monoculture breaks.
Publication of toprak bozulması and health cost data alongside tobacco revenue. W'yi hesaplanabilir kılar.
Tobacco cultivation depletes soil nutrients and requires heavy pesticide use. Crop rotation can reduce sistem bağımlılığı.

i: EAD (Environmental Affairs Department) — çevre otoritesi. Ministry of Labour — enforces child labor laws.
Limbe Leaf (Alliance One International subsidiary) — the largest tobacco buyer. JTI, BAT — international tobacco companies sourcing from Malawi.
Tobacco Commission (now TCC — Tobacco Control Commission) — regulates the tobacco sector. Ministry of Agriculture, Irrigation and Water Geliştirmekment.
National Assembly of Malawi — 193 members. Malawi is a presidential demokrasi. WHO FCTC Articles 17-18 require support for economically viable alternatives to tobacco growing.

MY.s: Upper-middle-income ekonomi ($422.2B GSYİH). World's second-largest palm oil producer. Oil and gas at 5.2% rents (Petronas). İmalat 22.5% GSYİH (electronics, automotive). Hizmetler 53.7%.

sectors.w: Malaysia produces ~25% of global palm oil. EUDR and MSPO certification create traceability frameworks. Ne zaman santral başınaation çevresel data is linked to trade, W hesaplanabilir hale gelir.
bp: EUDR compliance requiring zero-ormansızlaşma traceability. Ne zaman buyers verify origin, örtüşen çıkar forest conversion for plantations breaks.
Mandatory MSPO (Malaysian Sustainable Palm Yağı) certification with independently verifiable çevresel data per estate. W'yi hesaplanabilir kılar.
Kısmen kırılabilir. Palm oil monoculture reduces biodiversity. But yield improvement on existing plantations can reduce expansion pressure.

Document labor violations — report to HR Ministry

i: DOE (Jabatan Alam Sekitar / Department of Environment) — çevre otoritesi. SUHAKAM (Human Rights Commission of Malaysia) — investigates rights complaints including in palm oil sector. RSPO — Malaysia co-hosts the RSPO Secretariat.

Sime Darby Plantation — world's largest palm oil company by planted area. IOI Corporation, FGV (Felda Global Ventures) — major plantation companies. MPOB (Malaysian Palm Yağı Board) — the government agency overseeing the palm oil industry.
MPOB — oversees palm oil industry regulation and research. MSPO (Malaysian Sustainable Palm Yağı) — the national mandatory certification scheme.
Parliament of Malaysia — bicameral: Dewan Rakyat (222 members) and Dewan Negara (70 members). Contact through parlimen.gov.my. Malaysia is a federal anayasal monarşi and parlamenter demokrasi.

MZ.s: Resource-rich developing ekonomi ($22.7B GSYİH). Major gas discoveries (Rovuma Basin — among world's largest LNG projects). Coal at 3.78%, gas at 3.57%. Tarım 25.2% GSYİH. Insurgency in Cabo Delgado province near gas projects.

sectors.w: Mozambique's Rovuma Basin LNG projects (TotalEnergies, ExxonMobil, Eni) are among the world's largest but face force majeure due to insurgency. Ne zaman per-project çevresel and social cost data is published, W hesaplanabilir hale gelir.
bp: Conditional development — LNG projects proceed only with binding community benefit and çevresel standards. Ne zaman development is linked to social outcomes, örtüşen çıkar extraction without accountability zayıflar.
Per-project çevresel disclosure for all Rovuma Basin operations. W'yi hesaplanabilir kılar.
Kırılamaz. LNG production and combustion release CO₂ and methane.

i: MITADER — environment ministry. INP (Instituto Nacional de Petróleo) — the petroleum regulator. Note: Mozambique has limited ihbarcı protections. The Cabo Delgado insurgency complicates sivil toplum operations in the gas-rich north.

TotalEnergies — leads the $20B Mozambique LNG project (currently under force majeure). ExxonMobil — leads Rovuma LNG. Eni — operates Coral South FLNG. ENH (Empresa Nacional de Hidrocarbonetos) — the national hydrocarbons company.
INP — the petroleum regulator. MIREME — oversees energy and madencilik policy. EITI Mozambique — member since 2012.
Assembleia da República de Moçambique — 250 members. Mozambique is a presidential republic. EITI membership since 2012.

NA.s: Upper-middle-income ekonomi ($13.4B GSYİH) with madencilik at 3.17% (uranium, diamonds). Tarım 7.3% GSYİH. One of Africa's most stable democracies. Major new oil discoveries offshore (TotalEnergies, Shell). Green hydrogen ambitions.

sectors.w: Namibia's uranium madencilik (Rössing, Husab — two of world's largest) generates radioactive waste and water issues in the Namib Desert. Ne zaman maden başına çevresel monitoring is published, W hesaplanabilir hale gelir.
bp: Environmental bonds and water-use fees for uranium madencilik. Ne zaman miners pay for water in one of Earth's driest environments, örtüşen çıkar water-intensive extraction zayıflar.
Per-mine çevresel monitoring disclosure. W'yi hesaplanabilir kılar.
Kısmen kırılabilir. Uranium madencilik generates radioactive tailings. Improved containment can reduce but not eliminate sistem bağımlılığı.

i: MEFT — environment ministry. NRPA — radiation protection authority. Namibia has relatively strong sivil toplum for the region.
Rössing Uranium — one of world's largest (Rio Tinto). Husab mine — CNNC/CGN (Chinese devlete ait). Namibia also has significant diamond madencilik (Namdeb — De Beers/government JV).
MME — oversees madencilik policy. Chamber of Mines of Namibia — the industry association.

Parliament of Namibia — bicameral: National Assembly (104 members) and National Council (42 members). Contact through parliament.na. Namibia is a presidential demokrasi with strong democratic credentials since independence (1990).

NE.s: Sahelian ekonomi ($19.9B GSYİH). Tarım 34.5% GSYİH. Uranium madencilik (Arlit — supplies ~5% of world production, Orano/formerly Areva). Oil production growing. Military junta since July 2023 coup.

sectors.w: Niger's uranium madencilik (Orano operations at Arlit) generates radioactive tailings in water-scarce Sahel. Environmental monitoring data makes W computable.
bp: Environmental bonds for uranium operations. Ne zaman remediation costs are pre-funded, örtüşen çıkar in extraction without accountability zayıflar.
Per-mine çevresel monitoring. W'yi hesaplanabilir kılar.
Kısmen kırılabilir. Uranium madencilik generates long-lived radioactive waste. Containment reduces but doesn't eliminate sistem bağımlılığı.

Şunu talep edin: Orano legacy contamination remediation at Arlit
Support EITI enhanced reporting
i: BNEE (Bureau National d'Évaluation Environnementale) — çevresel assessment authority. Note: Military rule since July 2023.
Orano — operates SOMAÏR and COMINAK uranium mines at Arlit (COMINAK closed 2021). Chinese companies (CNNPC) have expanding uranium interests.
Ministry of Mines — oversees madencilik policy. EITI Niger — member since 2005.
Note: Military junta since July 2023. CNSP (Conseil National pour la Sauvegarde de la Patrie). ECOWAS suspended Niger. International channels: African Union, IAEA, EITI Board.

NI.s: Small Central American ekonomi ($19.7B GSYİH). Tarım 14.4% GSYİH. Mining at 2.68% (gold). Authoritarian governance under Ortega. Hizmetler 46.8%.

sectors.w: Nicaragua's gold madencilik generates mercury and cyanide contamination. Ne zaman çevresel data is published, W hesaplanabilir hale gelir.
bp: Supply chain due diligence for gold sourced from Nicaragua.
Environmental monitoring per mine makes W computable.
Kısmen kırılabilir. Mercury-free processing can reduce impact.
a: Report through international madencilik company channels (Calibre Mining, B2Gold)
Document çevresel impacts through diaspora channels
Calibre Mining, B2Gold: Apply international çevresel standards
Benimsemek EITI-style reporting
Support artisanal madencilik formalization
Ministry of Energy and Mines: Environmental licensing
MARENA: Monitoring
Support international human rights monitoring for Nicaragua
Şu yolla savunuculuk yapın: OAS for governance reform
Şunu talep edin: madencilik company home-country oversight
i: MARENA (Ministry of Environment) — çevre otoritesi. Note: Nicaragua under Ortega is highly otoriter. Civil society is repressed.
Calibre Mining — operates gold mines in Nicaragua. B2Gold — formerly operated La Libertad mine.
Ministry of Energy and Mines — madencilik regulator.
Note: Asamblea Nacional (92 members) is controlled by FSLN. International channels: OAS (though Nicaragua withdrew), UN Human Rights Council, IACHR.

NP.s: Mountainous South Asian ekonomi ($42.9B GSYİH). Tarım 21.9% GSYİH. Massive hydropower potential (~83 GW technically feasible, only ~2.3 GW developed). Remittances ~25% of GSYİH. Climate-vulnerable (glacial lake outburst floods).

sectors.w: Nepal's agriculture on steep hillsides causes erosion and landslides. Ne zaman per-district soil loss and water quality data is linked to agricultural output, W hesaplanabilir hale gelir.
bp: Reform yapmak agricultural support toward terracing and agroforestry on hillsides. Ne zaman hillside farmers are incentivized to conserve soil, örtüşen çıkar unsustainable cultivation zayıflar.
Per-district soil erosion and water quality monitoring. W'yi hesaplanabilir kılar.
Kısmen kırılabilir. Agriculture on steep slopes inherently risks erosion. Traditional terracing can reduce sistem bağımlılığı.
a: Şuraya bildirin: DoE (Department of Environment)
Report through local government channels (municipality/rural municipality)
Agricultural companies: Support terracing and agroforestry programs
Hydropower companies: Yatırım yapmak watershed protection upstream of reservoirs
MoALD (Ministry of Agriculture): Reform yapmak subsidy structure toward soil conservation
MOFE: Güçlendirmek watershed management
DSCWM (Dept of Soil Conservation and Watershed Management): Scale programs
Temsilcinizle iletişime geçin: member of the Pratinidhi Sabha (House of Representatives, 275 members) talep etmek için hillside agriculture conservation programs
Support climate adaptation finance for Nepal's agricultural sector
Şu yolla savunuculuk yapın: SAARC for regional watershed management
Şunu talep edin: GLOF (glacial lake outburst flood) early warning and prevention investment
i: DoE — çevre otoritesi under MOFE (Ministry of Forests and Environment). Nepal's 2015 Constitution devolves significant authority to local governments.
Nepal's agricultural sector is predominantly smallholder. Hydropower companies (NEA, private developers) have interests in watershed health.
MoALD (Ministry of Agriculture and Livestock Geliştirmekment). DSCWM — responsible for soil conservation programs.
Federal Parliament — bicameral: Pratinidhi Sabha (275 members) and Rashtriya Sabha (59 members). Nepal is a federal democratic republic since 2008.

NZ.s: Advanced ekonomi ($260.2B GSYİH) with intensive dairy farming driving agricultural exports. Tarım 4.4% GSYİH but outsized çevresel footprint (dairy is largest export sector). Hizmetler 64.6%. Strong democratic institutions. Ambitious climate targets.

sectors.w: New Zealand's dairy intensification (6.3M dairy cows) has degraded waterways (nitrogen and E. coli contamination). Ne zaman per-farm nutrient discharge data is published alongside farm revenue, W hesaplanabilir hale gelir.
bp: Uygulamak the NPS-FM (National Policy Statement for Freshwater Management 2020) requiring bottom lines for water quality. Ne zaman farmers face enforceable nutrient caps, örtüşen çıkar herd expansion zayıflar.
Farm Environment Plans with mandatory public nutrient discharge data. NZ's 'He Waka Eke Noa' partnership generates farm-level data — public disclosure makes W computable.
Kısmen kırılabilir. Ruminant digestion produces methane biologically. Feed additives can reduce but not eliminate enteric methane. Riparian planting reduces but doesn't eliminate nutrient runoff.
a: Şuraya bildirin: regional councils (Canterbury, Waikato — primary water quality enforcers)
Document water quality violations — report to MfE (Ministry for the Environment)
Use NZ Protected Disclosures Act 2022
Fonterra: Benimsemek binding waterway protection targets across all supplier farms
Uygulamak methane reduction technology (Kowbucha, Zelp)
Diversify cooperative revenue beyond dairy commodity
MfE: Uygulatmak NPS-FM bottom lines for nitrogen and E. coli in waterways
MPI (Ministry for Primary Industries): Reform yapmak farm support toward çevresel outcomes
EPA: Güçlendirmek agricultural chemical regulation
Temsilcinizle iletişime geçin: Member of Parliament in the House of Representatives (120 members) talep etmek için enforcement of freshwater bottom lines
Support NZ Emissions Trading Scheme inclusion of agricultural emisyonlar (planned by 2025, now uncertain)
Advocate for Comprehensive and Progressive Agreement for Trans-Pacific Partnership (CPTPP) çevresel provisions
Şunu talep edin: inclusion of biological methane in national emisyonlar reduction targets
i: Regional councils — the primary çevresel regulators under the Resource Management Act (RMA). MfE (Ministry for the Environment) — sets national çevresel policy. NZ Protected Disclosures (Protection of Whistleblowers) Act 2022 — strong ihbarcı protection.
Fonterra Co-operative Group — the world's largest dairy exporter, processing ~80% of NZ milk. Fonterra's procurement standards directly influence ~10,000 dairy farms.
NPS-FM (National Policy Statement for Freshwater Management 2020) — requires regional councils to set limits on resource use to achieve çevresel bottom lines. MPI — oversees primary sector policy.

New Zealand Parliament (House of Representatives, 120 members, MMP electoral system). Contact through parliament.nz. NZ Climate Change Response (Zero Carbon) Amendment Act 2019 sets separate targets for biogenic methane.

OM.s: Oil-dependent Gulf ekonomi ($107.1B GSYİH) with 29.21% combined oil and gas rents. PDO (Petroleum Geliştirmekment Oman, 60% government, 34% Shell) is the main operator. Diversifying through Oman Vision 2040. Hydrogen ambitions.

sectors.w: Oman's oil production uses enhanced oil recovery (EOR) including solar-powered steam injection. As EOR costs rise on mature fields, diversification to green hydrogen becomes economically rational.
bp: Green hydrogen investment as alternative export commodity. Oman has committed $30B+ to green hydrogen projects. Ne zaman hydrogen revenue streams are established, örtüşen çıkar oil dependence zayıflar.
Per-field emisyonlar disclosure for all PDO and other operator operations. W'yi hesaplanabilir kılar.
Kırılamaz. Hydrocarbon combustion releases CO₂.
a: Şuraya bildirin: Environment Authority
Report through PDO/Shell compliance channels
PDO: Accelerate yenilenebilir enerji integration in operations
OQ (state energy company): Geliştirmek green hydrogen export capacity
Uygulamak TCFD reporting
Ministry of Energy and Minerals: Balance oil production with hydrogen transition
EA: Güçlendirmek çevresel standards
CBO (Central Bank of Oman): Climate risk in financial supervision
Engage through the Majlis al-Shura (advisory, 86 elected members) on energy transition policy
Şu yolla savunuculuk yapın: GCC for regional energy transition coordination
Support IRENA recommendations on Gulf state transition
Şunu talep edin: Oman Vision 2040 çevresel targets enforcement
i: Environment Authority (EA) — Oman's çevresel regulator. PDO (Petroleum Geliştirmekment Oman) — Shell manages PDO operations.
PDO — produces ~70% of Oman's oil. OQ (formerly Oman Oil Company) — the state energy holding company. Hydrom — the government entity driving Oman's green hydrogen ambitions.
Ministry of Energy and Minerals — oversees energy policy. Hydrom — manages green hydrogen project tenders.
Majlis Oman — bicameral: Majlis al-Shura (86 elected) and Majlis al-Dawla (86 appointed). Oman is a sultanate with limited but growing parlamenter activity.

PA.s: Services-dominant ekonomi ($86.5B GSYİH) with the Panama Canal generating significant revenue. Financial services hub. Mining at 3.58% (Cobre Panamá copper mine — First Quantum, closed by Supreme Court ruling 2023). Hizmetler 69.3%.

sectors.w: Panama's Supreme Court ruled the Cobre Panamá madencilik contract unconstitutional in November 2023, following massive public protests. The örtüşen çıkar between the madencilik company and government has been broken by democratic action.
bp: The Cobre Panamá precedent — democratic rejection of madencilik contracts that do not serve the public interest. This is a direct break of the örtüşen çıkar through civic action and judicial review.
Environmental monitoring of mine closure and remediation. Making closure costs visible makes W computable.
Kısmen kırılabilir. The mine exists — remediation is needed regardless. Closure reduces ongoing sistem bağımlılığı.
a: Report çevresel violations during mine closure to MiAmbiente (Ministry of Environment)
Document water quality downstream of Cobre Panamá
Report through First Quantum compliance channels
First Quantum: Cooperate with orderly mine closure and çevresel remediation
Ensure worker transition support
Comply with Supreme Court ruling
MiAmbiente: Ensure comprehensive çevresel remediation
Ministry of Commerce: Support economic transition for affected communities
Comptroller General: Audit madencilik revenue management
Temsilcinizle iletişime geçin: Diputado in the Asamblea Nacional (71 members) talep etmek için comprehensive mine closure and remediation legislation
Support the Cobre Panamá precedent as a model for democratic resource governance
Advocate for investment treaty reform to protect sovereign çevresel decisions
Şunu talep edin: ICSID (World Bank arbitration) reform on çevresel sovereignty
i: MiAmbiente — the environment ministry. ANAM (Autoridad Nacional del Ambiente) — çevre otoritesi. Panama's Supreme Court (Corte Suprema de Justicia) — ruled the madencilik contract unconstitutional.
First Quantum Minerals — operated Cobre Panamá, one of the world's largest copper mines ($10B investment). The mine is in preservation and safe management mode following the court ruling.
Ministerio de Comercio e Industrias — oversees madencilik concessions. Contraloría General de la República — the national audit office.

Asamblea Nacional de Panamá — unicameral, 71 members. Panama's Cobre Panamá case is a globally significant precedent for democratic control over extractive industries. First Quantum has filed an ICSID arbitration claim.

PE.s: Resource-rich ekonomi ($289.2B GSYİH) with madencilik at 12.1% GSYİH (world's second-largest copper producer, major silver and gold). Tarım 7.3%. Hizmetler 51.3%. Social conflicts around madencilik are frequent.

sectors.w: Peru's madencilik sector generates over 200 active social conflicts (Defensoría del Pueblo tracks monthly). Ne zaman çevresel monitoring data is publicly linked to mine production revenue, W hesaplanabilir hale gelir.
bp: Prior consultation (consulta previa) enforcement per ILO Convention 169. Ne zaman indigenous communities can effectively negotiate çevresel conditions, örtüşen çıkar extraction without consent zayıflar.
Mandatory maden başına çevresel monitoring data published in real-time (OEFA already collects this). Public disclosure makes W computable.
Kısmen kırılabilir. Mining disturbs landscapes. But Peru's madencilik çevresel standards have improved significantly — enforcement is the gap.
a: Şuraya bildirin: OEFA (Organismo de Evaluación y Fiscalización Ambiental)
Document community impacts — report to Defensoría del Pueblo
Report through madencilik company compliance channels
Antamina, Cerro Verde, Las Bambas operators: Uygulamak community development agreements
Benimsemek international tailings standards (GISTM)
Publish maden başına çevresel data
OEFA: Increase çevresel monitoring and enforcement
MINEM: Güçlendirmek çevresel conditions in madencilik concessions
ANA (Autoridad Nacional del Agua): Uygulatmak water quality standards downstream of mines
Temsilcinizle iletişime geçin: Congresista in the Congreso de la República (130 members) talep etmek için enforcement of consulta previa and çevresel monitoring
Support ILO Convention 169 enforcement on indigenous consultation
Advocate for Escazú Agreement ratification
Şunu talep edin: EITI enhanced reporting with çevresel data
i: OEFA — Peru's çevresel enforcement agency for the madencilik sector, conducting inspections and imposing yaptırımlar. Defensoría del Pueblo — the national ombudsman, publishes monthly social conflict reports. SENACE (Servicio Nacional de Certificación Ambiental) — conducts çevresel impact assessments.
Major mines: Antamina (BHP/Glencore), Cerro Verde (Freeport-McMoRan), Las Bambas (MMG/China Minmetals). SNMPE (Sociedad Nacional de Minería, Petróleo y Energía) — the industry association.
MINEM (Ministerio de Energía y Minas) — the energy and madencilik ministry. ANA — the national water authority. EITI Peru — member since 2012.
Congreso de la República del Perú — unicameral, 130 members. Contact through congreso.gob.pe. Peru has ratified ILO Convention 169. Peru has not ratified the Escazú Agreement.

PG.s: Resource-rich Pacific island ekonomi ($31.8B GSYİH). Mining at 14.41% GSYİH, gas at 9.14% (PNG LNG). Tarım 16.4%. Extraordinary biodiversity (7% of world's species on 1% of land). Customary land ownership covers 97% of territory.

sectors.w: PNG's madencilik sector (Ok Tedi, Porgera, Lihir) has a history of catastrophic çevresel damage. Ok Tedi mine discharged tailings directly into the Fly River system for decades. Environmental monitoring makes W computable.
bp: Mandatory çevresel bonds per IFC Performance Standards. Ne zaman remediation is pre-funded, örtüşen çıkar in low-cost disposal zayıflar.
Per-mine çevresel monitoring published alongside production revenue. PNG's EITI membership provides the framework. W'yi hesaplanabilir kılar.
Kısmen kırılabilir. Mining in tropical environments disturbs highly biodiverse ecosystems. But modern tailings management (not riverine disposal) can reduce sistem bağımlılığı.
a: Şuraya bildirin: CEPA (Conservation and Environment Protection Authority)
Document community impacts through local NGOs and customary landowner groups
Report through Barrick Gold/Newcrest compliance channels
Barrick Gold (Porgera), Newmont (Lihir), Ok Tedi Mining: Uygulamak international çevresel standards
Address legacy contamination
Benimsemek EITI enhanced reporting
MRA (Mineral Resources Authority): Güçlendirmek çevresel conditions in madencilik leases
CEPA: Uygulatmak çevresel standards
EITI PNG: Expand to çevresel data
Temsilcinizle iletişime geçin: member of the National Parliament (111 members) talep etmek için çevresel bonds for all madencilik operations
Support customary landowner rights in madencilik negotiations
Şu yolla savunuculuk yapın: Pacific Islands Forum for regional çevresel standards
Şunu talep edin: international accountability for madencilik legacy contamination (Ok Tedi)
i: CEPA — PNG's çevre otoritesi. Department of Mineral Policy and Geohazards Management — madencilik regulator. Note: PNG's governance capacity is limited outside major urban centers.
Ok Tedi Mining Limited — operates Ok Tedi copper-gold mine (now community-owned). Barrick Gold — Porgera gold mine. Newmont (formerly Newcrest) — Lihir gold mine. ExxonMobil — operates PNG LNG.
MRA — the madencilik regulator. EITI PNG — member since 2014.
National Parliament of Papua New Guinea — unicameral, 111 members. PNG is a anayasal monarşi (King Charles III as head of state) with Westminster-style parlamenter demokrasi.

PH.s: Major Southeast Asian ekonomi ($461.6B GSYİH). Hizmetler 63.2% GSYİH. Tarım 9.1%. Mining at 1.52% (nickel — world's second-largest producer). İmalat 15.7% (electronics). Extreme climate vulnerability — typhoons.

sectors.w: Philippines' nickel madencilik (for EV batteries) generates significant çevresel damage on small islands. Ne zaman maden başına çevresel data is linked to nickel exports, W hesaplanabilir hale gelir.
bp: Environmental compliance as condition for madencilik permits. President Duterte's 2017 madencilik audit closed 28 mines. Sustained enforcement breaks örtüşen çıkar non-compliant extraction.
Per-mine çevresel monitoring and community impact data. DENR already collects data — public disclosure makes W computable.
Kısmen kırılabilir. Mining on small islands with fragile ecosystems inherently causes significant damage. But modern methods can reduce impact.
a: Şuraya bildirin: DENR (Department of Environment and Natural Resources)
Document community impacts through sivil toplum organizations
Şuraya bildirin: Mines and Geosciences Bureau
Nickel Asia, Global Ferronickel: Uygulamak international çevresel standards
Benimsemek responsible madencilik certification
Support community development agreements
DENR: Güçlendirmek çevresel monitoring and enforcement
MGB: Require çevresel bonds
EMB (Environmental Management Bureau): Uygulatmak pollution standards
Temsilcinizle iletişime geçin: Representative in the House of Representatives (316 members) or Senator talep etmek için enforcement of madencilik çevresel standards
Support Alternative Mining Bill with enhanced çevresel protections
Şu yolla savunuculuk yapın: ASEAN for regional madencilik standards
Şunu talep edin: EU Battery Regulation traceability for Philippine nickel
i: DENR — the environment and natural resources department. MGB (Mines and Geosciences Bureau) — manages madencilik regulation. Philippines has relatively active sivil toplum and press freedom.
Nickel Asia Corporation — the country's largest nickel producer. Global Ferronickel Holdings. Philippines is the world's second-largest nickel producer.
EMB (Environmental Management Bureau) — under DENR, responsible for pollution control. Philippine Mining Act of 1995 — governs madencilik operations.
Congress of the Philippines — bicameral: House of Representatives (316 members) and Senate (24 members). Contact through congress.gov.ph. Philippines is a presidential demokrasi.

PK.s: Large ekonomi ($371.6B GSYİH) with agriculture at 23.7% GSYİH (cotton, wheat, rice, sugarcane). İmalat 13.2%. Hizmetler 50.7%. Severe climate vulnerability (2022 floods caused $30B+ damage). Water stress. Coal at 0.12%, gas at 0.74%.

sectors.w: Pakistan's cotton-wheat-rice monoculture cycle depletes groundwater and degrades soil. Ne zaman per-district water table and soil health data is published alongside agricultural output, W hesaplanabilir hale gelir.
bp: Reform yapmak agricultural subsidies from input-based to outcome-based. Ne zaman farmers are rewarded for water efficiency rather than maximum extraction, örtüşen çıkar water-intensive monoculture zayıflar.
Per-district groundwater monitoring and soil health data. WAPDA already monitors water — linking to agricultural output makes W computable.
Kısmen kırılabilir. Irrigated agriculture in semi-arid conditions inherently depletes water. But drip irrigation and crop diversification can reduce sistem bağımlılığı.
a: Şuraya bildirin: Pakistan EPA (Environment Protection Agency)
Document water contamination — report to WAPDA (Water and Power Geliştirmekment Authority)
Report through provincial agricultural extension services
Agricultural input companies: Geliştirmek water-efficient farming solutions
Textile companies (reliant on Pakistani cotton): Support sustainable cotton initiatives
Yatırım yapmak drip irrigation technology
Ministry of National Food Security: Reform yapmak water pricing for agriculture
IRSA (Indus River System Authority): Uygulatmak provincial water allocations
Provincial agriculture departments: Support crop diversification
Temsilcinizle iletişime geçin: MNA (Member of National Assembly, 342 members) or Senator talep etmek için agricultural water pricing reform
Leverage Pakistan's Climate Vulnerable Forum membership to advocate for agricultural adaptation finance
Support Indus Waters Treaty modernization for climate adaptation
Şunu talep edin: international climate loss and damage finance (Pakistan's 2022 floods were a catalyzing case)
i: Pakistan EPA — federal çevre otoritesi. WAPDA — manages water resources and irrigation. Provincial EPAs — each province has its own çevresel agency.
Pakistan's agricultural sector is fragmented among smallholders. Major cotton buyers include Pakistani textile mills and international brands sourcing from Pakistan.

Ministry of National Food Security and Research — federal agricultural policy. IRSA — manages Indus water distribution among provinces. Pakistan Council of Research in Water Resources (PCRWR) — monitors groundwater.
Parliament of Pakistan — bicameral: National Assembly (342 members) and Senate (100 members). Contact through na.gov.pk. Pakistan is a federal parlamenter demokrasi.

PL.s: Major EU ekonomi ($917.8B GSYİH) with significant coal sector (0.25% rents but coal provides ~70% of electricity). İmalat 16.1% GSYİH. Hizmetler 59.1%. Coal transition is Poland's central climate challenge — 80,000+ miners.

sectors.w: Poland's coal sector is sustained by state subsidies and employment guarantees. EU ETS carbon pricing makes Polish coal uncompetitive. Ne zaman full carbon costs are internalized, the örtüşen çıkar between miners and state employment programs breaks.
bp: EU ETS alignment without free allowances. At €90/ton carbon, Polish coal electricity costs 2-3x renewable alternatives. The örtüşen çıkar breaks when coal plants cannot compete.
Per-plant emisyonlar and health-impact disclosure. Poland's coal plants cause 4,000+ premature deaths/year. Making health costs visible per MWh makes W computable.
Kırılamaz. Coal combustion releases CO₂ and air pollutants.
a: Şuraya bildirin: GIOŚ (Chief Inspectorate of Environmental Protection)
Document health impacts in madencilik regions — report to GIS (Chief Sanitary Inspectorate)
Use Polish ihbarcı law (2024 transposition of EU Directive)
PGE, Tauron, Enea, PGG: Geliştirmek coal phase-out plans with worker transition
Yatırım yapmak offshore wind (Baltic Sea — major potential)
Benimsemek per-unit emisyonlar reporting
URE (Energy Regulatory Office): Reform yapmak tariffs to reflect carbon costs
Ministry of Climate: Uygulamak National Energy Policy 2040
NFEP (National Fund for Environmental Protection): Finance mine closure and remediation
Temsilcinizle iletişime geçin: Poseł or Senator in the Sejm/Senat talep etmek için accelerated coal phase-out with just transition measures
Support EU Just Transition Fund maximization for Silesia and other coal regions
Advocate for EU Green Deal implementation with adequate transition support
Şunu talep edin: territorial just transition plans with concrete retraining programs
i: GIOŚ (Główny Inspektorat Ochrony Środowiska) — the chief çevresel inspectorate. GIS (Główny Inspektorat Sanitarny) — the chief sanitary inspectorate monitoring public health. Poland transposed the EU Whistleblower Directive in 2024.

PGE (Polska Grupa Energetyczna) — Poland's largest energy company. Tauron, Enea — other major energy companies. PGG (Polska Grupa Górnicza) — Poland's largest coal madencilik company (devlete ait, ~40,000 employees).

URE (Urząd Regulacji Energetyki) — the enerji düzenleyicisi. NFEP (Narodowy Fundusz Ochrony Środowiska) — the çevresel fund financing green transition. Poland's coal phase-out agreement with madencilik unions targets 2049.

Sejm (460 members) and Senat (100 members). Contact through sejm.gov.pl and senat.gov.pl. EU Just Transition Fund — Poland is the largest recipient of JTF funding. Poland's 2020 coal phase-out agreement targets closure of all coal mines by 2049.

PR.s: US unincorporated territory ($126B GSYİH) with pharmaceutical manufacturing (44.1% of GSYİH — among world's highest pharma concentration). Hizmetler 51.8%. Post-Hurricane Maria (2017) infrastructure challenges. LUMA Energy electricity crisis.

sectors.w: Puerto Rico has one of the highest obesity rates in the US. Imported UPF dominates the food supply (85%+ of food is imported). Ne zaman diet-related healthcare costs (Medicaid/Medicare data) are linked to product categories, W hesaplanabilir hale gelir.
bp: Reform yapmak food import tax structure to incentivize fresh food over UPF. Ne zaman imported UPF faces higher tariffs than fresh food, örtüşen çıkar high-margin processed imports zayıflar.
CMS (Centers for Medicare & Medicaid Services) data on Puerto Rico diet-related healthcare costs per product category. W'yi hesaplanabilir kılar.
Not fully breakable. Ultra-processing alters food matrix. But Puerto Rico's tropical climate allows significant local food production to reduce import dependence.
a: Şuraya bildirin: FDA (applies to Puerto Rico as US territory)
Document food safety violations to Puerto Rico Department of Health
Use US federal ihbarcı protections
Food importers: Diversify toward fresh and minimally processed products
Support local food production development
Benimsemek voluntary front-of-pack labelling
PR Department of Agriculture: Expand local food production programs
Department of Health: Uygulamak nutrition education and labelling requirements
FDA: Apply US food labelling regulations
Contact Puerto Rico's Resident Commissioner in the US House of Representatives to advocate for food access and local agriculture funding
Support the Farm Bill provisions for Puerto Rico food sovereignty
Advocate for SNAP block grant reform to incentivize fresh food
Şunu talep edin: local food production investment through USDA programs
i: FDA — the US Food and Drug Administration has jurisdiction in Puerto Rico. Puerto Rico Department of Health — oversees local food safety. US federal ihbarcı protections apply.
Major food retailers in Puerto Rico: Walmart, Econo. Empresas Fonalledas — local retail conglomerate.
PR Department of Agriculture — supports local agricultural development. Puerto Rico imports ~85% of food consumed.

Puerto Rico has a Resident Commissioner in the US House of Representatives (non-voting). Legislatura de Puerto Rico — bicameral: Cámara de Representantes (51 members) and Senado (27 members). As a US territory, many policy decisions are made at the federal level.

PS.s: Occupied territory ($13.7B GSYİH, severely constrained by occupation). Tarım 7.4% GSYİH. Hizmetler 76.2%. Economy dependent on Israeli work permits and international aid. Water access severely restricted. Active conflict zone.

sectors.w: Palestinian agriculture operates under severe water restrictions (Oslo II Accords limit Palestinian water extraction). Ne zaman water allocation data is published alongside agricultural output, the systemic welfare impact of occupation on agriculture becomes computable.
bp: International pressure for equitable water allocation per Oslo II renegotiation. Ne zaman Palestinian farmers access fair water shares, örtüşen çıkar restricting agricultural development zayıflar.
Publication of per-community water allocation and agricultural productivity data. International monitoring (OCHA, World Bank) already collects data — systematic disclosure makes W computable.
Extreme sistem bağımlılığı. The occupation structurally constrains agricultural development through water restrictions, land access, and movement controls.
a: Document water access restrictions through Palestinian Water Authority channels
Şuraya bildirin: international monitoring organizations (OCHA, B'Tselem)
Provide data to academic researchers studying occupation impacts on agriculture
International agricultural companies: Support Palestinian agricultural development programs
Fair trade organizations: Expand Palestinian olive oil and agricultural product sourcing
Yatırım yapmak water-efficient agriculture technology appropriate for restricted water access
EQA: Document çevresel impacts of occupation on agriculture
PWA: Advocate for equitable water allocation
PMA (Palestine Monetary Authority): Support agricultural lending
Support international humanitarian law enforcement on resource access in occupied territories
Şu yolla savunuculuk yapın: UN for equitable water allocation
Şunu talep edin: World Bank monitoring of economic impact of water restrictions on Palestinian agriculture
Support Palestinian sovereignty over natural resources as enshrined in UNGA resolutions
i: PWA (Palestinian Water Authority) — manages water resources under severe constraints. EQA (Environment Quality Authority) — the Palestinian çevre otoritesi. B'Tselem — Israeli human rights organization documenting occupation impacts.
Palestinian agricultural sector is predominantly smallholder. Olive oil is the most significant agricultural export. International NGOs and development agencies support agricultural development.

PWA — the key institution managing water allocation under occupation constraints. Joint Water Committee (JWC) — the Oslo-established mechanism for water cooperation between Israel and Palestine, widely criticized as inequitable.

Palestinian Legislative Council (PLC, 132 members) — non-functional since 2007. The Palestinian Authority operates through the executive. International channels: UNGA, UNHRC, ICJ Advisory Opinion on the Wall (2004), UN OCHA, UNRWA.

PT.s: EU ekonomi ($313.3B GSYİH). Hizmetler 66.3% GSYİH. Tarım 2% (cork, wine, olive oil). İmalat 11.8%. Renewable energy leader (70%+ of electricity from renewables). Successfully phased out coal (2021).

sectors.w: Portugal's SNS (Serviço Nacional de Saúde) tracks healthcare costs. Publishing diet-related costs per product category makes W computable.
bp: Uygulamak EU front-of-pack health labelling.
SNS diet-related healthcare cost data publication. W'yi hesaplanabilir kılar.
Not fully breakable. Reform yapmakulation mandates reduce sistem bağımlılığı.
a: Şuraya bildirin: ASAE (Authority for Food and Economic Safety)
Use Portuguese ihbarcı law (Lei 93/2021)
Portuguese food companies: Reform yapmakulate products
Benimsemek front-of-pack labelling
DGS (Directorate-General of Health): Uygulamak labelling
ASAE: Uygulatmak marketing standards
SNS: Publish health expenditure data
Temsilcinizle iletişime geçin: Deputado in the Assembleia da República (230 members) talep etmek için health labelling
Support EU Farm to Fork Strategy
i: ASAE (Autoridade de Segurança Alimentar e Económica) — food safety and economic inspection. Lei 93/2021 — Portugal's ihbarcı protection law.
Jerónimo Martins (Pingo Doce) — major Portuguese retailer. FIPA (Federação das Indústrias Portuguesas Agro-Alimentares) — food industry federation.
DGS (Direção-Geral da Saúde) — public health authority. SNS — the national health service.
Assembleia da República — unicameral, 230 members. Contact through parlamento.pt. Portugal is a parlamenter demokrasi.

PY.s: Landlocked South American ekonomi ($44.5B GSYİH). Tarım 10.7% GSYİH (massive soy production — 4th largest exporter globally). İmalat 19% GSYİH. Hizmetler 48.7%. Itaipú Dam provides 90%+ renewable electricity. Severe ormansızlaşma from soy expansion.

sectors.w: Paraguay's soy monoculture has destroyed 90%+ of Atlantic Forest and drives ongoing Chaco ormansızlaşma. Ne zaman per-farm ormansızlaşma and toprak bozulması data is linked to soy exports, W hesaplanabilir hale gelir.
bp: EUDR compliance requiring zero-ormansızlaşma soy. Ne zaman EU buyers require verified ormansızlaşma-free origin, örtüşen çıkar Chaco clearing for soy breaks.
Satellite-based ormansızlaşma monitoring linked to soy export data. Global Forest Watch already tracks Paraguay extensively — linking to farm-level data makes W computable.
Kısmen kırılabilir. Soy monoculture inherently reduces biodiversity. But no-till farming and cover cropping can reduce toprak bozulması.
a: Report illegal ormansızlaşma to SEAM (Secretaría del Ambiente)
Document indigenous land rights violations — report to INDI (Instituto Paraguayo del Indígena)
Report through commodity trader compliance channels (Cargill, Bunge, ADM)
Commodity traders (Cargill, Bunge, ADM, Louis Dreyfus): Uygulamak zero-ormansızlaşma soy sourcing for Paraguay
Benimsemek Soy Moratorium-style commitments for the Chaco
Yatırım yapmak yield improvement on existing farmland
MADES: Uygulatmak the Zero Deforestation Law in the Eastern Region and extend to the Chaco
SENAVE (Servicio Nacional de Calidad y Sanidad Vegetal): Integrate çevresel standards into soy export certification
INFONA: Güçlendirmek forest monitoring and enforcement
Temsilcinizle iletişime geçin: Diputado or Senador in the Congreso Nacional talep etmek için extension of the Zero Deforestation Law to the Chaco
Support EUDR implementation with transition support for Paraguayan farmers
Advocate for Mercosur çevresel provisions enforcement
Şunu talep edin: indigenous land rights recognition in soy expansion zones
i: SEAM (Secretaría del Ambiente) — now MADES (Ministerio del Ambiente y Desarrollo Sostenible). INFONA (Instituto Forestal Nacional) — the forest management authority. INDI — the indigenous affairs institute.
Major soy traders operating in Paraguay: Cargill, Bunge, ADM, Louis Dreyfus. CAPPRO (Cámara Paraguaya de Procesadores de Oleaginosas y Cereales) — the oilseed processors' association.
MADES — environment ministry. Zero Deforestation Law (Ley 2524/2004) — prohibits conversion of forest to agriculture in the Eastern Region (but not the Chaco, where ormansızlaşma continues).
Congreso Nacional del Paraguay — bicameral: Cámara de Diputados (80 members) and Cámara de Senadores (45 members). Paraguay is a presidential republic.

QA.s: Hydrocarbon-dominated ekonomi ($219.2B GSYİH). Sanayi 58.2% GSYİH. Petrol rantları 15.28% GSYİH, gas rents 12.01% GSYİH — world's largest LNG exporter. Hizmetler 46.1%. Highest per-capita CO₂ emisyonlar globally. Absolute monarchy.

sectors.w: Qatar's LNG dominance faces demand erosion as importing nations (Japan, South Korea, EU) diversify toward renewables and hydrogen. Ne zaman importers reduce LNG dependence, the örtüşen çıkar zayıflar.
bp: Importer diversification away from Qatari LNG. As Japan, Korea, and Europe invest in renewables and green hydrogen, örtüşen çıkar fossil gas dependence zayıflar.
Per-field emisyonlar and flaring data disclosure. Qatar Energy already publishes aggregate sustainability data — extending to field-level reporting makes W computable.
Kırılamaz. LNG combustion releases CO₂. Carbon capture on LNG (pre-combustion at liquefaction) captures only a fraction of lifecycle emisyonlar.
a: Şuraya bildirin: QatarEnergy HSE division
Şu yolla belgeleyin: international joint venture partner channels (ExxonMobil, Shell, TotalEnergies)
Şuraya bildirin: Ministry of Environment and Climate Change
QatarEnergy: Accelerate carbon capture at Ras Laffan
Yatırım yapmak blue and green hydrogen
Reduce routine flaring to zero
Ministry of Environment and Climate Change: Uygulatmak air quality standards around Ras Laffan
KAHRAMAA (Qatar General Electricity & Water Corporation): Mandate energy efficiency
Qatar National Vision 2030: Integrate emisyonlar reduction targets
Şu yolla savunuculuk yapın: GCC (Gulf Cooperation Council) for regional emisyonlar standards
Support Global Methane Pledge commitments
Şunu talep edin: LNG buyer nations to condition contracts on emisyonlar intensity
Engage through OPEC for managed fossil fuel transition
i: QatarEnergy (formerly Qatar Petroleum) — the state hydrocarbon company controlling all oil and gas operations. International partners operate under production-sharing agreements.
QatarEnergy — devlete ait, operates the world's largest LNG facility at Ras Laffan Industrial City. North Field — the world's largest non-associated gas field.
Ministry of Environment and Climate Change — çevresel regulator. KAHRAMAA — electricity and water utility. Qatar National Vision 2030 — the national strategic framework.

Qatar is an absolute monarchy — the Emir governs by decree. Advisory Shura Council (45 members, 30 elected since 2021) has limited legislative power. International channels: GCC, OPEC (Qatar withdrew 2019 but re-engaged), COP process.

RO.s: AB üyesi ekonomi ($382.6B GSYİH). İmalat 13.2% GSYİH. Gaz rantları 0.53%, oil 0.38%. Hizmetler 62.6%. Significant forestry issues — illegal logging in old-growth Carpathian forests despite AB üyesiship.

sectors.w: Romania's large-scale agricultural land consolidation has created monoculture on former smallholdings. Ne zaman soil health data is linked to EU CAP payments, W hesaplanabilir hale gelir.
bp: EU CAP eco-scheme conditionality. Ne zaman subsidy payments depend on crop rotation and soil health metrics, örtüşen çıkar exhaustive monoculture zayıflar.
Per-farm soil health monitoring through APIA (Agency for Payments and Intervention in Agriculture). W'yi hesaplanabilir kılar.
Kısmen kırılabilir. Grain monoculture degrades Romania's fertile black-earth soils. Cover cropping and crop rotation reduce sistem bağımlılığı.
a: Report illegal logging to Inspectoratul de Stat pentru Controlul în Silvicultură
Şuraya bildirin: Garda Forestieră (Forest Guard)
Şu yolla belgeleyin: Agent Green or EuroNatur
Large agricultural companies: Uygulamak EU eco-schemes
Holzindustrie Schweighofer (now HS Timber): Benimsemek certified sustainable sourcing
Agricultural associations: Benimsemek soil health targets
APIA: Condition CAP payments on eco-scheme compliance
Ministry of Environment: Güçlendirmek Forest Code enforcement
ANPM (National Environmental Protection Agency): Expand monitoring
Temsilcinizle iletişime geçin: Deputat in the Camera Deputaților (330 members) or Senator in the Senat (136 members) talep etmek için Forest Code enforcement
Submit EU Pilot complaints on illegal logging through European Commission
Support ECA (European Court of Auditors) reviews of CAP implementation
Şu yolla savunuculuk yapın: European Parliament for Carpathian old-growth forest protection
i: Garda Forestieră — Romania's forest guard, responsible for enforcing the Forest Code. Inspectoratul de Stat pentru Controlul în Silvicultură — state forestry inspectorate. Agent Green — Romanian çevresel NGO documenting illegal logging.
Romania has significant foreign-owned agricultural land. HS Timber (formerly Holzindustrie Schweighofer) — major timber processor, previously linked to illegal logging controversies.
APIA (Agenția de Plăți și Intervenție pentru Agricultură) — manages EU CAP payments. ANPM — çevresel protection agency. Ministry of Environment, Waters and Forests.
Parlamentul României — bicameral: Camera Deputaților (330 members) and Senat (136 members). AB üyesi since 2007. Contact through cdep.ro and senat.ro.

RS.s: Western Balkan ekonomi ($90.1B GSYİH). İmalat 12.7%. Kömür rantları 0.24% GSYİH — but coal supplies ~70% of electricity. AB adayı country. Mining sector growing (Rio Tinto lithium project controversy).

sectors.w: Serbia's lignite dependence (Nikola Tesla power plants — among Europe's worst SO₂ emitters) faces EU accession conditionality. EU ETS alignment will make lignite uncompetitive.
bp: EU accession requiring LCPD/IED compliance. Retrofitting Nikola Tesla A and B to meet EU emission limits costs more than replacement with renewables.
Per-plant emisyonlar and health cost data. HEAL (Health and Environment Alliance) has documented thousands of premature deaths. W'yi hesaplanabilir kılar.
Kırılamaz. Lignite combustion releases SO₂, PM2.5, and mercury.
a: Şuraya bildirin: Ministry of Environmental Protection
Şu yolla belgeleyin: CEKOR (Center for Ecology and Sustainable Geliştirmekment)
Report through EPS (Elektroprivreda Srbije) channels
EPS (Elektroprivreda Srbije): Geliştirmek lignite phase-out roadmap
Yatırım yapmak solar and wind capacity
Plan just transition for Kolubara madencilik basin communities
AERS (Energy Agency): Reform yapmak tariffs to reflect çevresel costs
Ministry of Mining and Energy: Benimsemek Energy Community Decarbonization Roadmap
Energy Community Secretariat: Uygulatmak compliance
Temsilcinizle iletişime geçin: Narodni poslanik in the Narodna skupština (250 members) talep etmek için a coal phase-out timeline
Support EU accession çevresel chapter benchmarks
Şu yolla savunuculuk yapın: Energy Community for binding decarbonization targets
Şunu talep edin: EU Just Transition Fund pre-accession support
i: Ministry of Environmental Protection — çevre otoritesi. CEKOR — Serbian çevresel NGO. RES Foundation — yenilenebilir enerji advocacy.
EPS (Elektroprivreda Srbije) — state electricity utility operating Nikola Tesla A (1650 MW) and B (1240 MW) lignite plants. Kolubara madencilik basin — supplies lignite to these plants.
AERS (Agencija za energetiku Republike Srbije) — enerji düzenleyicisi. Serbia is an Energy Community Treaty member, requiring alignment with EU energy acquis.
Narodna skupština (National Assembly) — unicameral, 250 members. AB adayı country since 2012. Energy Community Treaty member.

RU.s: Major hydrocarbon ekonomi ($2,173.8B GSYİH). Petrol rantları 9.67%, gas rents 5.86%, coal 0.61%, madencilik 2.05% GSYİH. World's largest gas exporter, second-largest oil exporter. Askeri harcamalar 7.05% GSYİH. Authoritarian governance under international yaptırımlar since 2022.

sectors.w: Russia's oil and gas revenues have been severely constrained by Western yaptırımlar and price caps since 2022. Buyer diversification (EU pivot away from Russian gas) is actively breaking the örtüşen çıkar.
bp: Buyer diversification already underway. EU reduced Russian gas imports from ~40% to ~15% of supply. Ne zaman importers eliminate dependence, örtüşen çıkar Russian fossil fuels breaks.
Sanctions-enforced şeffaflık — G7 price cap mechanism requires attestation of pricing. This partially makes W computable, though enforcement gaps remain.
Kırılamaz. Hydrocarbon combustion releases CO₂ regardless of source.
a: Report through international channels (Bellona Foundation, Global Witness)
Provide data to yaptırımlar enforcement authorities
Şu yolla belgeleyin: investigative journalism networks (iStories, Novaya Gazeta Europe)
International oil companies that exited Russia: Maintain divestment
Shipping companies: Comply with price cap attestation requirements
Insurance companies: Uygulatmak yaptırımlar compliance on Russian oil cargoes
G7 price cap coalition: Güçlendirmek enforcement against evasion
EU: Close yaptırımlar loopholes on refined products
IMO (International Maritime Organization): Address dark fleet safety risks
Support and strengthen international yaptırımlar on Russian fossil fuel revenues
Advocate for G7 price cap enforcement strengthening
Şunu talep edin: addressing Russia's shadow fleet çevresel risks in Arctic and Baltic
Support EU energy diversification to permanently reduce Russian gas dependence
i: Note: Russia's domestic sivil toplum is severely repressed. Bellona Foundation (Norway-based) — documents Russian çevresel issues. iStories, Novaya Gazeta Europe — independent Russian media operating from exile.
Gazprom — state gas monopoly. Rosneft — state oil company. Most Western majors (Shell, BP, ExxonMobil) have exited Russian operations since 2022.
G7 Russian Oil Price Cap Coalition — enforces $60/barrel cap through insurance and shipping services. EU yaptırımlar packages (14+ rounds). OFAC (US), OFSI (UK) — yaptırımlar enforcement.

Note: Russia's Federal Assembly (Federalnoye Sobraniye — State Duma 450 members, Federation Council 170 members) does not function as an independent legislature. International channels: G7/G20 (Russia suspended from G8), UN General Assembly, international yaptırımlar coalitions.

RW.s: Small East African ekonomi ($14.3B GSYİH). Tarım 24.6% GSYİH. Orman rantları 3.97%. Hizmetler 47.6%. Remarkable post-genocide development but otoriter governance. Strong çevresel policy (plastic bag ban pioneer).

sectors.w: Rwanda's hillside agriculture on steep terrain causes erosion and toprak bozulması. Ne zaman soil erosion data is linked to agricultural output per district, W hesaplanabilir hale gelir.
bp: Terracing and agroforestry expansion. Rwanda already has extensive terracing programs — extending to all cultivated hillsides with measurable soil retention targets breaks the örtüşen çıkar.
Per-district soil erosion monitoring linked to agricultural productivity data. Rwanda's strong data infrastructure supports this. W'yi hesaplanabilir kılar.
Kısmen kırılabilir. Hillside cultivation on steep slopes inherently risks erosion. Terracing and contour farming reduce but cannot eliminate sistem bağımlılığı.
a: Şuraya bildirin: REMA (Rwanda Environment Management Authority)
Şu yolla belgeleyin: RAB (Rwanda Agriculture and Animal Resources Geliştirmekment Board)
Report through district agronomist offices
Agricultural cooperatives: Benimsemek terracing and cover cropping standards
Coffee and tea exporters: Require sustainable hillside cultivation practices
NAEB (National Agricultural Export Geliştirmekment Board): Integrate soil health into export quality standards
MINAGRI (Ministry of Agriculture): Expand terracing programs to all cultivated slopes
REMA: Uygulatmak hillside protection zones
RLMUA (Rwanda Land Management and Use Authority): Integrate erosion data into land management
Engage through available parlamenter channels — note that Rwanda's legislature has limited independence from the executive
Support Great Lakes çevresel cooperation through ICGLR (International Conference on the Great Lakes Region)
Advocate for climate adaptation funding for hillside agriculture through Green Climate Fund
Support African Union çevresel governance frameworks
i: REMA — the çevresel management authority. RAB — agricultural research and extension. Rwanda has strong institutional capacity relative to income level.
NAEB — manages agricultural export promotion (coffee, tea, pyrethrum). Rwanda's agricultural sector is organized through cooperatives and imihigo (performance contracts).
MINAGRI — agriculture ministry. RLMUA — land use authority. Rwanda's Vision 2050 includes çevresel sustainability targets.

Inteko Ishinga Amategeko (Parliament) — bicameral: Chamber of Deputies (80 members) and Senate (26 members). Note: Rwanda is effectively a one-party dominant state under RPF (Rwandan Patriotic Front). International channels: EAC (East African Community), AU, ICGLR.

SD.s: Conflict-affected ekonomi ($49.7B GSYİH). Tarım 22.2% GSYİH. Mining 6.63% (gold). Petrol rantları 3.3% (reduced after South Sudan's independence). Civil war since April 2023 between SAF and RSF. Humanitarian catastrophe.

sectors.w: Sudan's artisanal gold madencilik uses mercury extensively and generates revenue streams funding armed groups. Ne zaman gold revenue flows are traced, W hesaplanabilir hale gelir.
bp: International supply chain due diligence blocking conflict gold. Ne zaman refiners verify provenance, the örtüşen çıkar between armed groups and gold revenues zayıflar.
Tracing gold flows from artisanal mines to international markets. LBMA (London Bullion Market Association) responsible sourcing standards provide the framework. W'yi hesaplanabilir kılar.
Kısmen kırılabilir. Artisanal madencilik uses mercury (Minamata Convention violation). Mercury-free processing methods exist but require investment.
a: Report through international monitoring organizations (UN Panel of Experts on Sudan)
Şu yolla belgeleyin: INGO networks (Global Witness, IPIS)
Provide data to LBMA on gold provenance
International gold refiners: Uygulamak enhanced due diligence on Sudanese gold
UAE gold traders: Apply LBMA responsible sourcing for Sudan-origin gold
Insurance and logistics companies: Screen for conflict-linked gold shipments
LBMA: Add Sudan to high-risk origin list
UAE authorities: Enhance customs screening for Sudanese gold
International yaptırımlar bodies: Target RSF gold revenue streams
Support UN Security Council yaptırımlar on conflict gold flows
Advocate for enhanced LBMA responsible sourcing enforcement
Şunu talep edin: UAE cooperation on gold trade şeffaflık
Support Minamata Convention enforcement on mercury in artisanal madencilik
i: Note: Sudan is in active civil war. No functioning domestic oversight exists. UN Panel of Experts — monitors yaptırımlar and conflict dynamics. IPIS (International Peace Information Service) — tracks artisanal madencilik and conflict resources.
Sudan's gold primarily flows through UAE (Dubai) trading hubs. LBMA — sets responsible sourcing standards for gold refiners worldwide.
LBMA — London Bullion Market Association, responsible sourcing standard-setter. FATF (Financial Action Task Force) — can designate jurisdictions for gold laundering risks.

Note: Sudan's transitional government collapsed with the April 2023 war. No functioning legislature. International channels: UN Security Council, AU (African Union Peace and Security Council), IGAD (Intergovernmental Authority on Geliştirmekment).

SE.s: Advanced Nordic ekonomi ($603.7B GSYİH). İmalat 13% GSYİH. Mining 1% GSYİH (iron ore — LKAB is Europe's largest). Hizmetler 66.4%. Strong çevresel regulations. AB üyesi. Leading in green steel transition (HYBRIT).

sectors.w: Sweden's iron ore madencilik (LKAB) in northern Sweden affects Sami reindeer herding land and generates tailings. Ne zaman maden başına çevresel and indigenous impact data is published alongside production, W hesaplanabilir hale gelir.
bp: Full internalization of indigenous land-use costs and çevresel remediation. Ne zaman LKAB pays for herding disruption and tailings management, örtüşen çıkar low-cost extraction zayıflar.
Per-mine çevresel disclosure including impacts on Sami land use. LKAB publishes sustainability reports — extending to independently verified indigenous impact assessments makes W computable.

Kısmen kırılabilir. HYBRIT (Hydrogen Breakthrough Ironmaking Technology) — SSAB/LKAB/Vattenfall joint venture — is producing fossil-free steel, demonstrating that madencilik's downstream sistem bağımlılığı on carbon-intensive processing can be broken.
a: Şuraya bildirin: Naturvårdsverket (Swedish Environmental Protection Agency)
Şuraya bildirin: Bergsstaten (Mining Inspectorate of Sweden)
Şu yolla belgeleyin: Sametinget (Sami Parliament) channels
LKAB: Accelerate HYBRIT fossil-free iron and steel
SSAB: Scale fossil-free steel production
Boliden: Uygulamak enhanced tailings management and water recycling
Bergsstaten: Güçlendirmek çevresel conditions in madencilik permits
Mark- och miljödomstolarna (Land and Environment Courts): Apply rigorous çevresel review
SGU: Integrate indigenous land-use data into madencilik assessments
Temsilcinizle iletişime geçin: Riksdagsledamot in the Riksdag (349 members) talep etmek için indigenous consent requirements in madencilik permits
Şu yolla savunuculuk yapın: EU Critical Raw Materials Act for çevresel and indigenous rights safeguards
Support Nordic Council cooperation on Sami rights across borders
Şunu talep edin: EU taxonomy alignment of madencilik çevresel standards
i: Naturvårdsverket — çevresel protection agency. Bergsstaten — the madencilik inspectorate, part of SGU (Sveriges geologiska undersökning — Geological Survey of Sweden). Sametinget — the Sami Parliament, representing indigenous Sami rights.

LKAB — devlete ait iron ore company, Europe's largest. SSAB — steel producer, partner in HYBRIT. Boliden — base metals madencilik and smelting company. HYBRIT — world's first fossil-free steel initiative.
Mark- och miljödomstolarna — specialized çevresel courts. Sweden's Minerals Act (Minerallagen) governs madencilik permits.
Riksdag — unicameral parliament, 349 members. Contact through riksdagen.se. Sweden is a anayasal monarşi and AB üyesi.

SG.s: Advanced city-state ekonomi ($547.4B GSYİH). Hizmetler 73% GSYİH. İmalat 16.3% (electronics, petrochemicals). No natural resources. Major petrochemical refining hub and global financial center. World's busiest transshipment port.

sectors.w: Singapore is a major petrochemical refining and trading hub — the 'Houston of Asia.' Ne zaman refinery emisyonlar and fossil fuel trading flows are disclosed per facility, W hesaplanabilir hale gelir.
bp: Carbon tax escalation (Singapore's karbon vergisi rises to S$25/tCO₂ in 2024, S$45 in 2026, S$50-80 by 2030). Ne zaman refining margins incorporate carbon costs, örtüşen çıkar unpriced emisyonlar zayıflar.
Per-refinery emisyonlar and trade-flow disclosure. MAS (Monetary Authority of Singapore) climate disclosure requirements extend to financial flows. W'yi hesaplanabilir kılar.
Kısmen kırılabilir. Petrochemical refining inherently emits. However, Singapore's investment in sustainable aviation fuel and green hydrogen can reduce sistem bağımlılığı over time.
a: Şuraya bildirin: NEA (National Environment Agency)
Report through MAS ihbarcı channels for financial misconduct
Şu yolla belgeleyin: SGX (Singapore Exchange) disclosure requirements
Shell, ExxonMobil (Jurong Island): Uygulamak carbon capture at refineries
Banks (DBS, OCBC, UOB): Apply coal financing phase-out policies
Petrochemical companies: Yatırım yapmak green hydrogen and sustainable feedstocks
NEA: Accelerate karbon vergisi escalation timeline
MAS: Güçlendirmek climate-related financial disclosure (TCFD alignment)
EMA (Energy Market Authority): Mandate yenilenebilir enerji targets
Engage through available parlamenter channels — Members of Parliament (93 elected, up to 12 non-constituency/nominated)
Support ASEAN çevresel cooperation frameworks
Şu yolla savunuculuk yapın: Singapore's Green Finance Action Plan for regional decarbonization
Şunu talep edin: IMO shipping emisyonlar standards (Singapore is world's largest bunkering port)
i: NEA (National Environment Agency) — çevresel regulator. MAS (Monetary Authority of Singapore) — financial regulator with expanding climate disclosure mandate. SGX — Singapore Exchange, requires climate reporting.
Jurong Island — Singapore's petrochemical hub hosting Shell, ExxonMobil, and other major refineries. DBS, OCBC, UOB — Singapore's three major banks with significant fossil fuel financing exposure.
EMA (Energy Market Authority) — enerji düzenleyicisi. Singapore Green Plan 2030 — national sustainability framework. Carbon tax administered by NEA under Carbon Pricing Act.

Parliament of Singapore — unicameral. Singapore is a parlamenter republic with dominant-party governance (PAP — People's Action Party). Note: limited political pluralism in practice. International channels: ASEAN (founding member), IMO, UNFCCC.

SI.s: Small AB üyesi ekonomi ($73B GSYİH). İmalat 19.4% GSYİH. Hizmetler 57.9%. Significant forest cover (60%+ of territory). AB üyesi since 2004. Former Yugoslav republic with strong çevresel awareness.

sectors.w: Slovenia's intensive agriculture in lowland areas (Pomurje, Podravje) relies on monoculture grain and livestock. Ne zaman soil and water quality data is linked to CAP payments, W hesaplanabilir hale gelir.
bp: EU CAP eco-scheme implementation. Ne zaman subsidy payments require biodiversity and soil health measures, örtüşen çıkar exhaustive monoculture zayıflar.
Per-farm soil and water quality monitoring through ARSKTRP (Agency for Agricultural Markets and Rural Geliştirmekment). W'yi hesaplanabilir kılar.
