Kısmen kırılabilir. Grain monoculture and intensive livestock farming degrade soil and pollute groundwater. Organic farming and crop rotation reduce dependence — Slovenia already has 11%+ organic farming share.
a: Şuraya bildirin: ARSO (Agencija Republike Slovenije za okolje — Environment Agency)
Şuraya bildirin: Inšpektorat za kmetijstvo (Agricultural Inspectorate)
Şu yolla belgeleyin: Slovenian çevresel organizations (Focus, Umanotera)
Agricultural cooperatives: Benimsemek organic and integrated farming practices
Dairy industry: Uygulamak manure management standards
Food processors: Source from diversified farming operations
Ministry of Agriculture: Güçlendirmek CAP eco-scheme implementation
ARSO: Uygulatmak nitrate directive compliance
ARSKTRP: Condition payments on biodiversity measures
Temsilcinizle iletişime geçin: Poslanec in the Državni zbor (90 members) talep etmek için stronger CAP eco-scheme implementation
Support EU Farm to Fork Strategy implementation
Şu yolla savunuculuk yapın: Alpine Convention for sustainable mountain agriculture
i: ARSO — the Environment Agency of Slovenia. Umanotera — Slovenian Foundation for Sustainable Geliştirmekment. Focus — çevresel NGO.
Slovenia's agricultural sector is dominated by small family farms (average 7 hectares). Kmetijsko gozdarska zbornica (Chamber of Agriculture and Forestry) — industry association.
ARSKTRP (Agencija za kmetijske trge in razvoj podeželja) — manages CAP payments. Ministry of Agriculture, Forestry and Food — policy ministry.
Državni zbor (National Assembly) — 90 members. Državni svet (National Council) — 40 members, advisory role. AB üyesi since 2004. Alpine Convention member. Contact through dz-rs.si.

SK.s: Central European AB üyesi ($140.9B GSYİH). İmalat 16.3% GSYİH — heavily auto-dependent (Volkswagen, Kia, Stellantis). Hizmetler 60%. AB üyesi since 2004. World's largest per-capita car producer.

sectors.w: Slovakia's food processing industry produces significant ultra-processed food for regional markets. Ne zaman per-product health impact data (obesity, diabetes correlations) is disclosed alongside marketing spend, W hesaplanabilir hale gelir.
bp: EU front-of-pack labeling (Nutri-Score or equivalent). Ne zaman consumers can identify ultra-processing, örtüşen çıkar opaque ingredient lists zayıflar.
Mandatory per-product health impact disclosure. Slovakia has rising obesity rates (20%+). Linking UPF consumption data to health outcomes makes W computable.
Kırılamaz. Ultra-processing by definition strips nutritional value and adds synthetic additives.
a: Şuraya bildirin: ŠVPS (Štátna veterinárna a potravinová správa — State Veterinary and Food Administration)
Şuraya bildirin: ÚVZ SR (Úrad verejného zdravotníctva — Public Health Authority)
Şu yolla belgeleyin: consumer protection organizations
Food processors: Reform yapmakulate to reduce ultra-processing
Retailers (Lidl, Kaufland, Tesco): Benimsemek front-of-pack labeling
Advertisers: Restrict UPF marketing to children
Ministry of Health: Uygulamak front-of-pack nutrition labeling
ŠVPS: Güçlendirmek food composition standards
Ministry of Agriculture: Support local food production incentives
Temsilcinizle iletişime geçin: Poslanec in the Národná rada (150 members) talep etmek için mandatory front-of-pack labeling
Support EU Farm to Fork Strategy UPF reduction targets
Şu yolla savunuculuk yapın: WHO Europe for ultra-processed food regulation
i: ŠVPS — the food safety authority. ÚVZ SR — public health authority monitoring dietary health outcomes.
Slovakia's food retail is dominated by international chains (Lidl, Kaufland, Tesco, Billa). Slovenská poľnohospodárska a potravinárska komora — food industry chamber.
Ministry of Health — oversees dietary health policy. Ministry of Agriculture and Rural Geliştirmekment — food production policy.
Národná rada Slovenskej republiky (National Council) — unicameral, 150 members. AB üyesi since 2004. Contact through nrsr.sk.

SN.s: West African ekonomi ($32.8B GSYİH). Tarım 16.6% GSYİH. Mining 2.9% (phosphates, gold, zircon). Offshore oil and gas discoveries (Sangomar field — first oil expected). Balıkçılık crucial for food security. Democracy with peaceful power transitions.

sectors.w: Senegal's fisheries face severe aşırı avlanma by foreign industrial fleets (EU, China) competing with artisanal pirogues. Ne zaman per-vessel catch data is published alongside stock assessments, W hesaplanabilir hale gelir.
bp: Reform yapmak fishing access agreements to limit foreign industrial fleet catch. Ne zaman EU and Chinese DWF (Distant Water Fleet) quotas reflect stock sustainability, örtüşen çıkar aşırı avlanma zayıflar.
VMS (Vessel Monitoring System) data publication and per-vessel catch reporting. Senegal has invested in MCS (Monitoring, Control and Surveillance). W'yi hesaplanabilir kılar.
Kısmen kırılabilir. Industrial trawling damages benthic habitats. Artisanal fishing with selective gear reduces sistem bağımlılığı.
a: Şuraya bildirin: DPSP (Direction de la Protection et de la Surveillance des Pêches)
Şu yolla belgeleyin: ICSF (International Collective in Support of Fishworkers)
Report IUU (Illegal, Unreported, Unregulated) fishing to CNSP (Centre National de Surveillance des Pêches)
Foreign fishing companies: Comply with Senegalese fishing access terms
Fish processing companies: Benimsemek sustainable sourcing certification (MSC)
Artisanal fishing cooperatives: Support co-management of nearshore zones
Ministry of Balıkçılık: Reform yapmak fishing access agreements with EU and China
CRODT (Centre de Recherches Océanographiques de Dakar-Thiaroye): Publish stock assessments
CSRP (Sub-Regional Balıkçılık Commission): Coordinate regional management
Temsilcinizle iletişime geçin: Député in the Assemblée nationale (165 members) talep etmek için reform of foreign fishing access agreements
Support CSRP regional fisheries management plans
Şu yolla savunuculuk yapın: AU-IBAR for African fisheries sovereignty
Şunu talep edin: RFMO (Regional Balıkçılık Management Organization) quotas reflecting stock sustainability
i: DPSP — fisheries protection directorate. CNSP — national fisheries surveillance center, operates patrol vessels. Senegal has one of West Africa's most developed fisheries monitoring systems.
Senegal's fisheries employ ~600,000 people. Artisanal pirogues (wooden boats) land ~80% of total catch. GAIPES — fish exporters association.
Ministry of Balıkçılık and Maritime Economy. CRODT — oceanographic research center providing stock assessments. CSRP — sub-regional fisheries commission for West Africa.

Assemblée nationale du Sénégal — unicameral, 165 members. Senegal is a presidential republic with a strong democratic tradition (peaceful power transitions in 2000, 2012, 2024). Contact through assemblee-nationale.sn.

SO.s: Fragile state ($12B GSYİH). Limited economic data available. Orman rantları 11.24% GSYİH (charcoal — major ormansızlaşma driver). Charcoal trade linked to Al-Shabaab financing. Ongoing conflict and state fragility.

sectors.w: Somalia's charcoal production devastates acacia forests and finances armed groups. Ne zaman charcoal trade flows are traced and linked to ormansızlaşma data, W hesaplanabilir hale gelir.
bp: UN Security Council charcoal export ban enforcement (Resolution 2036). Ne zaman the ban is effectively enforced, the örtüşen çıkar between Al-Shabaab revenue and charcoal trade zayıflar.
Satellite ormansızlaşma monitoring linked to charcoal trade routes. UN Monitoring Group has documented the flows. W'yi hesaplanabilir kılar.
Kırılamaz. Charcoal production from slow-growing acacia in arid Somali climate causes irreversible desertification.
a: Şuraya bildirin: UN Monitoring Group on Somalia and Eritrea
Şu yolla belgeleyin: Somali çevresel organizations where operational
Report charcoal shipments to naval forces (EU NAVFOR, Combined Maritime Forces)
Shipping companies: Screen for Somali charcoal cargoes
Gulf state importers (UAE, Saudi Arabia, Oman): Uygulatmak import bans on Somali charcoal
Alternative energy providers: Yatırım yapmak LPG distribution as charcoal substitute
Federal Government of Somalia: Uygulatmak charcoal export ban
Gulf state customs: Screen for Somali charcoal imports
UN SEMG: Güçlendirmek monitoring of charcoal trade networks
Support UN Security Council charcoal ban enforcement
Advocate for Gulf state cooperation on import screening
Şunu talep edin: alternative livelihoods funding through UN Somalia programs
Support Somali Disaster Resilience Institute çevresel programs
i: UN Monitoring Group on Somalia and Eritrea — monitors yaptırımlar including the charcoal ban. EU NAVFOR (Operation Atalanta) — maritime security operation. Note: domestic institutional capacity is extremely limited.
Somali charcoal is primarily exported to Gulf states via dhow networks. UAE has been the largest market. Some companies are promoting LPG as an alternative cooking fuel.
Federal Government of Somalia — limited authority outside Mogadishu. Federal Member States have varying governance capacity. UN yaptırımlar framework provides the primary regulatory tool.

Federal Parliament of Somalia — bicameral: House of the People (275 members) and Upper House (54 members). Note: clan-based indirect elections, limited institutional capacity. International channels: UN, AU (ATMIS — AU Transition Mission in Somalia), IGAD.

SV.s: Small Central American ekonomi ($35.4B GSYİH). Hizmetler 61% GSYİH. Tarım 4.4%. İmalat 12%. Significant remittance dependence (~24% of GSYİH). Bitcoin adopted as legal tender (2021). State of exception since 2022.

sectors.w: El Salvador's sugarcane monoculture in coastal lowlands is linked to chronic kidney disease of unknown etiology (CKDu) among agricultural workers — one of the highest rates globally. Ne zaman CKDu data is linked to agrochemical exposure per farm, W hesaplanabilir hale gelir.
bp: Agrochemical regulation and worker health monitoring. Ne zaman sugarcane operations internalize CKDu health costs, örtüşen çıkar unregulated pesticide/herbicide use zayıflar.
Per-farm agrochemical use and worker health outcome data. El Salvador has the world's highest CKDu mortality. Linking these datasets makes W computable.
Kısmen kırılabilir. Sugarcane monoculture depletes soils and concentrates agrochemical exposure. Crop diversification and organic practices reduce sistem bağımlılığı.
a: Şuraya bildirin: MARN (Ministerio de Medio Ambiente y Recursos Naturales)
Document worker health impacts through ISSS (Instituto Salvadoreño del Seguro Social)
Şuraya bildirin: MAG (Ministerio de Agricultura y Ganadería)
Sugar mills (ingenios): Uygulamak worker heat stress and agrochemical exposure protocols
Benimsemek mechanized harvesting to reduce worker field exposure
Yatırım yapmak worker kidney screening programs
Ministry of Health: Establish CKDu surveillance and prevention program
MARN: Regulate agrochemical use in sugarcane production
MAG: Support crop diversification away from monoculture sugarcane
Engage through available legislative channels — Asamblea Legislativa (84 members); note concentrated executive power under current governance
Support SICA (Central American Integration System) regional CKDu response
Şu yolla savunuculuk yapın: PAHO/WHO for CKDu research and prevention funding
Şunu talep edin: ILO conventions on agricultural worker health protection
i: MARN — Ministry of Environment and Natural Resources. ISSS — social security institute. MAG — agriculture ministry. La Isla Network — international NGO documenting CKDu in Central America.
El Salvador's sugar industry is concentrated among a few large ingenios (sugar mills). CAMAGRO (Cámara Agropecuaria y Agroindustrial) — agricultural industry chamber.
Ministry of Health — responsible for CKDu response. MARN — çevresel regulation.
Asamblea Legislativa — unicameral, 84 members. Note: since 2021, executive dominance over legislature; limited separation of powers in practice. International channels: SICA, PAHO, ILO.

SY.s: War-devastated ekonomi ($23.6B GSYİH). Tarım 43.1% GSYİH — unusually high due to industrial collapse. Petrol rantları 4.02%, gas 2.33%. Civil war since 2011 has destroyed infrastructure. Ongoing political transition (2024-2025).

sectors.w: Syria's oil infrastructure has been contested between factions (SDF/AANES controls northeastern fields, former regime controlled refineries). Ne zaman oil revenue flows are transparently traced through reconstruction, W hesaplanabilir hale gelir.
bp: Post-conflict transparent governance of oil revenues. Ne zaman reconstruction frameworks require accountable revenue management, örtüşen çıkar opaque extraction zayıflar.
Oil revenue flow şeffaflık as condition of reconstruction assistance and yaptırımlar relief. W'yi hesaplanabilir kılar.
Kısmen kırılabilir. Oil infrastructure has been extensively damaged — reconstruction offers opportunity to build in çevresel standards.
a: Report through international monitoring organizations
Document çevresel damage from conflict-era oil infrastructure destruction
Report through UN OCHA coordination mechanisms
International reconstruction companies: Benimsemek çevresel standards in oil infrastructure rebuilding
Apply conflict-sensitivity to investment decisions
Require transparent revenue sharing in any production agreements
Transitional governance: Establish transparent hydrocarbon revenue management
International community: Condition reconstruction support on çevresel and governance standards
EITI: Support Syrian membership as part of governance transition
Support international frameworks conditioning reconstruction assistance on transparent resource governance
Şu yolla savunuculuk yapın: UN-led political process for resource revenue şeffaflık
Şunu talep edin: çevresel damage assessment and remediation in reconstruction plans
Support EITI membership for post-transition Syria
i: Note: Syria is in post-conflict transition. Institutional capacity is severely degraded. Multiple governance structures operate in different regions.
Pre-war: Syrian Petroleum Company (state oil company). Current: fragmented control over oil infrastructure.
Regulatory capacity must be rebuilt as part of political transition.

Note: Syria is undergoing political transition following the fall of the Assad regime (late 2024). New governance structures are forming. International channels: UN (Security Council, Special Envoy), Arab League (membership restored 2023), reconstruction donor conferences.

TD.s: Sahelian ekonomi ($19.5B GSYİH). Petrol rantları 16.75% GSYİH. Tarım 37.7%. Orman rantları 4.58%. One of the world's poorest countries. Military transitional government. Lake Chad shrinking (~90% since 1960s).

sectors.w: Chad's oil revenues flow through an opaque pipeline (Doba basin to Kribi, Cameroon). The World Bank's original revenue şeffaflık mechanism (Collège de Contrôle) was dismantled. Ne zaman oil revenue allocation is made transparent, W hesaplanabilir hale gelir.
bp: Restore oil revenue şeffaflık mechanisms. The World Bank's original Chad-Cameroon pipeline project required transparent revenue allocation — this was dismantled. Rebuilding it breaks örtüşen çıkar opaque revenue flows.
Oil revenue flow disclosure through EITI. Chad was suspended from EITI in 2023 for governance failures. Restoring compliance makes W computable.
Kısmen kırılabilir. Oil production in arid Sahel strains water resources. However, the Doba basin fields are maturing and production declining.
a: Report through international oil company channels (CNPC has major presence)
Şu yolla belgeleyin: international NGOs (Publish What You Pay, SWISSAID)
Şuraya bildirin: international financial institutions
CNPC (China National Petroleum Corporation): Uygulamak çevresel and şeffaflık standards
Savannah Energy: Benimsemek EITI-aligned reporting
Pipeline operators: Publish transport revenue data
SHT (Société des Hydrocarbures du Tchad): Restore revenue şeffaflık
Ministry of Petroleum: Uygulatmak çevresel regulations
EITI: Support Chad's path to reinstatement
Support international pressure for oil revenue şeffaflık
Şu yolla savunuculuk yapın: African Union for governance reform and return to constitutional order
Şunu talep edin: World Bank re-engagement on revenue management conditionality
Support Lake Chad Basin Commission çevresel programs
i: Note: Chad's sivil toplum space is severely restricted. Publish What You Pay — international revenue şeffaflık coalition. SWISSAID — has worked on Chad extractives governance.

CNPC — operates major oil fields after acquiring former ExxonMobil assets. Savannah Energy — British company that acquired former Chevron assets. Chad-Cameroon pipeline — 1,070 km pipeline to Atlantic coast.
SHT — state oil company. Ministry of Petroleum, Mines and Energy — oversees hydrocarbons. Chad was suspended from EITI in 2023.

Note: Military transitional government (Conseil Militaire de Transition, succeeded by elected government of Mahamat Déby, 2024). Conseil National de Transition — 93 members, appointed. International channels: AU, Lake Chad Basin Commission, CEMAC.

TG.s: Small West African ekonomi ($10.7B GSYİH). Tarım 21.3% GSYİH. Mining 4.88% (phosphates — world's 5th largest producer). Hizmetler 49.2%. Key transit port (Lomé). Governance concerns with limited political competition.

sectors.w: Togo's phosphate madencilik (SNPT — Société Nouvelle des Phosphates du Togo) generates cadmium-contaminated waste. Ne zaman maden başına çevresel data is published, W hesaplanabilir hale gelir.
bp: International cadmium standards in phosphate products. Ne zaman export markets require cadmium limits, örtüşen çıkar unprocessed phosphate extraction zayıflar.
Per-mine çevresel monitoring data including cadmium levels, water contamination, and land rehabilitation. W'yi hesaplanabilir kılar.
Kısmen kırılabilir. Phosphate rock contains cadmium. Cadmium removal technology exists and is commercially viable.
a: Şuraya bildirin: ANGE (Agence Nationale de Gestion de l'Environnement)
Şu yolla belgeleyin: community organizations in phosphate madencilik regions (Hahotoé-Kpogamé)
Report through ITIE-Togo (EITI Togo) channels
SNPT: Yatırım yapmak cadmium removal technology
Uygulamak mine rehabilitation for exhausted areas
Benimsemek international çevresel reporting standards
Ministry of Mines: Güçlendirmek çevresel conditions in madencilik permits
ANGE: Uygulatmak çevresel impact assessment requirements
ITIE-Togo: Expand to çevresel data disclosure
Engage through available parlamenter channels — note limited political pluralism under current governance
Support ECOWAS çevresel governance frameworks
Advocate for Codex Alimentarius cadmium limits in phosphate-derived fertilizers
Şunu talep edin: EITI full membership with çevresel disclosure
i: ANGE — national çevresel management agency. ITIE-Togo — Togo is an EITI candidate country.
SNPT (Société Nouvelle des Phosphates du Togo) — the state phosphate company, privatized then renationalized. Operates mines in the Hahotoé-Kpogamé region.
Ministry of Mines and Energy — madencilik oversight. ANGE — çevresel assessment authority.

Assemblée nationale du Togo — 113 members. Note: Togo has been governed by the Gnassingbé family since 1967; limited political competition. Constitutional change in 2024 shifted to parlamenter system. International channels: ECOWAS, AU, EITI.

TH.s: Major Southeast Asian ekonomi ($526.5B GSYİH). İmalat 24.3% GSYİH (automotive, electronics, food processing). Tarım 8.7%. Hizmetler 59.2%. World's largest rice exporter. Significant petrochemical sector. Constitutional monarchy.

sectors.w: Thailand is a major UPF producer and exporter (CP Group — Charoen Pokphand — is one of Asia's largest food conglomerates). Ne zaman per-product health impact data is linked to marketing and formulation, W hesaplanabilir hale gelir.
bp: Front-of-pack labeling reform. Thailand's existing traffic-light label (GDA) covers some nutrients — extending to ultra-processing indicators zayıflar örtüşen çıkar opaque formulation.
Per-product health outcome correlation data. Thailand's rising obesity and diabetes rates can be linked to UPF consumption patterns. W'yi hesaplanabilir kılar.
Kırılamaz. Ultra-processing by definition strips nutritional value.
a: Şuraya bildirin: Thai FDA (Food and Drug Administration)
Şu yolla belgeleyin: Thai Health Promotion Foundation (ThaiHealth)
Report misleading health claims to OCPB (Office of the Consumer Protection Board)
CP Group (Charoen Pokphand): Reform yapmakulate products to reduce ultra-processing
Thai Union: Benimsemek transparent nutritional labeling
Retailers: Promote shelf placement for whole foods
Thai FDA: Extend labeling to cover ultra-processing indicators
Ministry of Public Health: Güçlendirmek sugar tax and UPF marketing restrictions
ThaiHealth: Fund UPF health impact research
Temsilcinizle iletişime geçin: สมาชิกสภาผู้แทนราษฎร (Member of the House of Representatives, 500 members) talep etmek için UPF labeling reform
Support ASEAN food labeling harmonization
Şu yolla savunuculuk yapın: WHO SEARO for ultra-processed food regulation
Şunu talep edin: Codex Alimentarius UPF classification standards
i: Thai FDA — regulates food safety and labeling. ThaiHealth (สำนักงานกองทุนสนับสนุนการสร้างเสริมสุขภาพ) — independent health promotion agency funded by a 2% surcharge on tobacco and alcohol taxes.
CP Group — one of the world's largest agri-food conglomerates. Thai Union — global seafood company (owner of Chicken of the Sea). Thai Beverage (ThaiBev) — major food and beverage company.
Ministry of Public Health — health policy. Thai FDA — food regulation. Thailand's sugar tax (2017) is one of the region's most progressive.

รัฐสภา (National Assembly) — bicameral: สภาผู้แทนราษฎร (House of Representatives, 500 members) and วุฒิสภา (Senate, 200 members). Thailand is a anayasal monarşi. Recent democratic restoration (2023 elections).

TJ.s: Poorest Central Asian ekonomi ($14.2B GSYİH). Mining 7.09% GSYİH (gold, silver, antimony). Tarım 19.7%. Aluminum smelting (TALCO). Remittance-dependent (~30% of GSYİH from Russia). Authoritarian governance.

sectors.w: Tajikistan's madencilik sector includes artisanal gold madencilik with mercury use and the TALCO aluminum smelter (one of Central Asia's largest polluters). Ne zaman per-facility emisyonlar and çevresel data are published, W hesaplanabilir hale gelir.
bp: International buyer due diligence on Tajik mineral exports. Ne zaman aluminum and gold buyers require çevresel compliance verification, örtüşen çıkar unregulated production zayıflar.
Per-facility çevresel monitoring data. TALCO's fluoride emisyonlar and gold madencilik mercury contamination can be measured and disclosed. W'yi hesaplanabilir kılar.
Kısmen kırılabilir. TALCO smelter emisyonlar can be reduced with modern pot-lining and scrubbing technology. Mercury-free gold processing exists.
a: Report through international partner channels (IFC, EBRD)
Şu yolla belgeleyin: Central Asian çevresel networks
Report through EITI channels (Tajikistan is a candidate country)
TALCO (Tajik Aluminum Company): Yatırım yapmak emisyonlar reduction technology
Gold madencilik companies: Benimsemek mercury-free processing
International buyers: Require çevresel compliance in supply contracts
Committee for Environmental Protection: Güçlendirmek çevresel enforcement
Ministry of Industry: Require TALCO emisyonlar modernization
EITI Tajikistan: Expand to çevresel data
Support international pressure for çevresel standards in Tajik madencilik through EBRD and IFC project conditionality
Şu yolla savunuculuk yapın: OSCE çevresel dimension for monitoring support
Şunu talep edin: Minamata Convention enforcement on mercury in artisanal madencilik
Support EITI candidacy advancement with çevresel disclosure
i: Note: Civil society space in Tajikistan is severely restricted. International channels provide the primary avenue for çevresel reporting. EBRD and IFC have invested in Tajik madencilik.
TALCO — state aluminum company, one of the world's largest smelters. Operates in Tursunzoda (formerly Regar). Gold madencilik includes both industrial and artisanal operations.
Committee for Environmental Protection under the Government — çevresel regulator. Ministry of Industry and New Technologies — industrial oversight.

Majlisi Oli (Parliament) — bicameral: Majlisi Namoyandagon (lower, 63 members) and Majlisi Milli (upper, 33 members). Note: effectively tek parti devleti (PDPT). International channels: OSCE, SCO, EITI.

TM.s: Gas-dependent closed ekonomi ($51.4B GSYİH). İmalat 18% GSYİH. One of the world's most otoriter states. Massive gas reserves (Galkynysh — world's 2nd largest gas field). Data extremely limited — World Bank reports zeros for many indicators due to government opacity.

sectors.w: Turkmenistan is one of the world's largest methane emitters — satellite monitoring (Sentinel-5P, MethaneSAT) has revealed massive methane leaks from gas infrastructure. Ne zaman methane data is published, W hesaplanabilir hale gelir despite government opacity.
bp: Satellite-based methane monitoring bypasses government opacity. Ne zaman buyers (China — CNPC pipeline) face pressure to account for upstream methane, örtüşen çıkar unmonitored gas production zayıflar.
Satellite methane emission monitoring (UNEP's IMEO — International Methane Emissions Observatory — has flagged Turkmenistan). W'yi hesaplanabilir kılar without government cooperation.
Kırılamaz. Gas production and transport inherently leak methane, a greenhouse gas 80× more potent than CO₂ over 20 years.
a: Report through international channels only — no domestic sivil toplum exists
Provide data to UNEP IMEO or satellite monitoring organizations
Şu yolla belgeleyin: Crude Accountability or Turkmen.news (exile media)
CNPC (Central Asia-China gas pipeline): Account for upstream methane in lifecycle emisyonlar
International engineering firms: Include methane mitigation in infrastructure contracts
Buyers: Apply methane intensity standards to Turkmen gas
UNEP IMEO: Continue satellite monitoring and public reporting
Global Methane Pledge signatories: Press for engagement with Turkmenistan
IEA: Include Turkmenistan in methane tracker reports
Support satellite-based methane monitoring that bypasses government opacity
Şu yolla savunuculuk yapın: UNEP for Turkmenistan's engagement with the Global Methane Pledge
Şunu talep edin: methane intensity standards in international gas trade
Support OSCE and UN human rights mechanisms for governance reform
i: Note: Turkmenistan is one of the world's most closed societies. No independent sivil toplum, media, or judiciary exists. Crude Accountability — international NGO documenting çevresel issues in the Caspian region. Turkmen.news — exile media.
Türkmengaz — state gas company. Türkmennebit — state oil company. CNPC — operates the Central Asia-China gas pipeline (Turkmenistan is the primary source). No independent corporate governance exists.
No independent domestic regulation exists. International monitoring provides the only oversight: UNEP IMEO, IEA Methane Tracker, satellite platforms (MethaneSAT, Sentinel-5P).

Mejlis (Parliament) — 125 members. Turkmenistan is an otoriter state — the legislature has no independent function. International channels: UN (UNEP, OHCHR), OSCE, CIS. Turkmenistan maintains permanent neutrality status (UN-recognized since 1995).

TN.s: North African ekonomi ($51.3B GSYİH). Tarım 9.7% GSYİH. Petrol rantları 1.55%. İmalat 14.8%. Hizmetler 62.6%. Birthplace of the Arab Spring (2011). Governance backsliding since 2021 presidential power consolidation.

sectors.w: Tunisia's oil and gas production is modest but state oil company ETAP's revenue flows lack şeffaflık. Ne zaman saha başına çevresel and revenue data is published, W hesaplanabilir hale gelir.
bp: EITI-aligned revenue şeffaflık. Tunisia's oil revenues are small relative to GSYİH but significant for the state budget. Transparent allocation breaks örtüşen çıkar opaque revenue management.
Per-field çevresel monitoring and revenue flow disclosure. W'yi hesaplanabilir kılar.
Kısmen kırılabilir. Tunisia's mature fields are declining. Solar energy potential is enormous (Saharan irradiance) and can reduce hydrocarbon dependence.
a: Şuraya bildirin: ANPE (Agence Nationale de Protection de l'Environnement)
Şu yolla belgeleyin: Tunisian çevresel organizations (FTDES — Forum Tunisien pour les Droits Économiques et Sociaux)
Report through ETAP compliance channels
ETAP (Entreprise Tunisienne d'Activités Pétrolières): Benimsemek revenue şeffaflık standards
Yatırım yapmak solar energy transition
International partners (ENI, OMV): Apply home-country ESG standards to Tunisian operations
Ministry of Industry, Mines and Energy: Uygulamak hydrocarbon revenue şeffaflık
ANPE: Güçlendirmek çevresel monitoring at production sites
ANME (Agence Nationale pour la Maîtrise de l'Énergie): Accelerate yenilenebilir enerji targets
Engage through available parlamenter channels — Assemblée des Représentants du Peuple (161 members); note limited legislative independence under current governance
Support EU-Tunisia cooperation on energy transition
Şu yolla savunuculuk yapın: Union for the Mediterranean for yenilenebilir enerji investment
Şunu talep edin: EITI membership as governance şeffaflık measure
i: ANPE — çevresel protection agency. FTDES — Tunisian economic and social rights forum, active on çevresel justice. Tunisia has relatively active sivil toplum despite recent governance concerns.
ETAP — state oil company. ENI (Italy), OMV (Austria) — major international operators in Tunisia. Tunisia's South Energy Transition Program targets renewable expansion.
Ministry of Industry, Mines and Energy — hydrocarbons oversight. ANME — energy efficiency and yenilenebilir enerji agency.

Assemblée des Représentants du Peuple — unicameral, 161 members. Note: since 2021, presidential power consolidation has weakened legislative independence. International channels: Arab League, AU, Union for the Mediterranean.

TR.s: Major middle-income ekonomi ($1,359.1B GSYİH). İmalat 16.8% GSYİH. Hizmetler 57.5%. NATO member. Mining 0.63%. Tarım 5.8%. Significant coal dependence for electricity. G20 member.

sectors.w: Türkiye is expanding coal capacity (including imported coal plants) despite having excellent renewable potential. Ne zaman coal plant health costs are internalized, örtüşen çıkar cheap coal power breaks.
bp: Carbon pricing or coal plant emission standards aligned with EU CBAM (Carbon Border Adjustment Mechanism). Türkiye's EU customs union makes CBAM relevant to industrial exports. Ne zaman coal costs include carbon, renewables are cheaper.
Per-plant emisyonlar and health cost data. Türkiye's coal plants are concentrated near population centers. HEAL and local NGOs have documented health costs. W'yi hesaplanabilir kılar.
Kırılamaz. Coal combustion releases SO₂, PM2.5, mercury, and CO₂.
a: Şuraya bildirin: ÇŞB (Çevre, Şehircilik ve İklim Değişikliği Bakanlığı — Ministry of Environment, Urbanization and Climate Change)
Şu yolla belgeleyin: TEMA Vakfı (Turkish Foundation for Combating Soil Erosion)
Report through Greenpeace Mediterranean Turkey office
EÜAŞ (Elektrik Üretim A.Ş.): Geliştirmek coal phase-out timeline
Private coal operators: Yatırım yapmak renewable alternatives
Industrial companies: Switch to renewable electricity procurement
EPDK (Enerji Piyasası Düzenleme Kurumu — Energy Market Regulatory Authority): Reform yapmak tariffs to reflect çevresel costs
ÇŞB: Uygulamak emission standards aligned with EU IED
EMRA: Support yenilenebilir enerji investment framework
Temsilcinizle iletişime geçin: Milletvekili in the Türkiye Büyük Millet Meclisi (600 members) talep etmek için coal phase-out timeline and health cost accounting
Şu yolla savunuculuk yapın: G20 for coal phase-out commitments
Şunu talep edin: EU CBAM preparation to accelerate industrial decarbonization
Support NATO Green Defence Framework çevresel standards
i: ÇŞB — environment ministry. TEMA Vakfı — major Turkish çevresel NGO focused on soil and forest protection. Greenpeace Mediterranean — active in Türkiye on coal campaigns.
EÜAŞ — state electricity generation company. Significant private coal generation. Türkiye's 2053 net-zero target implies eventual coal phase-out but no timeline exists.
EPDK — energy market regulator. Türkiye ratified the Paris Agreement in 2021. EU Customs Union makes CBAM compliance relevant for Turkish industrial exports.

TBMM (Türkiye Büyük Millet Meclisi — Grand National Assembly) — unicameral, 600 members. Contact through tbmm.gov.tr. Türkiye is a presidential republic, NATO member, G20 member, EU customs union partner.

TT.s: Caribbean energy ekonomi ($25.6B GSYİH). Gaz rantları 5.09%, oil rents 2.71% GSYİH. Major petrochemical and LNG producer (Atlantic LNG). İmalat 14.4%. Hizmetler 59.2%. Parliamentary demokrasi.

sectors.w: Trinidad's petrochemical industry faces maturing gas fields and declining production. As reserves deplete and global LNG competition increases, örtüşen çıkar fossil fuel dependence zayıflar naturally.
bp: Declining natural gas reserves force economic diversification. Ne zaman production costs rise on mature fields, örtüşen çıkar fossil fuel dependence zayıflar as alternative revenue sources become necessary.
Per-facility emisyonlar and çevresel monitoring at Point Lisas industrial estate and Atlantic LNG. W'yi hesaplanabilir kılar.
Kırılamaz. LNG and petrochemical processing emit CO₂ and other pollutants.
a: Şuraya bildirin: EMA (Environmental Management Authority)
Şuraya bildirin: MEEI (Ministry of Energy and Energy Industries)
Şu yolla belgeleyin: Fishermen and Friends of the Sea (çevresel NGO)
NGC (National Gas Company): Geliştirmek gas-to-renewables transition plan
Atlantic LNG: Uygulamak carbon capture at liquefaction facility
Petrochemical companies (Methanex, Nutrien): Reduce process emisyonlar
EMA: Güçlendirmek air quality monitoring around Point Lisas
MEEI: Geliştirmek yenilenebilir enerji framework
RIC (Regulated Industries Commission): Reform yapmak energy pricing
Temsilcinizle iletişime geçin: Member of Parliament in the House of Representatives (41 members) talep etmek için economic diversification and yenilenebilir enerji policy
Support CARICOM energy transition framework
Şu yolla savunuculuk yapın: Alliance of Small Island States (AOSIS) for climate finance
Şunu talep edin: IMO shipping emission standards (Trinidad is a major bunkering port)
i: EMA — the Environmental Management Authority, established under the Environmental Management Act 2000. Fishermen and Friends of the Sea — Trinidad's most active çevresel NGO.
NGC (National Gas Company of Trinidad and Tobago) — state gas company. Atlantic LNG — joint venture (Shell, BP, NGC). Point Lisas Industrial Estate — petrochemical complex.
MEEI — energy ministry. RIC — utilities regulator. Trinidad has extremely low domestic energy prices (subsidized), discouraging efficiency.
Parliament of Trinidad and Tobago — bicameral: House of Representatives (41 members) and Senate (31 members). Parliamentary demokrasi with competitive elections. Contact through ttparliament.org.

TZ.s: East African ekonomi ($78.8B GSYİH). Tarım 23.3% GSYİH. Mining 4.03% (gold, tanzanite — found only in Tanzania). Orman rantları 2.39%. Gas reserves (offshore). Hizmetler 29.6%. Growing ekonomi with improving governance.

sectors.w: Tanzania's gold madencilik (Barrick/Twiga Minerals, AngloGold Ashanti) generates tailings and mercury contamination (artisanal sector). Ne zaman maden başına çevresel data is published alongside revenue, W hesaplanabilir hale gelir.
bp: Mining Act 2017 local content and şeffaflık requirements. Ne zaman enforced alongside çevresel monitoring, örtüşen çıkar opaque extraction zayıflar.
Per-mine çevresel monitoring data through TEITI (Tanzania Extractive Industries Transparency Initiative). W'yi hesaplanabilir kılar.
Kısmen kırılabilir. Mercury-free artisanal madencilik and improved tailings management reduce sistem bağımlılığı.
a: Şuraya bildirin: NEMC (National Environment Management Council)
Şuraya bildirin: Mining Commission
Şu yolla belgeleyin: LEAT (Lawyers' Environmental Action Team)
Twiga Minerals (Barrick/Government JV): Uygulamak international çevresel standards
AngloGold Ashanti (Geita Gold Mine): Benimsemek enhanced tailings management
Tanzanite One: Publish çevresel and community impact data
Mining Commission: Uygulatmak çevresel conditions in madencilik licenses
NEMC: Güçlendirmek çevresel impact assessment requirements
TEITI: Expand to include çevresel data
Temsilcinizle iletişime geçin: Mbunge in the Bunge la Tanzania (393 members) talep etmek için çevresel enforcement in madencilik
Support EITI enhanced reporting with çevresel data
Şu yolla savunuculuk yapın: EAC for regional madencilik çevresel standards
Şunu talep edin: Minamata Convention enforcement on mercury in artisanal madencilik
i: NEMC — çevre otoritesi. Mining Commission — madencilik sector regulator. LEAT — Tanzanian çevresel law NGO. HakiRasilimali (Publish What You Pay Tanzania) — revenue şeffaflık advocacy.

Twiga Minerals — 50/50 joint venture between Barrick Gold and Government of Tanzania (created after 2017 tax dispute). Geita Gold Mine — AngloGold Ashanti operation. STAMICO (State Mining Corporation) — government madencilik entity.
Mining Commission — established under Mining Act 2017. TEITI (Tanzania Extractive Industries Transparency Initiative) — EITI member since 2009.

Bunge la Tanzania (National Assembly) — unicameral, 393 members. Tanzania is a presidential republic with increasing political openness under current administration. Contact through bunge.go.tz. EAC (East African Community) member.

UA.s: War-affected ekonomi ($190.7B GSYİH). Mining 5.32% GSYİH. Askeri harcamalar 34.48% GSYİH (wartime). Tarım 7.1%. Coal 0.34%. AB adayı country (2022). Under Russian invasion since February 2022. Massive çevresel damage from war.

sectors.w: Ukraine's madencilik sector (iron ore, manganese, titanium) has suffered massive çevresel damage from the Russian invasion — flooded mines, destroyed infrastructure, contaminated land. Post-war reconstruction offers opportunity for transparent çevresel standards. Ne zaman reconstruction çevresel data is published, W hesaplanabilir hale gelir.
bp: EU accession conditionality requiring çevresel standards in post-war reconstruction. Ne zaman reconstruction adheres to EU çevresel acquis, örtüşen çıkar rapid but dirty rebuilding zayıflar.
Environmental damage assessment and remediation tracking. Ukraine's Ministry of Environmental Protection is already documenting war damage with international support. W'yi hesaplanabilir kılar.
Kısmen kırılabilir. Mining inherently disturbs landscapes, but post-war reconstruction can implement best-practice tailings management and water treatment from the start.
a: Şuraya bildirin: Derzhekoinspektsiia (State Environmental Inspectorate)
Şu yolla belgeleyin: OSCE çevresel monitoring
Report war-related çevresel damage through Ukraine's Ecodozor platform
Metinvest (Akhmetov): Uygulamak EU-aligned çevresel standards in reconstruction
ArcelorMittal Kryvyi Rih: Apply global çevresel standards
Reconstruction companies: Benimsemek green building and çevresel remediation standards
Ministry of Environmental Protection: Uygulatmak çevresel standards in reconstruction
State Subsoil Service: Reform yapmak madencilik licensing with çevresel conditions
EU pre-accession assistance: Support çevresel governance capacity building
Temsilcinizle iletişime geçin: Narodnyi deputat in the Verkhovna Rada (450 members) talep etmek için çevresel standards in reconstruction legislation
Support Ukraine Recovery Conference çevresel commitments
Şu yolla savunuculuk yapın: EU accession process for çevresel chapter prioritization
Şunu talep edin: international çevresel damage assessment and Russian liability for war-related çevresel destruction
i: Derzhekoinspektsiia — State Environmental Inspectorate. Ministry of Environmental Protection and Natural Resources — documents war-related çevresel damage. Ecodozor — citizen reporting platform.
Metinvest — Ukraine's largest steel and madencilik group (Rinat Akhmetov). ArcelorMittal Kryvyi Rih — major steel producer. Ferrexpo — iron ore pellet producer.
Ministry of Environmental Protection and Natural Resources. State Subsoil Service (Derzhgeonadra) — madencilik licensing. Ukraine's EU candidacy requires çevresel acquis alignment.

Verkhovna Rada — unicameral, 450 members. Contact through rada.gov.ua. AB adayı country since 2022. International channels: EU accession process, Ukraine Recovery Conference, International Criminal Court (çevresel damage documentation).

UG.s: East African ekonomi ($53.9B GSYİH). Tarım 24.6% GSYİH. Orman rantları 7.48% (one of the highest in the dataset). Oil production beginning (Tilenga and Kingfisher projects, EACOP pipeline). Authoritarian governance.

sectors.w: Uganda's new oil projects (TotalEnergies' Tilenga and CNOOC's Kingfisher, plus EACOP — East African Crude Oil Pipeline) face massive international scrutiny. Ne zaman project-level çevresel data is published, W hesaplanabilir hale gelir.
bp: International ESG pressure on project financiers. Ne zaman banks and insurers withdraw from EACOP financing, örtüşen çıkar unscrutinized pipeline construction zayıflar. Several major banks have already declined.
Per-project çevresel impact data for Tilenga (in Murchison Falls National Park), Kingfisher, and EACOP. W'yi hesaplanabilir kılar.
Kırılamaz. Crude oil production and 1,443-km heated pipeline through sensitive ecosystems inherently create çevresel risk.
a: Şuraya bildirin: NEMA (National Environment Management Authority)
Şu yolla belgeleyin: international çevresel organizations (350.org, BankTrack)
Report through TotalEnergies compliance channels
TotalEnergies: Uygulamak comprehensive biodiversity offsets for Tilenga (inside Murchison Falls NP)
CNOOC Uganda: Benimsemek international çevresel standards for Kingfisher
Banks: Apply Equator Principles to EACOP financing decisions
PAU (Petroleum Authority of Uganda): Uygulatmak çevresel conditions in production licenses
NEMA: Güçlendirmek çevresel monitoring of oil projects
MEMD (Ministry of Energy and Mineral Geliştirmekment): Ensure transparent revenue management
Support international ESG pressure on EACOP project financing
Şu yolla savunuculuk yapın: European Parliament for TotalEnergies duty of vigilance enforcement (French Loi de Vigilance)
Şunu talep edin: EITI membership with çevresel disclosure
Support East African Court of Justice jurisdiction on transboundary çevresel issues
i: NEMA — çevre otoritesi. Note: Ugandan çevresel activists have faced government harassment. International channels are safer: 350.org has led the #StopEACOP campaign. BankTrack monitors EACOP financing.

TotalEnergies — operator of Tilenga project and EACOP. CNOOC Uganda — operates Kingfisher project. EACOP (East African Crude Oil Pipeline) — 1,443 km from Hoima to Tanga (Tanzania). UNOC (Uganda National Oil Company) — state oil company.
PAU — petroleum sector regulator. MEMD — energy and mineral development ministry. Uganda's Petroleum Revenue Management policy is under development.

Parliament of Uganda — unicameral, 529 members. Note: Uganda is effectively under one-party dominant governance (NRM). International channels: EAC (East African Community), African Court on Human and Peoples' Rights, European Parliament (regarding EU-headquartered companies like TotalEnergies).

UY.s: Small South American ekonomi ($81B GSYİH). Tarım 6.4% GSYİH. Hizmetler 65.3%. Orman rantları 1.91%. Generates nearly 100% of electricity from renewables (wind, hydro, solar, biomass). Strong demokrasi — one of Latin America's most stable.

sectors.w: Uruguay's soy and eucalyptus monoculture expansion is degrading soils and displacing native grasslands (campos). Ne zaman soil health and biodiversity data is linked to agricultural production per department, W hesaplanabilir hale gelir.
bp: National soil conservation plan enforcement. Uruguay's Ley de Uso y Conservación de Suelos (Soil Use and Conservation Law) requires mandatory soil plans — strengthening enforcement breaks örtüşen çıkar soil-exhaustive monoculture.
Per-farm soil erosion and grassland conversion monitoring. MGAP already requires Plan de Uso y Manejo de Suelos for farms >50 ha. Publishing compliance data makes W computable.
Kısmen kırılabilir. Soy monoculture and eucalyptus plantations degrade native grassland ecosystems. Integrated crop-livestock systems and native grassland preservation reduce sistem bağımlılığı.
a: Şuraya bildirin: DINAMA (Dirección Nacional de Medio Ambiente)
Şuraya bildirin: RENARE (Dirección General de Recursos Naturales Renovables)
Şu yolla belgeleyin: Vida Silvestre Uruguay
Large agricultural companies: Güçlendirmek soil conservation plan compliance
UPM, Montes del Plata (forestry): Maintain native grassland corridors between eucalyptus plantations
Meat exporters: Benimsemek pasture-based certification
MGAP (Ministerio de Ganadería, Agricultura y Pesca): Uygulatmak mandatory soil plans
DINAMA: Güçlendirmek çevresel assessment for land-use change
INIA (Instituto Nacional de Investigación Agropecuaria): Publish soil health monitoring data
Temsilcinizle iletişime geçin: Diputado in the Cámara de Representantes (99 members) or Senador in the Cámara de Senadores (30 members) talep etmek için enforcement of the Soil Conservation Law
Support Mercosur çevresel cooperation frameworks
Advocate for native grassland (campos) conservation in international biodiversity frameworks
Şunu talep edin: soil carbon accounting in climate commitments
i: DINAMA — national environment directorate. RENARE — renewable natural resources directorate under MGAP. Vida Silvestre Uruguay — biodiversity conservation organization.
UPM (Finnish company) — major eucalyptus plantation and pulp mill operator. Montes del Plata (UPM/Arauco) — forestry. Large-scale soy farming often by Brazilian/Argentine operators.
MGAP — agriculture, livestock and fisheries ministry. INIA — national agricultural research institute.
Asamblea General — bicameral: Cámara de Representantes (99 members) and Cámara de Senadores (30 members). Contact through parlamento.gub.uy. Uruguay is one of Latin America's strongest democracies.

UZ.s: Central Asian ekonomi ($115B GSYİH). Gaz rantları 11.04% GSYİH. Mining 8.5% (gold — Muruntau is world's largest open-pit gold mine, uranium). Tarım 18.3%. İmalat 20.2%. Post-Karimov liberalization (since 2016).

sectors.w: Uzbekistan's gas sector (Uzbekneftegaz) consumes most production domestically at heavily subsidized prices, encouraging waste. Ne zaman saha başına production and domestic consumption data is published, W hesaplanabilir hale gelir.
bp: Gas price reform eliminating subsidies that encourage wasteful consumption. Ne zaman domestic gas prices reflect market value, örtüşen çıkar underpriced energy zayıflar.
Per-field production, distribution, and consumption data. Uzbekistan has begun EITI implementation. W'yi hesaplanabilir kılar.
Kısmen kırılabilir. Gas combustion emits CO₂. However, Uzbekistan's enormous solar potential (300+ sunny days/year) can displace gas in electricity generation.
a: Şuraya bildirin: State Committee for Ecology and Environmental Protection
Report through EITI Uzbekistan channels
Şu yolla belgeleyin: international partner organizations
Uzbekneftegaz: Publish saha başına production and çevresel data
Navoi Mining (NMMC): Benimsemek international çevresel standards for gold and uranium madencilik
Reduce methane leakage from gas infrastructure
Ministry of Energy: Uygulamak gas price reform roadmap
Goskomekologiya: Güçlendirmek çevresel enforcement at madencilik and gas facilities
EITI Uzbekistan: Expand to çevresel data disclosure
Engage through Oliy Majlis (parliament) — bicameral: Legislative Chamber (150 members) and Senate (100 members)
Support EITI enhanced reporting with çevresel data
Şu yolla savunuculuk yapın: EBRD and ADB for gas price reform conditionality
Şunu talep edin: Aral Sea çevresel restoration international cooperation
i: State Committee for Ecology and Environmental Protection (Goskomekologiya) — çevresel regulator. EITI Uzbekistan — Uzbekistan became an EITI member in 2021.
Uzbekneftegaz — state gas company. NMMC (Navoi Mining and Metallurgical Company) — operates Muruntau gold mine (world's largest open-pit) and uranium mines. Almalyk MMC — copper and gold madencilik.
Ministry of Energy — energy policy. Goskomekologiya — çevresel regulation. Uzbekistan has been implementing significant economic reforms since 2016.

Oliy Majlis — bicameral: Legislative Chamber (Qonunchilik palatasi, 150 members) and Senate, 100 members. Note: limited political pluralism. International channels: EITI, EBRD, ADB, SCO. Aral Sea çevresel disaster requires international cooperation.

VE.s: Oil-dependent ekonomi in crisis ($119.8B GSYİH — severely contracted from peak). World's largest proven oil reserves. Economic data largely unavailable (World Bank reports zeros for most indicators). Hyperinflation, mass emigration. Authoritarian governance.

sectors.w: Venezuela's oil industry has collapsed from ~3.3M bpd (1990s) to ~700K bpd due to mismanagement, underinvestment, and yaptırımlar. The örtüşen çıkar is already weakened by operational failure.
bp: Production collapse has already weakened the örtüşen çıkar — PDVSA lacks the capital and technical capacity to maintain production. Sanctions further constrain revenue.
Oil revenue şeffaflık is impossible under current governance opacity. However, international yaptırımlar monitoring (OFAC designations) provides partial W computability.
Kırılamaz. Oil extraction and refining emit CO₂. Venezuela's heavy crude (Orinoco Belt) is particularly emisyonlar-intensive to process.
a: Report through international channels (Transparencia Venezuela, PROVEA)
Şu yolla belgeleyin: exile media and research organizations
Provide data to international yaptırımlar enforcement authorities
International oil companies with remaining interests (Chevron, Repsol, ENI): Apply çevresel standards to limited operations
Chevron: Publish per-facility çevresel data for Venezuela operations
Service companies: Maintain çevresel standards in contracted work
OFAC: Maintain yaptırımlar conditionality linked to governance reform
EU: Coordinate yaptırımlar policy
OPEC: Address Venezuela's production reporting şeffaflık
Support international yaptırımlar conditionality requiring democratic governance and çevresel standards
Şu yolla savunuculuk yapın: Lima Group/International Contact Group for governance reform
Şunu talep edin: PDVSA operational and çevresel şeffaflık as condition of yaptırımlar relief
Support post-transition EITI membership planning
i: Note: No independent domestic institutions exist. Transparencia Venezuela — anti-corruption NGO. PROVEA — Venezuelan human rights organization. Operating environment is extremely hostile to sivil toplum.
PDVSA (Petróleos de Venezuela, S.A.) — state oil company, severely degraded operationally. Chevron — received limited US OFAC license to operate. Repsol, ENI — maintain limited presence.

No independent domestic regulation exists. OFAC (Office of Foreign Assets Control, US Treasury) — administers Venezuela yaptırımlar. EU — maintains yaptırımlar. PDVSA is both regulator and operator — no separation exists.

Asamblea Nacional — 277 members. Note: Venezuela's institutions lack independence under current governance. International channels: OAS (Venezuela withdrawn/suspended), International Contact Group, ICC preliminary examination, Lima Group (reduced activity).

VN.s: Fast-growing ekonomi ($476.4B GSYİH). İmalat 24.4% GSYİH. Tarım 11.9%. Kömür rantları 0.38%. Oil 0.67%. Orman rantları 1.07%. Major electronics and textile manufacturing hub. One-party state (Communist Party).

sectors.w: Viet Nam is rapidly expanding coal power capacity despite excellent renewable potential (solar, wind, offshore wind). JETP (Just Energy Transition Partnership) funding ($15.5B pledged) creates leverage to shift the örtüşen çıkar away from coal.
bp: JETP implementation — $15.5B pledged by international partners for coal-to-renewables transition. Ne zaman JETP funding makes renewables cheaper than new coal, örtüşen çıkar coal expansion breaks.
Per-plant emisyonlar and health cost data. Viet Nam's coal plants are concentrated in the north (Quảng Ninh) and south (Bình Thuận). W'yi hesaplanabilir kılar.
Kırılamaz. Coal combustion releases SO₂, PM2.5, and CO₂.
a: Şuraya bildirin: MONRE (Bộ Tài nguyên và Môi trường — Ministry of Natural Resources and Environment)
Şu yolla belgeleyin: VUSTA (Viet Nam Union of Science and Technology Associations)
Report through international development partner channels (World Bank, ADB)
EVN (Electricity of Viet Nam): Accelerate Power Geliştirmekment Plan VIII renewable targets
PVN (PetroVietnam): Yatırım yapmak offshore wind
International manufacturers (Samsung, Intel): Demand renewable electricity procurement options
MOIT (Ministry of Industry and Trade): Uygulamak PDP VIII renewable targets
MONRE: Güçlendirmek emission standards for coal plants
JETP Secretariat: Accelerate disbursement of transition funding
Support JETP implementation monitoring through international partner coordination
Şu yolla savunuculuk yapın: ASEAN for regional energy transition cooperation
Şunu talep edin: JETP şeffaflık and accountability mechanisms
Support World Bank and ADB yenilenebilir enerji financing for Viet Nam
i: MONRE — environment and natural resources ministry. VUSTA — umbrella organization for Vietnamese sivil toplum (within party framework). Note: independent sivil toplum is not permitted in Viet Nam's one-party system.

EVN (Tập đoàn Điện lực Việt Nam) — state electricity utility. PVN (PetroVietnam) — state oil and gas company. TKV (Vinacomin — Tập đoàn Công nghiệp Than - Khoáng sản Việt Nam) — state coal madencilik company.

MOIT — energy and industrial policy. PDP VIII (Power Geliştirmekment Plan VIII, approved 2023) — sets yenilenebilir enerji targets. JETP — Just Energy Transition Partnership ($15.5B pledged by IPG partners including US, EU, UK, Japan).

Quốc hội (National Assembly) — unicameral, 500 members. Viet Nam is a tek parti devleti (Communist Party). JETP International Partners Group provides the primary leverage mechanism. International channels: ASEAN, World Bank, ADB, JETP IPG.

XK.s: Small Western Balkan ekonomi ($11.2B GSYİH). İmalat 12.6%. Kömür rantları 0.38%. Mining 0.55%. Tarım 7.3%. Youngest population in Europe. AB adayı status pending. Two aging lignite plants (Kosovo A and B) supply ~95% of electricity.

sectors.w: Kosovo's near-total dependence on two aging lignite plants (Kosovo A — one of Europe's worst polluters — and Kosovo B) faces EU accession conditionality and enormous health costs.
bp: EU accession pathway requiring IED/LCPD compliance. Kosovo A is scheduled for decommissioning. Ne zaman çevresel compliance costs are applied, new renewables are cheaper than coal retrofit.
Per-plant emisyonlar and health cost data. Kosovo A and B cause severe air pollution in Pristina — among Europe's worst air quality. W'yi hesaplanabilir kılar.
Kırılamaz. Lignite combustion releases SO₂, PM2.5, mercury, and CO₂.
a: Şuraya bildirin: AMMK (Agjencia për Mbrojtjen e Mjedisit të Kosovës — Kosovo Environmental Protection Agency)
Şu yolla belgeleyin: INDEP or GAP Institute (Kosovo think tanks)
Report through KEK compliance channels
KEK (Korporata Energjetike e Kosovës): Plan Kosovo A decommissioning and Kosovo B modernization or replacement
Yatırım yapmak solar and wind capacity
Uygulamak just transition plans for Obiliq/Kastriot madencilik communities
ERO (Energy Regulatory Office): Reform yapmak tariffs to incentivize renewable investment
MMPH (Ministry of Environment): Uygulatmak emission standards
Energy Community Secretariat: Hold Kosovo accountable for compliance
Temsilcinizle iletişime geçin: Deputet in the Kuvendi i Kosovës (120 members) talep etmek için Kosovo A decommissioning timeline and yenilenebilir enerji investment
Support EU integration benchmarks on çevresel standards
Şu yolla savunuculuk yapın: Energy Community for just transition support
Şunu talep edin: World Bank and EBRD financing of yenilenebilir enerji replacement
i: AMMK — çevresel protection agency. INDEP (Institute for Geliştirmekment Policy) — research and advocacy. GAP Institute — Kosovo public policy think tank.
KEK — Kosovo Energy Corporation, devlete ait, operates Kosovo A (5 units, 800 MW, built 1962-1975) and Kosovo B (2 units, 678 MW, built 1983-1984). KOSTT — transmission system operator.
ERO — enerji düzenleyicisi. MMPH (Ministria e Mjedisit, Planifikimit Hapësinor dhe Infrastrukturës) — environment ministry. Kosovo is an Energy Community Treaty member.

Kuvendi i Kosovës (Assembly of Kosovo) — unicameral, 120 members. Contact through kuvendikosoves.org. Kosovo declared independence in 2008 (recognized by ~100 UN members). Energy Community Treaty member.

ZA.s: Largest sub-Saharan ekonomi ($401.1B GSYİH). Kömür rantları 2.44% GSYİH. Mining 3.83% (gold, platinum group metals, chrome, manganese). İmalat 12.8%. Hizmetler 63%. Constitutional demokrasi. Severe electricity crisis (load shedding).

sectors.w: South Africa generates ~80% of electricity from coal (Eskom's aging fleet). JETP funding ($8.5B pledged) and Eskom's operational crisis (load shedding) create dual pressure. Ne zaman coal plant health costs are internalized, the örtüşen çıkar breaks.
bp: JETP implementation and Eskom restructuring. $8.5B pledged for coal-to-renewables transition. Ne zaman renewable IPPs are cheaper and more reliable than aging coal plants, örtüşen çıkar coal dependence breaks.

Per-plant emisyonlar, health costs, and reliability data. Eskom's coal fleet is extensively documented — multiple plants fail to meet South Africa's own emission standards (granted repeated postponements). W'yi hesaplanabilir kılar.
Kırılamaz. Coal combustion releases SO₂, PM2.5, mercury, and CO₂. South Africa's coal is high-ash content, exacerbating particulate emisyonlar.
a: Şuraya bildirin: DFFE (Department of Forestry, Balıkçılık and the Environment)
Report through groundWork or Centre for Environmental Rights
Şu yolla belgeleyin: Public Protector complaints
Eskom: Uygulamak coal plant decommissioning schedule aligned with IRP 2019
Mining companies (Exxaro, Thungela, Seriti): Geliştirmek coal transition plans
Renewable IPPs: Scale deployment to replace coal capacity
NERSA (National Energy Regulator): Reform yapmak tariffs to reflect coal externalities
DFFE: Uygulatmak Minimum Emission Standards without further postponements
DMRE (Department of Mineral Resources and Energy): Accelerate IRP 2019 renewable targets
Temsilcinizle iletişime geçin: Member of Parliament in the National Assembly (400 members) or NCOP (National Council of Provinces, 90 members) talep etmek için Eskom emission standard compliance
Support JETP implementation and accountability mechanisms
Şu yolla savunuculuk yapın: BRICS for just energy transition principles
Şunu talep edin: climate finance delivery through Green Climate Fund
i: DFFE — the environment department. groundWork — South African çevresel justice organization. Centre for Environmental Rights — public interest çevresel law organization. Life After Coal campaign — coalition challenging Eskom's coal dependence.

Eskom — state electricity utility, operates 15 coal-fired power stations. Exxaro Resources — coal madencilik. Thungela Resources — thermal coal (spun off from Anglo American). Seriti Resources — coal madencilik. REIPPPP (Renewable Energy Independent Power Producer Procurement Programme) — auction program.

NERSA — enerji düzenleyicisi. DMRE — mineral resources and energy department. IRP 2019 (Integrated Resource Plan) — South Africa's electricity plan. JETP Investment Plan — guides $8.5B transition funding.

Parliament of South Africa — bicameral: National Assembly (400 members) and National Council of Provinces (90 members). Contact through parliament.gov.za. South Africa is a constitutional demokrasi, G20 member, BRICS member. JETP International Partners Group: France, Germany, UK, US, EU.

ZM.s: Southern African ekonomi ($25.3B GSYİH). Mining 28.25% GSYİH — one of the highest madencilik dependencies globally (copper). Orman rantları 6.78%. Hizmetler 57.2%. Africa's second-largest copper producer. Democratic governance with peaceful power transitions.

sectors.w: Zambia's copper madencilik generates acid mine drainage and SO₂ from smelting (Mopani, KCM — historically among Africa's worst polluters). Ne zaman maden başına çevresel data is published, W hesaplanabilir hale gelir.
bp: Mining royalty reform with çevresel earmarking. Ne zaman madencilik revenue is partly allocated to çevresel remediation, örtüşen çıkar externalizing pollution costs zayıflar.
Per-mine çevresel monitoring data through ZEITI and ZEMA. W'yi hesaplanabilir kılar.
Kısmen kırılabilir. Copper smelting emisyonlar can be reduced with modern sulfuric acid capture technology. Mopani smelter upgrade demonstrates this.
a: Şuraya bildirin: ZEMA (Zambia Environmental Management Agency)
Şu yolla belgeleyin: community organizations in Copperbelt Province
Report through madencilik company compliance channels
First Quantum Minerals (Kansanshi): Uygulamak international çevresel standards
Barrick Gold (Lumwana): Benimsemek enhanced tailings management
ZCCM-IH (state madencilik holding): Require çevresel compliance from partners
ZEMA: Uygulatmak emission standards for copper smelters
Ministry of Mines: Güçlendirmek çevresel conditions in madencilik licenses
ZEITI: Expand to include çevresel data
Temsilcinizle iletişime geçin: Member of Parliament in the National Assembly (156 members) talep etmek için çevresel enforcement on the Copperbelt
Support EITI enhanced reporting with çevresel data
Şu yolla savunuculuk yapın: SADC for regional madencilik çevresel standards
Şunu talep edin: responsible mineral supply chain standards (copper is critical for energy transition)
i: ZEMA — çevresel management agency. Copperbelt communities have suffered decades of SO₂ and heavy metal pollution — documented by multiple studies and legal cases (e.g., Vedanta/KCM litigation in UK courts).

First Quantum Minerals — operates Kansanshi (one of Africa's largest copper mines) and Sentinel mines. Barrick Gold — operates Lumwana copper mine. Mopani Copper Mines — majority owned by ZCCM-IH after Glencore divestment. KCM (Konkola Copper Mines) — under provisional liquidation.
Ministry of Mines and Minerals Geliştirmekment. ZEITI (Zambia Extractive Industries Transparency Initiative) — EITI member. Mining Cadastre Department — licensing authority.

National Assembly of Zambia — unicameral, 156 elected members + 8 nominated. Contact through parliament.gov.zm. Zambia is a presidential republic with competitive elections (peaceful transitions in 1991, 2011, 2021). SADC (Southern African Geliştirmekment Community) member.

ZW.s: Southern African ekonomi ($41.5B GSYİH). Mining 4.24% GSYİH (platinum group metals, gold, lithium, diamonds). Tarım 8.7%. İmalat 15.6%. Orman rantları 1.82%. Governance concerns. Major lithium reserves (Bikita, Arcadia).

sectors.w: Zimbabwe's madencilik sector is expanding rapidly (lithium — critical for EV batteries — and PGMs). Ne zaman maden başına çevresel data is published alongside revenue, W hesaplanabilir hale gelir.
bp: International supply chain due diligence for critical minerals (lithium for EU Battery Regulation compliance). Ne zaman EU buyers require çevresel verification, örtüşen çıkar unregulated extraction zayıflar.
Per-mine çevresel monitoring through ZEITI (Zimbabwe applied for EITI candidacy). W'yi hesaplanabilir kılar.
Kısmen kırılabilir. Lithium madencilik (hard-rock) generates waste rock and uses water. Best-practice processing and water recycling reduce sistem bağımlılığı.
a: Şuraya bildirin: EMA (Environmental Management Agency)
Şu yolla belgeleyin: ZELA (Zimbabwe Environmental Law Association)
Report through international madencilik company compliance channels
Zimplats (Impala Platinum): Uygulamak international çevresel standards
Prospect Lithium (Bikita Minerals): Benimsemek responsible lithium madencilik practices
Zim Integrated (Arcadia): Apply EU Battery Regulation-aligned çevresel standards
Ministry of Mines: Uygulatmak çevresel conditions in madencilik licenses
EMA: Güçlendirmek çevresel impact assessment for lithium projects
ZMDC (Zimbabwe Mining Geliştirmekment Corporation): Require çevresel compliance from joint venture partners
Engage through available parlamenter channels — Parliament of Zimbabwe: National Assembly (270 members) and Senate (80 members); note limited political pluralism in practice
Support EU Battery Regulation supply chain due diligence requirements for Zimbabwean lithium
Şu yolla savunuculuk yapın: SADC Mining Protocol for regional çevresel standards
Şunu talep edin: EITI membership to improve madencilik şeffaflık
i: EMA — çevresel management agency. ZELA — çevresel law organization. Note: sivil toplum space is constrained in Zimbabwe.

Zimplats — Zimbabwe's largest PGM producer (Impala Platinum subsidiary). Bikita Minerals — lithium madencilik (Sinomine Resources acquired). Arcadia Lithium — major lithium deposit (Zhejiang Huayou Cobalt acquired). Caledonia Mining — gold.
Ministry of Mines and Mining Geliştirmekment. EMA — çevresel regulation. ZMDC — state madencilik company. Zimbabwe's Mines and Minerals Act governs the sector.

Parliament of Zimbabwe — bicameral: National Assembly (270 members) and Senate (80 members). Note: ZANU-PF dominance limits effective legislative oversight. International channels: SADC, AU, EITI (Zimbabwe has expressed interest in joining).

CN.s: World's second-largest ekonomi ($18,743.8B GSYİH). İmalat 24.9% GSYİH — global factory floor. Kömür rantları 0.61%. Sanayi 36.5%. Hizmetler 56.7%. One-party state (CPC). World's largest CO₂ emitter. Rapid renewable deployment alongside continued coal expansion.

sectors.w: China operates ~1,100 GW of coal capacity — more than the rest of the world combined. However, China also deploys more yenilenebilir enerji annually than any other country. Ne zaman renewable deployment makes new coal uneconomic, örtüşen çıkar coal expansion breaks.
bp: Renewable energy cost competitiveness — China's solar and wind are already cheaper than new coal in most provinces. Ne zaman existing coal plants become more expensive to run than new renewables, the örtüşen çıkar breaks. This is already happening in eastern provinces.
Per-plant emisyonlar data. China's national ETS (launched 2021) covers ~4.5 billion tonnes CO₂. Expanding coverage from electricity to industry sectors makes W computable.
Kırılamaz. Coal combustion releases CO₂, SO₂, PM2.5, and mercury by chemistry.
a: Şuraya bildirin: MEE (Ministry of Ecology and Environment, 生态环境部)
Report through provincial çevresel protection bureaus
Şu yolla belgeleyin: 12369 çevresel complaint hotline
State energy companies (CHN Energy, Huaneng, Datang, Huadian, SPIC): Accelerate coal-to-renewables transition
Reduce new coal plant approvals
Yatırım yapmak grid-scale storage to enable renewable integration
NEA (National Energy Administration, 国家能源局): Limit new coal approvals to replace-and-retire
MEE: Accelerate national ETS coverage expansion to cement, steel, aluminum
NDRC: Align electricity market reform with carbon reduction targets
Support US-China climate cooperation mechanisms (Sunnylands process)
Şu yolla savunuculuk yapın: COP process for China's coal phase-down commitments
Şunu talep edin: national ETS carbon price to rise above marginal abatement cost
Support technology cooperation on CCS and grid-scale storage
i: MEE (Ministry of Ecology and Environment) — central çevre otoritesi. 12369 hotline — çevresel complaint system receiving millions of reports annually. Provincial Environmental Protection Bureaus — local enforcement. IPE (Institute of Public & Environmental Affairs, 公众环境研究中心) — Ma Jun's NGO providing corporate çevresel data.

China's 'Big Five' power generators: CHN Energy (国家能源集团), China Huaneng (华能), China Datang (大唐), China Huadian (华电), SPIC (国家电投). All devlete ait, collectively operating most coal capacity. Also rapidly scaling renewables.

NEA (National Energy Administration) — energy planning and regulation. NDRC (National Geliştirmekment and Reform yapmak Commission, 国家发展和改革委员会) — economic planning, sets electricity prices. National ETS — world's largest carbon market by coverage (power sector).

National People's Congress (全国人民代表大会) — ~3,000 members. China is a tek parti devleti — the NPC does not function as an independent legislature. International channels: US-China climate bilateral, COP/UNFCCC, G20. China's dual carbon targets: peak CO₂ before 2030, carbon neutrality by 2060.

KR.s: Advanced ekonomi ($1,875.4B GSYİH). İmalat 26.6% GSYİH (semiconductors, automobiles, shipbuilding, petrochemicals). Hizmetler 57.5%. Heavy energy import dependence. Fourth-largest coal importer globally. G20 member. Vibrant demokrasi.

sectors.w: South Korea operates ~37 GW of coal capacity and is the world's 4th-largest coal importer. The 10th Basic Plan for Electricity Supply and Demand targets coal phase-down. Ne zaman carbon pricing (K-ETS) makes coal uncompetitive versus LNG and renewables, the örtüşen çıkar breaks.
bp: K-ETS (Korea Emissions Trading Scheme) carbon price escalation. Ne zaman carbon costs make coal-fired generation more expensive than LNG and renewables, örtüşen çıkar coal dependence breaks.
Per-plant emisyonlar and health cost data. Korea Environment Institute and Korean medical associations have documented coal plant health impacts. W'yi hesaplanabilir kılar.
Kırılamaz. Coal combustion releases SO₂, PM2.5, and CO₂.
a: Şuraya bildirin: Ministry of Environment (환경부)
Şu yolla belgeleyin: KFEM (Korean Federation for Environmental Movements, 환경운동연합)
Report through KEPCO compliance channels
KEPCO (Korea Electric Power Corporation, 한국전력공사): Uygulamak coal retirement schedule aligned with NDC
POSCO: Scale hydrogen-based steelmaking (HyREX)
Samsung, SK, Hyundai: Expand renewable electricity procurement (RE100 commitments)
MOTIE (Ministry of Trade, Industry and Energy, 산업통상자원부): Accelerate coal retirement in Basic Electricity Plan
Ministry of Environment: Güçlendirmek K-ETS carbon price floor
KPX (Korea Power Exchange): Reform yapmak merit order to disadvantage coal

Support Powering Past Coal Alliance membership
Şu yolla savunuculuk yapın: OECD for coal finance phase-out
Şunu talep edin: G20 commitment to end international coal financing (South Korea pledged to end overseas coal finance in 2021)
i: Ministry of Environment (환경부) — çevre otoritesi. KFEM (환경운동연합) — South Korea's largest çevresel NGO. Solutions for Our Climate (기후솔루션) — climate policy advocacy organization.
KEPCO — state electricity company (subsidiary gencos operate coal plants). POSCO — steelmaker, major coal consumer. Samsung, SK Group, Hyundai — major conglomerates with growing RE100 commitments.
MOTIE — energy and industry ministry. K-ETS — Korea Emissions Trading Scheme (launched 2015, covers ~70% of national emisyonlar). KPX (한국전력거래소) — electricity market operator.

국회 (National Assembly) — unicameral, 300 members. Contact through assembly.go.kr. South Korea is a presidential republic with competitive elections. G20 member, OECD member, Powering Past Coal Alliance member (joined 2021).
